196.yw_zh: 这使主希瓦能够明白自己的地位和状态，以及有着无限力量的至尊人格首神的地位和状态。获得这一认识的他，对主维施努以神奇的方式对他所做的一切一点都不感到惊讶。
196.yw_en: Thus Lord Śiva could understand his position and that of the Supreme Personality of Godhead, who has unlimited potencies. Having reached this understanding, he was not at all surprised by the wonderful way Lord Viṣṇu had acted upon him.
196.yz_zh: 至尊人格首神以绝对有力量闻名于世，因为没人能在任何活动中胜过他。《博伽梵歌》第7章的第7节诗记载，至尊主说:”赢得财富的人啊!我是至高无上的真理(mattah parataram na-nyat kincid asti dhananjaya)。”没人能与至尊主平等或比他伟大，因为他是每一个人的主人。正如《永恒的柴坦亚经》(Caitanya-carita-mrta)首篇第5章的第142节诗说明:至尊人格首神奎师那是众生的主人(ekale isvara krsna， ara saba bhrtya)，甚至包括主希瓦，更不要说其他生物了。主希瓦已经认识到主维施努的至尊力量，当他被实际置于混乱的状态后，他为有这样一位崇高的主人而感到自豪。
196.yz_en: The Supreme Personality of Godhead is known as all-powerful because no one can excel Him in any activity. In Bhagavad-gītā (7.7) the Lord says, mattaḥ parataraṁ nānyat kiñcid asti dhanañjaya: “O conqueror of wealth, there is no truth superior to Me.” No one can equal the Lord or be greater than Him, for He is the master of everyone. As stated in Caitanya-caritāmṛta (Ādi 5.142), ekale īśvara kṛṣṇa, āra saba bhṛtya. The Supreme Personality of Godhead, Kṛṣṇa, is the only master of everyone, including even Lord Śiva, what to speak of others. Lord Śiva was already aware of the supreme power of Lord Viṣṇu, but when he was actually put into bewilderment, he felt proud to have such an exalted master.

196.ldw:
tam aviklavam avrīḍam
 ālakṣya madhusūdanaḥ
uvāca parama-prīto
 bibhrat svāṁ pauruṣīṁ tanum|
196.ldw_fc: tam ; aviklavam ; avrīḍam ; ālakṣya ; madhu-sūdanaḥ ; uvāca ; parama-prītaḥ ; bibhrat ; svām ; pauruṣīm ; tanum ;
196.words_en_fc: him (Lord Śiva); without being agitated by the incident that had taken place; without being ashamed; seeing; the Supreme Personality of Godhead, who is known as Madhusūdana, the killer of the demon Madhu; said; being very pleased; assuming; His own; original; form.;
196.yw_zh: 看到主希瓦没有激动不安，没有感到羞愧，而且很坦然，主维施努(玛杜苏丹)十分高兴。于是，祂恢复自己原本的形象，说了如下一番话。
196.yw_en: Seeing Lord Śiva unagitated and unashamed, Lord Viṣṇu [Madhusūdana] was very pleased. Thus He resumed His original form and spoke as follows.
196.yz_zh: 主希瓦虽然对主维施努的力量感到震惊，但却没有感到羞愧。相反，被主维施努打败让他感到很自豪。没有什么能瞒过至尊人格首神，因为他就在每一个人的心中。事实上，《博伽梵歌》第15章的第15节诗记载，至尊主说:”我在众生的心中。记忆、知识和遗忘都来自我(sarvasya caham hrdi sannivisto mattah smr-tir jnanam apohanam ca)。”一切都在至尊人格首神的指挥下发生，因此没有什么需要难过或羞愧的。主希瓦虽然从没被任何人打败过，但被主维施努打败后，却对自己有这样一位崇高且强大的主人而感到自豪。
196.yz_en: Although Lord Śiva was aghast at the potency of Lord Viṣṇu, he did not feel ashamed. Rather, he was proud to be defeated by Lord Viṣṇu. Nothing is hidden from the Supreme Personality of Godhead, for He is in everyone’s heart. Indeed, the Lord says in Bhagavad-gītā (15.15), sarvasya cāhaṁ hṛdi sanniviṣṭo mattaḥ smṛtir jñānam apohanaṁ ca: “I am seated in everyone’s heart, and from Me come remembrance, knowledge and forgetfulness.” Whatever happened had taken place under the direction of the Supreme Personality of Godhead, and therefore there was no cause to be sorry or ashamed. Although Lord Śiva is never defeated by anyone, when defeated by Lord Viṣṇu he felt proud that he had such an exalted and powerful master.

196.ldw:
śrī-bhagavān uvāca|diṣṭyā tvaṁ vibudha-śreṣṭha
 svāṁ niṣṭhām ātmanā sthitaḥ
yan me strī-rūpayā svairaṁ
 mohito ’py aṅga māyayā|
196.ldw_fc: śrī-bhagavān uvāca ; diṣṭyā ; tvam ; vibudha-śreṣṭha ; svām ; niṣṭhām ; ātmanā ; sthitaḥ ; yat ; me ; strī-rūpayā ; svairam ; mohitaḥ ; api ; aṅga ; māyayā ;
196.words_en_fc: the Supreme Personality of Godhead said; all auspiciousness; unto you; O best of all the demigods; in your own; fixed situation; of your own self; you are situated; as; Mine; appearance like a woman; sufficiently; enchanted; in spite of; O Lord Śiva; by My potency.;
196.yw_zh: 至尊人格首神说:最杰出的半神人啊！你虽然因为我呈现一个女人形象的力量而受到十足的烦扰，但你仍处在自己原本的状态中。因此，愿所有的好运降临于你。
196.yw_en: The Supreme Personality of Godhead said: O best of the demigods, although you have been amply harassed because of My potency in assuming the form of a woman, you are established in your position. Therefore, may all good fortune be upon you.
196.yz_zh: 主希瓦是最优秀的半神人，所以是最优秀的奉献者(vaisnavanam yatha sambhuh)。至尊人格首神为此赞扬他树立的榜样，给予他祝福说:”愿所有的好运降临于你。”当奉献者变得有些骄傲时，至尊主有时就会展示他的至尊力量，消除他奉献者的错误认识。在受到主维施努的力量的刺激后，主希瓦恢复他原本不受打扰的状态。这是奉献者的状态。奉献者在任何情况下， 哪怕是最糟糕的逆境中，都应该处之泰然。正如《博伽梵歌》第6章的第22节诗中证实:奉献者因为对至尊人格首神充满信心，所以在最严峻的磨难中都从不会变得激动不安(yasmin sthito na duh-khena gurunapi vicalyate)。只有一流的奉献者才有可能做到不骄傲，而主商布就是其中的一员。
196.yz_en: Since Lord Śiva is the best of the demigods, he is the best of all devotees (vaiṣṇavānāṁ yathā śambhuḥ). His exemplary character was therefore praised by the Supreme Personality of Godhead, who gave His benediction by saying, “May all good fortune be upon you.” When a devotee becomes a little proud, the Supreme Lord sometimes exhibits His supreme power to dissipate the devotee’s misunderstanding. After being amply harassed by Lord Viṣṇu’s potency, Lord Śiva resumed his normal, unagitated condition. This is the position of a devotee. A devotee should not be agitated under any circumstances, even in the worst reverses. As confirmed in Bhagavad-gītā (6.22), yasmin sthito na duḥkhena guruṇāpi vicālyate: because of his full faith in the Supreme Personality of Godhead, a devotee is never agitated, even in the greatest trials. This pridelessness is possible only for the first-class devotees, of whom Lord Śambhu is one.

196.ldw:
ko nu me ’titaren māyāṁ
 viṣaktas tvad-ṛte pumān
tāṁs tān visṛjatīṁ bhāvān
 dustarām akṛtātmabhiḥ|
196.ldw_fc: kaḥ ; nu ; me ; atitaret ; māyām ; viṣaktaḥ ; tvat-ṛte ; pumān ; tān ; tān ; visṛjatīm ; bhāvān ; dustarām ; akṛta-ātmabhiḥ ;
196.words_en_fc: what; indeed; My; can surpass; illusory energy; attached to material sense enjoyment; except for you; person; such conditions; unto the materially attached persons; in surpassing; reactions of material activities; very difficult to surmount; by persons unable to control their senses.;
196.yw_zh: 我亲爱的主商布，除了你，在这个物质世界中的众生有谁能胜过我的错觉能量?人们通常都依恋感官享乐， 被它的影响所征服。事实上，他们很难超越物质自然的影响。
196.yw_en: My dear Lord Śambhu, who within this material world but you can surpass My illusory energy? People are generally attached to sense enjoyment and conquered by its influence. Indeed, the influence of material nature is very difficult for them to surmount.
196.yz_zh: 在布茹阿玛、维施努和玛黑施瓦尔这三位首要的半神人中，除了维施努，其他两位都与玛亚接触。《永恒的柴坦亚经》中描述他们”处在玛亚的影响下(mayi)”。但事实上，尽管主希瓦与玛亚在一起，可他并不受影响。生物受玛亚的影响，但主希瓦虽然很显然在与玛亚交往，可却不受影响。换句话说，在这个物质世界里，除了主希瓦，众生都被错觉能量玛亚所左右。主希瓦既不属于维施努范畴(visnu-tattva)，也不属于个体灵魂范畴(jiva-tattva)。他介于两者之间。
196.yz_en: Of the three chief demigods — Brahmā, Viṣṇu and Maheśvara — all but Viṣṇu are under the influence of māyā. In Caitanya-caritāmṛta, they are described as māyī, which means “under māyā’s influence.” But even though Lord Śiva associates with māyā, he is not influenced. The living entities are affected by māyā, but although Lord Śiva apparently associates with māyā, he is not affected. In other words, all living entities within this material world except for Lord Śiva are swayed by māyā. Lord Śiva is therefore neither viṣṇu-tattva nor jīva-tattva. He is between the two.

196.ldw:
seyaṁ guṇa-mayī māyā
 na tvām abhibhaviṣyati
mayā sametā kālena
 kāla-rūpeṇa bhāgaśaḥ|
196.ldw_fc: sā ; iyam ; guṇa-mayī ; māyā ; na ; tvām ; abhibhaviṣyati ; mayā ; sametā ; kālena ; kāla-rūpeṇa ; bhāgaśaḥ ;
196.words_en_fc: that insurmountable; this; consisting of the three modes of material nature; illusory energy; not; you; will be able to bewilder in the future; with Me; joined; eternal time; in the form of time; with her different parts.;
196.yw_zh: 配合我的创造并展示在物质自然三种属性中的物质外在能量玛亚，将不再能使你迷感。
196.yw_en: The material, external energy [māyā], who cooperates with Me in creation and who is manifested in the three modes of nature, will not be able to bewilder you any longer.
196.yz_zh:
主希瓦出现时，他的妻子杜尔嘎也会在场。杜尔嘎与至尊人格首神配合创造这个宇宙展示。《博伽梵歌》第9章的第10节诗记载，至尊主说:”琨缇的儿子啊!物质自然是我的一种能量，在我的指挥下活动，产生动与不动的一切(mayadhyaksena pra-krtih suyate sacaracaram)。”物质自然(prakrti)就是杜尔嘎。

杜尔嘎以时间(kala)的形式协助主维施努创造整个宇宙。他瞥视并创造世界(sa iksata lokan nu srja) ;他创造世界(sa imal lokan asrja-ta)。这是韦达经的说法(《艾塔瑞亚奥义书》1.1.1-2)。玛亚正巧是主希瓦的妻子，因此主希瓦与玛亚接触，但主维施努在此向主希瓦保证，这位玛亚再也不能使他迷惑了。
196.yz_en:
When Lord Śiva was present, his wife, Durgā, was also there. Durgā works in cooperation with the Supreme Personality of Godhead in creating the cosmic manifestation. The Lord says in Bhagavad-gītā (9.10), mayādhyakṣeṇa prakṛtiḥ sūyate sacarācaram: “The material energy [prakṛti] works under My direction, O son of Kuntī, and is producing all moving and unmoving beings.” Prakṛti is Durgā.

sṛṣṭi-sthiti-pralaya-sādhana-śaktir ekā
 chāyeva yasya bhuvanāni bibharti durgā

The entire cosmos is created by Durgā in cooperation with Lord Viṣṇu in the form of kāla, time: Sa īkṣata lokān nu sṛjā. Sa imāḻ lokān asṛjata. This is the version of the Vedas (Aitareya Upaniṣad 1.1.1-2). Māyā happens to be the wife of Lord Śiva, and thus Lord Śiva is in association with māyā, but Lord Viṣṇu here assures Lord Śiva that this māyā will no longer be able to captivate him.

196.ldw:
śrī-śuka uvāca|evaṁ bhagavatā rājan
 śrīvatsāṅkena sat-kṛtaḥ
āmantrya taṁ parikramya
 sagaṇaḥ svālayaṁ yayau|
196.ldw_fc: śrī-śukaḥ uvāca ; evam ; bhagavatā ; rājan ; śrīvatsa-aṅkena ; sat-kṛtaḥ ; āmantrya ; tam ; parikramya ; sa-gaṇaḥ ; sva-ālayam ; yayau ;
196.words_en_fc: Śrī Śukadeva Gosvāmī said; thus; by the Supreme Personality of Godhead; O King; who always carries the mark of Śrīvatsa on His breast; being very much applauded; taking permission from; Him; circumambulating; with his associates; to his own abode; went back.;
196.yw_zh: 舒卡戴瓦·哥斯瓦米说:君王啊!受到胸前有施瑞瓦特萨标志的至尊首神的这番赞扬后，主希瓦绕拜了祂。 接着，在征得至尊主的允许后，主希瓦与他的同伴们返回他自己的住地凯拉斯。
196.yw_en: Śukadeva Gosvāmī said: O King, having thus been praised by the Supreme Personality, who bears the mark of Śrīvatsa on His chest, Lord Śiva circumambulated Him. Then, after taking permission from Him, Lord Śiva returned to his abode, Kailāsa, along with his associates.
196.yz_zh: 圣维施瓦纳特·查夸瓦尔提·塔库尔评论说:当主希瓦向主维施努致敬时，主维施努起身拥抱他。正因为如此，这节诗文中用了”胸膛上始终有施瑞瓦特萨标志的人(srivatsankena)” 一词。施瑞瓦特萨标志装饰着主维施努的胸膛，所以当主维施努拥抱朝拜他的主希瓦时，施瑞瓦特萨标志触碰到主希瓦的胸膛。
196.yz_en: Śrīla Viśvanātha Cakravartī Ṭhākura remarks that when Lord Śiva was offering obeisances unto Lord Viṣṇu, Lord Viṣṇu arose and embraced him. Therefore the word śrīvatsāṅkena is used here. The mark of Śrīvatsa adorns the chest of Lord Viṣṇu, and therefore when Lord Viṣṇu embraced Lord Śiva while being circumambulated, the Śrīvatsa mark touched Lord Śiva’s bosom.

196.ldw:
ātmāṁśa-bhūtāṁ tāṁ māyāṁ
 bhavānīṁ bhagavān bhavaḥ
sammatām ṛṣi-mukhyānāṁ
 prītyācaṣṭātha bhārata|
196.ldw_fc: ātma-aṁśa-bhūtām ; tām ; māyām ; bhavānīm ; bhagavān ; bhavaḥ ; sammatām ; ṛṣi-mukhyānām ; prītyā ; ācaṣṭa ; atha ; bhārata ;
196.words_en_fc: a potency of the Supreme Soul; unto her; the illusory energy; who is the wife of Lord Śiva; the powerful; Lord Śiva; accepted; by the great sages; in jubilation; began to address; then; O Mahārāja Parīkṣit, descendant of Bharata.;
196.yw_zh: 巴茹阿特王的后裔啊!满心欢喜的主希瓦，随后对被全体权威人士公认为是主维施努的力量的他妻子芭娃妮说了如下一番话。
196.yw_en: O descendant of Bharata Mahārāja, Lord Śiva, in jubilation, then addressed his wife, Bhavānī, who is accepted by all authorities as the potency of Lord Viṣṇu.

196.ldw:
ayi vyapaśyas tvam ajasya māyāṁ
 parasya puṁsaḥ para-devatāyāḥ
ahaṁ kalānām ṛṣabho ’pi muhye
 yayāvaśo ’nye kim utāsvatantrāḥ|
196.ldw_fc: ayi ; vyapaśyaḥ ; tvam ; ajasya ; māyām ; parasya puṁsaḥ ; para-devatāyāḥ ; aham ; kalānām ; ṛṣabhaḥ ; api ; muhye ; yayā ; avaśaḥ ; anye ; kim uta ; asvatantrāḥ ;
196.words_en_fc: oh; have seen; you; of the unborn; the illusory energy; of the Supreme Person; the Absolute Truth; myself; of plenary portions; the chief; although; became bewildered; by her; imperceptibly; others; what to speak of; fully dependent on māyā.;
196.yw_zh: 主希瓦说:女神啊！你现在看到作为众生不经出生就存在的主人一一至尊人格首神所具有的错觉能量了。尽管我是祂圣上的重要扩展之一，但就连我都受到祂能量的迷惑。还用说其他完全依赖错觉能量的人吗?
196.yw_en: Lord Śiva said: O Goddess, you have now seen the illusory energy of the Supreme Personality of Godhead, who is the unborn master of everyone. Although I am one of the principal expansions of His Lordship, even I was illusioned by His energy. What then is to be said of others, who are fully dependent on māyā?

196.ldw:
yaṁ mām apṛcchas tvam upetya yogāt
 samā-sahasrānta upārataṁ vai
sa eṣa sākṣāt puruṣaḥ purāṇo
 na yatra kālo viśate na vedaḥ|
196.ldw_fc: yam ; mām ; apṛcchaḥ ; tvam ; upetya ; yogāt ; samā ; sahasra-ante ; upāratam ; vai ; saḥ ; eṣaḥ ; sākṣāt ; puruṣaḥ ; purāṇaḥ ; na ; yatra ; kālaḥ ; viśate ; na ; vedaḥ ;
196.words_en_fc: about whom; from me; inquired; you; coming near me; from performing mystic yoga; years; at the end of one thousand; ceasing; indeed; He; here is; directly; the Supreme Person; the original; not; where; eternal time; can enter; nor; the Vedas.;
196.yw_zh: 当我完成练神秘瑜伽一千年时，你问我，我在冥想谁。现在，这里就是那位时间对祂毫无影响、研究韦达经无法了解祂的至尊人。
196.yw_en: When I finished performing mystic yoga for one thousand years, you asked me upon whom I was meditating. Now, here is that Supreme Person to whom time has no entrance and who the Vedas cannot understand.
196.yz_zh: 永恒时间进入一切地方，但却无法进入神的王国。韦达经(Vedas)也无法了解至尊人格首神。这表明至尊主是全能、无所不在和全知的。
196.yz_en: Eternal time enters anywhere and everywhere, but it cannot enter the kingdom of god. Nor can the Vedas understand the Supreme Personality of Godhead. This is an indication of the Lord’s being omnipotent, omnipresent and omniscient.

196.ldw:
śrī-śuka uvāca|iti te ’bhihitas tāta
 vikramaḥ śārṅga-dhanvanaḥ
sindhor nirmathane yena
 dhṛtaḥ pṛṣṭhe mahācalaḥ|
196.ldw_fc: śrī-śukaḥ uvāca ; iti ; te ; abhihitaḥ ; tāta ; vikramaḥ ; śārṅga-dhanvanaḥ ; sindhoḥ ; nirmathane ; yena ; dhṛtaḥ ; pṛṣṭhe ; mahā-acalaḥ ;
196.words_en_fc: Śrī Śukadeva Gosvāmī said; thus; unto you; explained; my dear King; prowess; of the Supreme Personality of Godhead, who carries the Śārṅga bow; of the Ocean of Milk; in the churning; by whom; was held; on the back; the great mountain.;
196.yw_zh: 舒卡戴瓦·哥斯瓦米说:我亲爱的君王，为搅拌牛奶之洋而将巨山驮在自己背上的人，就是这同一位被称为携带沙仁嘎弓的至尊人格首神。我现在给你描述了祂的非凡能力。
196.yw_en: Śukadeva Gosvāmī said: My dear King, the person who bore the great mountain on His back for the churning of the Ocean of Milk is the same Supreme Personality of Godhead, known as Śārṅga-dhanvā. I have now described to you His prowess.

196.ldw:
etan muhuḥ kīrtayato ’nuśṛṇvato
 na riṣyate jātu samudyamaḥ kvacit
yad uttamaśloka-guṇānuvarṇanaṁ
 samasta-saṁsāra-pariśramāpaham|
196.ldw_fc: etat ; muhuḥ ; kīrtayataḥ ; anuśṛṇvataḥ ; na ; riṣyate ; jātu ; samudyamaḥ ; kvacit ; yat ; uttamaśloka ; guṇa-anuvarṇanam ; samasta ; saṁsāra ; pariśrama ; apaham ;
196.words_en_fc: this narration; constantly; of one who chants; and also hears; not; annihilated; at any time; the endeavor; at any time; because; of the Supreme Personality of Godhead; describing the transcendental qualities; all; of material existence; misery; finishing.;
196.yw_zh: 为一直不断地聆听或描述对搅拌牛奶之洋这段叙述所做的努力，永远都不会没有效果。事实上，吟诵、吟唱至尊人格首神的荣耀，是消灭这物质世界里所有痛苦的唯一方法。
196.yw_en: The endeavor of one who constantly hears or describes this narration of the churning of the Ocean of Milk will never be fruitless. Indeed, chanting the glories of the Supreme Personality of Godhead is the only means to annihilate all sufferings in this material world.

196.ldw:
asad-aviṣayam aṅghriṁ bhāva-gamyaṁ prapannān
 amṛtam amara-varyān āśayat sindhu-mathyam
kapaṭa-yuvati-veṣo mohayan yaḥ surārīṁs
 tam aham upasṛtānāṁ kāma-pūraṁ nato ’smi|
196.ldw_fc: asat-aviṣayam ; aṅghrim ; bhāva-gamyam ; prapannān ; amṛtam ; amara-varyān ; āśayat ; sindhu-mathyam ; kapaṭa-yuvati-veṣaḥ ; mohayan ; yaḥ ; sura-arīn ; tam ; aham ; upasṛtānām ; kāma-pūram ; nataḥ asmi ;
196.words_en_fc: not understood by the atheists; unto the lotus feet of the Supreme Personality of Godhead; understood by devotees; fully surrendered; the nectar; only unto the demigods; gave to drink; produced from the Ocean of Milk; appearing as a false young girl; captivating; He who; the enemies of the demigods; unto Him; I; of the devotees; who fulfills all desires; I offer my respectful obeisances.;
196.yw_zh: 至尊人格首神呈现出一个年轻女子的形象，以迷惑恶魔，将搅拌牛奶之洋产出的甘露分发给祂的奉献者一一半神人。我向那位总是满足祂奉献者心愿的至尊人格首神， 致以虔敬的顶礼。
196.yw_en: Assuming the form of a young woman and thus bewildering the demons, the Supreme Personality of Godhead distributed to His devotees, the demigods, the nectar produced from the churning of the Ocean of Milk. Unto that Supreme Personality of Godhead, who always fulfills the desires of His devotees, I offer my respectful obeisances.
196.yz_zh:
搅拌牛奶之洋这段叙述所蕴涵的教导，由至尊人格首神清楚地揭示出来。他虽然平等对待众生，但由于自然的情感而支持他的奉献者。《博伽梵歌》第9章的第29节诗记载，至尊主说:

“我不嫉妒谁，也不偏袒谁。我平等对待众生。但是，为我做奉爱服务的人是我的朋友，在我心中，而我也是他的朋友。”至尊人格首神的这种偏心是很自然的。照顾自己孩子的人并不是出于偏心，而是进行爱的交流。孩子依靠父亲的情感，而父亲充满深情地养育孩子。同样，由于奉献者除了至尊主的莲花足外不知道别的，至尊主总是准备保护他的奉献者，满足他们的愿望。因此他说:”琨缇的儿子啊!你勇敢地宣布，我的奉献者永不毁灭(kaunteya pratijanihi na me bhaktah pranasyati)。”

到此为止，结束了巴克提韦丹塔对《圣典博伽瓦谭》第8篇第11章——”至尊主的摩黑妮形象使主希瓦迷惑”所作的阐释。
196.yz_en:
The instruction of this narration concerning the churning of the Milk Ocean is clearly manifested by the Supreme Personality of Godhead. Although He is equal to everyone, because of natural affection He favors His devotees. The Lord says in Bhagavad-gītā (9.29):

samo ’haṁ sarva-bhūteṣu
 na me dveṣyo ’sti na priyaḥ
ye bhajanti tu māṁ bhaktyā
 mayi te teṣu cāpy aham

“I envy no one, nor am I partial to anyone. I am equal to all. But whoever renders service unto Me in devotion is a friend, is in Me, and I am also a friend to him.” This partiality of the Supreme Personality of Godhead is natural. A person cares for his children not because of partiality but in a reciprocation of love. The children depend on the father’s affection, and the father affectionately maintains the children. Similarly, because devotees do not know anything but the lotus feet of the Lord, the Lord is always prepared to give protection to His devotees and fulfill their desires. He therefore says, kaunteya pratijānīhi na me bhaktaḥ praṇaśyati: “O son of Kuntī, declare it boldly that My devotee never perishes.”

Thus end the Bhaktivedanta purports of the Eighth Canto, Twelfth Chapter, of the Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam, entitled “The Mohinī-mūrti Incarnation Bewilders Lord Śiva.”

197.ldw:
śrī-śuka uvāca|manur vivasvataḥ putraḥ
 śrāddhadeva iti śrutaḥ
saptamo vartamāno yas
 tad-apatyāni me śṛṇu|
197.ldw_fc: śrī-śukaḥ uvāca ; manuḥ ; vivasvataḥ ; putraḥ ; śrāddhadevaḥ ; iti ; śrutaḥ ; saptamaḥ ; vartamānaḥ ; yaḥ ; tat ; apatyāni ; me ; śṛṇu ;
197.words_en_fc: Śrī Śukadeva Gosvāmī said; Manu; of the sun-god; son; as Śrāddhadeva; thus; known, celebrated; seventh; at the present moment; he who; his; children; from me; just hear.;
197.yw_zh: 舒卡戴瓦·哥斯瓦米说:现在这位名叫刷达戴瓦的玛努，是管辖太阳星球的神明维瓦斯万的儿子。刷达戴瓦晨第七位玛努。现在请听我讲述他的儿子们。
197.yw_en: Śukadeva Gosvāmī said: The present Manu, who is named Śrāddhadeva, is the son of Vivasvān, the predominating deity on the sun planet. Śrāddhadeva is the seventh Manu. Now please hear from me as I describe his sons.

197.ldw:
ikṣvākur nabhagaś caiva
 dhṛṣṭaḥ śaryātir eva ca
nariṣyanto ’tha nābhāgaḥ
 saptamo diṣṭa ucyate|tarūṣaś ca pṛṣadhraś ca
 daśamo vasumān smṛtaḥ
manor vaivasvatasyaite
 daśa-putrāḥ parantapa|
197.ldw_fc: ikṣvākuḥ ; nabhagaḥ ; ca ; eva ; dhṛṣṭaḥ ; śaryātiḥ ; eva ; ca ; nariṣyantaḥ ; atha ; nābhāgaḥ ; saptamaḥ ; diṣṭaḥ ; ucyate ; tarūṣaḥ ca ; pṛṣadhraḥ ca ; daśamaḥ ; vasumān ; smṛtaḥ ; manoḥ ; vaivasvatasya ; ete ; daśa-putrāḥ ; parantapa ;
197.words_en_fc: Ikṣvāku; Nabhaga; also; indeed; Dhṛṣṭa; Śaryāti; certainly; also; Nariṣyanta; as well as; Nābhāga; the seventh one; Diṣṭa; is so celebrated; and Tarūṣa; and Pṛṣadhra; the tenth one; Vasumān; known; of Manu; of Vaivasvata; all these; ten sons; O King.;
197.yw_zh: 瑞克西特王啊!这位玛努有十个儿子，前六个是依克施瓦库、拿巴嘎、兑施塔、沙尔亚提、纳瑞相塔、纳巴嘎。第七个儿子名叫达施塔。接下来是塔茹沙、普日沙铎，以及第十个儿子瓦苏曼。
197.yw_en: O King Parīkṣit, among the ten sons of Manu are Ikṣvāku, Nabhaga, Dhṛṣṭa, Śaryāti, Nariṣyanta and Nābhāga. The seventh son is known as Diṣṭa. Then come Tarūṣa and Pṛṣadhra, and the tenth son is known as Vasumān.

197.ldw:
ādityā vasavo rudrā
 viśvedevā marud-gaṇāḥ
aśvināv ṛbhavo rājann
 indras teṣāṁ purandaraḥ|
197.ldw_fc: ādityāḥ ; vasavaḥ ; rudrāḥ ; viśvedevāḥ ; marut-gaṇāḥ ; aśvinau ; ṛbhavaḥ ; rājan ; indraḥ ; teṣām ; purandaraḥ ;
197.words_en_fc: the Ādityas; the Vasus; the Rudras; the Viśvedevas; and the Maruts; the two Aśvinī brothers; the Ṛbhus; O King; the king of heaven; of them; Purandara.;
197.yw_zh: 君王啊!在这个玛努统治期间，阿迪提亚们、瓦苏们、茹铎们、维施维戴瓦们、玛茹特们、二位阿施维尼一库玛尔兄弟和瑞布们，都是半神人。他们的君王(因铎)是普冉达尔。
197.yw_en: In this manvantara, O King, the Ādityas, the Vasus, the Rudras, the Viśvedevas, the Maruts, the two Aśvinī-kumāra brothers and the Ṛbhus are the demigods. Their head king [Indra] is Purandara.

197.ldw:
kaśyapo ’trir vasiṣṭhaś ca
 viśvāmitro ’tha gautamaḥ
jamadagnir bharadvāja
 iti saptarṣayaḥ smṛtāḥ|
197.ldw_fc: kaśyapaḥ ; atriḥ ; vasiṣṭhaḥ ; ca ; viśvāmitraḥ ; atha ; gautamaḥ ; jamadagniḥ ; bharadvājaḥ ; iti ; sapta-ṛṣayaḥ ; smṛtāḥ ;
197.words_en_fc: Kaśyapa; Atri; Vasiṣṭha; and; Viśvāmitra; as well as; Gautama; Jamadagni; Bharadvāja; thus; the seven sages; celebrated.;
197.yw_zh: 喀夏帕、阿特瑞、瓦希施塔、维施瓦弥陀、高塔玛、佳玛达格尼和巴尔杜瓦佳，被称为七圣人
197.yw_en: Kaśyapa, Atri, Vasiṣṭha, Viśvāmitra, Gautama, Jamadagni and Bharadvāja are known as the seven sages.

197.ldw:
atrāpi bhagavaj-janma
 kaśyapād aditer abhūt
ādityānām avarajo
 viṣṇur vāmana-rūpa-dhṛk|
197.ldw_fc: atra ; api ; bhagavat-janma ; kaśyapāt ; aditeḥ ; abhūt ; ādityānām ; avara-jaḥ ; viṣṇuḥ ; vāmana-rūpa-dhṛk ;
197.words_en_fc: in this Manu’s reign; certainly; appearance of the Supreme Personality of Godhead; by Kaśyapa Muni; of mother Aditi; became possible; of the Ādityas; the youngest; Lord Viṣṇu Himself; appearing as Lord Vāmana.;
197.yw_zh: 在这位玛努统治期间，至尊人格首神显现为全体阿迪缇亚中最小的一位，是侏儒瓦玛纳。祂的父亲是喀夏帕，母亲是阿迪缇。
197.yw_en: In this manvantara, the Supreme Personality of Godhead appeared as the youngest of all the Ādityas, known as Vāmana, the dwarf. His father was Kaśyapa and His mother Aditi.

197.ldw:
saṅkṣepato mayoktāni
 sapta-manvantarāṇi te
bhaviṣyāṇy atha vakṣyāmi
 viṣṇoḥ śaktyānvitāni ca|
197.ldw_fc: saṅkṣepataḥ ; mayā ; uktāni ; sapta ; manu-antarāṇi ; te ; bhaviṣyāṇi ; atha ; vakṣyāmi ; viṣṇoḥ ; śaktyā anvitāni ; ca ;
197.words_en_fc: in brief; by me; explained; seven; changes of Manu; unto you; the future Manus; also; I shall speak; of Lord Viṣṇu; empowered by the energy; also.;
197.yw_zh: 我简短地给你讲解了七位玛努的状况。现在，我将讲述未来的玛努们，以及主维施努的化身。
197.yw_en: I have briefly explained to you the position of the seven Manus. Now I shall describe the future Manus, along with the incarnations of Lord Viṣṇu.

197.ldw:
vivasvataś ca dve jāye
 viśvakarma-sute ubhe
saṁjñā chāyā ca rājendra
 ye prāg abhihite tava|
197.ldw_fc: vivasvataḥ ; ca ; dve ; jāye ; viśvakarma-sute ; ubhe ; saṁjñā ; chāyā ; ca ; rāja-indra ; ye ; prāk ; abhihite ; tava ;
197.words_en_fc: of Vivasvān; also; two; wives; the two daughters of Viśvakarmā; both of them; Saṁjñā; Chāyā; and; O King; both of whom; before; described; unto you.;
197.yw_zh: 君王啊!我前面讲过维施瓦卡尔玛的两个女儿桑格雅和查雅。她们是太阳神维瓦斯万的前两位妻子。
197.yw_en: O King, I have previously described [in the Sixth Canto] the two daughters of Viśvakarmā, named Saṁjñā and Chāyā, who were the first two wives of Vivasvān.

197.ldw:
tṛtīyāṁ vaḍavām eke
 tāsāṁ saṁjñā-sutās trayaḥ
yamo yamī śrāddhadevaś
 chāyāyāś ca sutāñ chṛṇu|
197.ldw_fc: tṛtīyām ; vaḍavām ; eke ; tāsām ; saṁjñā-sutāḥ trayaḥ ; yamaḥ ; yamī ; śrāddhadevaḥ ; chāyāyāḥ ; ca ; sutān ; śṛṇu ;
197.words_en_fc: the third wife; Vaḍavā; some people; of all three wives; three issues of Saṁjñā; one son named Yama; Yamī, a daughter; Śrāddhadeva, another son; of Chāyā; and; the sons; just hear about.;
197.yw_zh: 据说太阳神有第三位妻子，名叫瓦妲娃。在这三位妻子中，名叫桑格雅的妻子生了三个孩子，分别名叫雅玛、雅蜜和刷达戴瓦。现在让我来描述查雅的孩子。
197.yw_en: It is said that the sun-god had a third wife, named Vaḍavā. Of the three wives, the wife named Saṁjñā had three children — Yama, Yamī and Śrāddhadeva. Now let me describe the children of Chāyā.

197.ldw:
sāvarṇis tapatī kanyā
 bhāryā saṁvaraṇasya yā
śanaiścaras tṛtīyo ’bhūd
 aśvinau vaḍavātmajau|
197.ldw_fc: sāvarṇiḥ ; tapatī ; kanyā ; bhāryā ; saṁvaraṇasya ; yā ; śanaiścaraḥ ; tṛtīyaḥ ; abhūt ; aśvinau ; vaḍavā-ātma-jau ;
197.words_en_fc: Sāvarṇi; Tapatī; the daughter; the wife; of King Saṁvaraṇa; she who; Śanaiścara; the third issue; took birth; the two Aśvinī-kumāras; the sons of the wife known as Vaḍavā.;
197.yw_zh: 查雅有一个名叫萨瓦尔尼的儿子和名叫塔帕缇的女儿。这个女儿后来当了桑瓦茹阿纳王的妻子。查雅的第三个孩子是土星沙奈施查尔。瓦妲娃生了两个儿子，被称为阿施维尼兄弟。
197.yw_en: Chāyā had a son named Sāvarṇi and a daughter named Tapatī, who later became the wife of King Saṁvaraṇa. Chāyā’s third child is known as Śanaiścara [Saturn]. Vaḍavā gave birth to two sons, namely the Aśvinī brothers.

197.ldw:
aṣṭame ’ntara āyāte
 sāvarṇir bhavitā manuḥ
nirmoka-virajaskādyāḥ
 sāvarṇi-tanayā nṛpa|
197.ldw_fc: aṣṭame ; antare ; āyāte ; sāvarṇiḥ ; bhavitā ; manuḥ ; nirmoka ; virajaska-ādyāḥ ; sāvarṇi ; tanayāḥ ; nṛpa ;
197.words_en_fc: the eighth; Manu’s period; when arrived; Sāvarṇi; will become; the eighth Manu; Nirmoka; Virajaska and others; of Sāvarṇi; the sons; O King.;
197.yw_zh: 君王啊!到第八位玛努统治期时，萨瓦尔尼将成为玛努。他的儿子中将有尼尔摩卡和维茹阿佳斯卡两人。
197.yw_en: O King, when the period of the eighth Manu arrives, Sāvarṇi will become the Manu. Nirmoka and Virajaska will be among his sons.
197.yz_zh: 现在是外瓦斯瓦塔·玛努(Vaivasvata Manu)统治期。按照天文学计算，我们现在正处在外瓦斯瓦塔·玛努统治的第二十八个年代循环(yuga)中。每一个玛努的寿命是七十一个年代循环，主布茹阿玛的一天中由十四位这样的玛努统治。我们现在正处在第七位玛努——外瓦斯瓦塔·玛努统治期内，再过好几百万年才会进入第八位玛努统治期。但舒卡戴瓦·哥斯瓦米(Sukadeva Gosva-mi)从权威人士那里听到预言，第八位玛努将是萨瓦尔尼，而尼尔摩卡(Nirmoka)和维茹阿佳斯卡(Virajaska)将是他的儿子。经典可以预言今后的好几百万年中将发生的事情。
197.yz_en: The present reign is that of Vaivasvata Manu. According to astronomical calculations, we are now in the twenty-eighth yuga of Vaivasvata Manu. Each Manu lives for seventy-one yugas, and fourteen such Manus rule in one day of Lord Brahmā. We are now in the period of Vaivasvata Manu, the seventh Manu, and the eighth Manu will come into existence after many millions of years. But Śukadeva Gosvāmī, having heard from authorities, foretells that the eighth Manu will be Sāvarṇi and that Nirmoka and Virajaska will be among his sons. Śāstra can foretell what will happen millions and millions of years in the future.

197.ldw:
tatra devāḥ sutapaso
 virajā amṛtaprabhāḥ
teṣāṁ virocana-suto
 balir indro bhaviṣyati|
197.ldw_fc: tatra ; devāḥ ; sutapasaḥ ; virajāḥ ; amṛtaprabhāḥ ; teṣām ; virocana-sutaḥ ; baliḥ ; indraḥ ; bhaviṣyati ;
197.words_en_fc: in that period of Manu; the demigods; the Sutapās; the Virajas; the Amṛtaprabhas; of them; the son of Virocana; Mahārāja Bali; the king of heaven; will become.;
197.yw_zh: 在第八位玛努统治期间，半神人中将有苏塔帕们、维茹阿佳们及阿姆瑞塔帕巴们。半神人的君王因铎将由维柔查纳的儿子巴利王担任。
197.yw_en: In the period of the eighth Manu, among the demigods will be the Sutapās, the Virajas and the Amṛtaprabhas. The king of the demigods, Indra, will be Bali Mahārāja, the son of Virocana.

197.ldw:
dattvemāṁ yācamānāya
 viṣṇave yaḥ pada-trayam
rāddham indra-padaṁ hitvā
 tataḥ siddhim avāpsyati|
197.ldw_fc: dattvā ; imām ; yācamānāya ; viṣṇave ; yaḥ ; pada-trayam ; rāddham ; indra-padam ; hitvā ; tataḥ ; siddhim ; avāpsyati ;
197.words_en_fc: giving in charity; this entire universe; who was begging from him; unto Lord Viṣṇu; Bali Mahārāja; three paces of land; achieved; the post of Indra; giving up; thereafter; perfection; will achieve.;
197.yw_zh: 巴利王将三跨步长度的地作为礼物送给主维施努，而这一布施使他失去了三个世界。但是，当主维施努对巴利王把一切都献给祂感到满意时，巴利王将达到生命的完美境界。
197.yw_en: Bali Mahārāja gave a gift of three paces of land to Lord Viṣṇu, and because of this charity he lost all the three worlds. Later, however, when Lord Viṣṇu is pleased because of Bali’s giving everything to Him, Bali Mahārāja will achieve the perfection of life.
197.yz_zh: 《博伽梵歌》(Bhagavad-gita)第7章的第3节诗中说明: 在千万人中，也许只有一个人力求达到完美(manusyanam sahasresukascid yatati siddhaye)。这节诗文中解释这种成就说:当主维施努对巴利王把一切都献给他感到满意时，巴利王将达到生命的完美境界(Raddham indra-padam hitva tatah siddhim avapsyati)。梵文“完美境界(Siddhi)”指的是得到主维施努(Visnu)的恩惠，而不是指瑜伽神通(yoga-siddhi)。能变得如一颗粒子般小(anima)，能变得比一根羽毛还轻(laghima)，能变得比最重的东西还重(mahima)，可以随心所欲地隔空取物(prapti)，拥有心想事成的力量(prakamya)，可以自由行事，甚至只凭意愿就造出神奇的东西或毁灭东西(isitva)，可以控制所有的物质元素(vasitva)，以及可以使自己变形，甚至变出异想天开的形状(kamavasayita)等瑜伽神通都是短暂的。最高的完美境界是得到主维施努的恩惠。
197.yz_en: In Bhagavad-gītā (7.3) it is stated, manuṣyāṇāṁ sahasreṣu kaścid yatati siddhaye: out of many millions of people, one may attempt to achieve success in life. This success is explained here. Rāddham indra-padaṁ hitvā tataḥ siddhim avāpsyati. Siddhi consists of achieving the favor of Lord Viṣṇu, not the yoga-siddhis. The yoga-siddhis — aṇimā, laghimā, mahimā, prāpti, prākāmya, īśitva, vaśitva and kāmāvasāyitā — are temporary. The ultimate siddhi is to achieve the favor of Lord Viṣṇu.

197.ldw:
yo ’sau bhagavatā baddhaḥ
 prītena sutale punaḥ
niveśito ’dhike svargād
 adhunāste sva-rāḍ iva|
197.ldw_fc: yaḥ ; asau ; bhagavatā ; baddhaḥ ; prītena ; sutale ; punaḥ ; niveśitaḥ ; adhike ; svargāt ; adhunā ; āste ; sva-rāṭ iva ;
197.words_en_fc: Bali Mahārāja; he; by the Personality of Godhead; bound; because of favor; in the kingdom of Sutala; again; situated; more opulent; than the heavenly planets; at the present moment; is situated; equal to the position of Indra.;
197.yw_zh: 人格首神满怀深情地绑起巴利王，将他安置在此天堂星球更富裕的苏塔拉王国。巴利王就住在那星球上，住得比天帝因铎还舒服。
197.yw_en: With great affection, the Personality of Godhead bound Bali and then installed him in the kingdom of Sutala, which is more opulent than the heavenly planets. Mahārāja Bali now resides on that planet and is more comfortably situated than Indra.

197.ldw:
gālavo dīptimān rāmo
 droṇa-putraḥ kṛpas tathā
ṛṣyaśṛṅgaḥ pitāsmākaṁ
 bhagavān bādarāyaṇaḥ|ime saptarṣayas tatra
 bhaviṣyanti sva-yogataḥ
idānīm āsate rājan
 sve sva āśrama-maṇḍale|
197.ldw_fc: gālavaḥ ; dīptimān ; rāmaḥ ; droṇa-putraḥ ; kṛpaḥ ; tathā ; ṛṣyaśṛṅgaḥ ; pitā asmākam ; bhagavān ; bādarāyaṇaḥ ; ime ; sapta-ṛṣayaḥ ; tatra ; bhaviṣyanti ; sva-yogataḥ ; idānīm ; āsate ; rājan ; sve sve ; āśrama-maṇḍale ;
197.words_en_fc: Gālava; Dīptimān; Paraśurāma; the son of Droṇācārya, namely Aśvatthāmā; Kṛpācārya; as well; Ṛṣyaśṛṅga; our father; the incarnation of Godhead; Vyāsadeva; all of them; the seven sages; in the eighth manvantara; will become; as a result of their service to the Lord; at the present moment; they are all existing; O King; in their own; different hermitages.;
197.yw_zh: 君王啊！在第八位玛努统治期间，伟大的人物嘎拉瓦、迪晋提曼、帕茹阿舒茹阿玛、阿施瓦塔玛、奎帕查尔亚、瑞夏顺嘎和我们的父亲维亚萨戴瓦一一纳茹阿亚纳的化身，将是七位圣人。现在，他们都居住在自己的灵修所内。
197.yw_en: O King, during the eighth manvantara, the great personalities Gālava, Dīptimān, Paraśurāma, Aśvatthāmā, Kṛpācārya, Ṛṣyaśṛṅga and our father, Vyāsadeva, the incarnation of Nārāyaṇa, will be the seven sages. For the present, they are all residing in their respective āśramas.

197.ldw:
devaguhyāt sarasvatyāṁ
 sārvabhauma iti prabhuḥ
sthānaṁ purandarād dhṛtvā
 balaye dāsyatīśvaraḥ|
197.ldw_fc: devaguhyāt ; sarasvatyām ; sārvabhaumaḥ ; iti ; prabhuḥ ; sthānam ; purandarāt ; hṛtvā ; balaye ; dāsyati ; īśvaraḥ ;
197.words_en_fc: from His father, Devaguhya; in the womb of Sarasvatī; Sārvabhauma; thus; the master; place; from Lord Indra; taking away by force; unto Bali Mahārāja; will give; the master.;
197.yw_zh: 在第八位玛努统治期间，极其强大有力的人格首神萨尔瓦宝玛将显现。祂的父母将是戴瓦古赫亚和萨茹阿斯瓦缇。祂将从普冉达尔(主因铎)手中夺走天堂王国，将它交给巴利王。
197.yw_en: In the eighth manvantara, the greatly powerful Personality of Godhead Sārvabhauma will take birth. His father will be Devaguhya, and His mother will be Sarasvatī. He will take the kingdom away from Purandara [Lord Indra] and give it to Bali Mahārāja.

197.ldw:
navamo dakṣa-sāvarṇir
 manur varuṇa-sambhavaḥ
bhūtaketur dīptaketur
 ity ādyās tat-sutā nṛpa|
197.ldw_fc: navamaḥ ; dakṣa-sāvarṇiḥ ; manuḥ ; varuṇa-sambhavaḥ ; bhūtaketuḥ ; dīptaketuḥ ; iti ; ādyāḥ ; tat ; sutāḥ ; nṛpa ;
197.words_en_fc: ninth; Dakṣa-sāvarṇi; the Manu; born as the son of Varuṇa; Bhūtaketu; Dīptaketu; thus; and so on; his; sons; O King.;
197.yw_zh: 君王啊!第九位玛努将是瓦茹纳的儿子达克沙一萨瓦尔尼。他的儿子中将有布塔凯图和迪普塔凯围。
197.yw_en: O King, the ninth Manu will be Dakṣa-sāvarṇi, who is born of Varuṇa. Among his sons will be Bhūtaketu, and Dīptaketu.

197.ldw:
pārā-marīcigarbhādyā
 devā indro ’dbhutaḥ smṛtaḥ
dyutimat-pramukhās tatra
 bhaviṣyanty ṛṣayas tataḥ|
197.ldw_fc: pārā ; marīcigarbha ; ādyāḥ ; devāḥ ; indraḥ ; adbhutaḥ ; smṛtaḥ ; dyutimat ; pramukhāḥ ; tatra ; bhaviṣyanti ; ṛṣayaḥ ; tataḥ ;
197.words_en_fc: the Pāras; the Marīcigarbhas; like that; the demigods; the king of heaven; Adbhuta; known; Dyutimān; headed by; in that ninth period of Manu; will become; the seven ṛṣis; then.;
197.yw_zh: 在这第九位玛努统治期间，半神人中将有帕茹阿们和玛瑞祺嘎尔巴们。天帝因铎的名字将是阿德布塔，而迪尤提曼将是七圣人之一。
197.yw_en: In this ninth manvantara, the Pāras and Marīcigarbhas will be among the demigods. The king of heaven, Indra, will be named Adbhuta, and Dyutimān will be among the seven sages.

197.ldw:
āyuṣmato ’mbudhārāyām
 ṛṣabho bhagavat-kalā
bhavitā yena saṁrāddhāṁ
 tri-lokīṁ bhokṣyate ’dbhutaḥ|
197.ldw_fc: āyuṣmataḥ ; ambudhārāyām ; ṛṣabhaḥ ; bhagavat-kalā ; bhavitā ; yena ; saṁrāddhām ; tri-lokīm ; bhokṣyate ; adbhutaḥ ;
197.words_en_fc: of the father, Āyuṣmān; in the womb of the mother, Ambudhārā; Ṛṣabha; a partial incarnation of the Supreme Personality of Godhead; will be; by whom; all-opulent; the three worlds; will enjoy; the Indra of the name Adbhuta.;
197.yw_zh: 至尊人格首神的部分化身瑞沙巴戴瓦将诞生，他的父母将是阿尤施曼和安布妲尔。他将让名叫阿德布塔的因铎享受三个世界的富裕。
197.yw_en: Ṛṣabhadeva, a partial incarnation of the Supreme Personality of Godhead, will take birth from his father, Āyuṣmān, and his mother, Ambudhārā. He will enable the Indra named Adbhuta to enjoy the opulence of the three worlds.

197.ldw:
daśamo brahma-sāvarṇir
 upaśloka-suto manuḥ
tat-sutā bhūriṣeṇādyā
 haviṣmat pramukhā dvijāḥ|
197.ldw_fc: daśamaḥ ; brahma-sāvarṇiḥ ; upaśloka-sutaḥ ; manuḥ ; tat-sutāḥ ; bhūriṣeṇa-ādyāḥ ; haviṣmat ; pramukhāḥ ; dvijāḥ ;
197.words_en_fc: the tenth Manu; Brahma-sāvarṇi; born of Upaśloka; will be Manu; his sons; Bhūriṣeṇa and others; Haviṣmān; headed by; the seven sages.;
197.yw_zh: 乌帕施珞卡的名叫布茹阿玛一萨瓦尔尼的儿子， 将是第十位玛努。他的儿子中将有布瑞么纳·以哈维施曼为首的布茹阿玛纳将是七位圣人。
197.yw_en: The son of Upaśloka known as Brahma-sāvarṇi will be the tenth Manu. Bhūriṣeṇa will be among his sons, and the brāhmaṇas headed by Haviṣmān will be the seven sages.

197.ldw:
haviṣmān sukṛtaḥ satyo
 jayo mūrtis tadā dvijāḥ
suvāsana-viruddhādyā
 devāḥ śambhuḥ sureśvaraḥ|
197.ldw_fc: haviṣmān ; sukṛtaḥ ; satyaḥ ; jayaḥ ; mūrtiḥ ; tadā ; dvijāḥ ; suvāsana ; viruddha ; ādyāḥ ; devāḥ ; śambhuḥ ; sura-īśvaraḥ ;
197.words_en_fc: Haviṣmān; Sukṛta; Satya; Jaya; Mūrti; at that time; the seven sages; the Suvāsanas; the Viruddhas; and so on; the demigods; Śambhu; Indra, king of the demigods.;
197.yw_zh: 哈维施曼、苏奎塔、萨提亚、佳亚、穆尔提和其他人将是七位圣人。半神人中将有苏瓦萨纳们和维茹达们， 而商布将是他们的君王因铎。
197.yw_en: Haviṣmān, Sukṛta, Satya, Jaya, Mūrti and others will be the seven sages, the Suvāsanas and Viruddhas will be among the demigods, and Śambhu will be their king, Indra.

197.ldw:
viṣvakseno viṣūcyāṁ tu
 śambhoḥ sakhyaṁ kariṣyati
jātaḥ svāṁśena bhagavān
 gṛhe viśvasṛjo vibhuḥ|
197.ldw_fc: viṣvaksenaḥ ; viṣūcyām ; tu ; śambhoḥ ; sakhyam ; kariṣyati ; jātaḥ ; sva-aṁśena ; bhagavān ; gṛhe ; viśvasṛjaḥ ; vibhuḥ ;
197.words_en_fc: Viṣvaksena; in the womb of Viṣūcī; then; of Śambhu; friendship; will create; being born; by a plenary portion; the Supreme Personality of Godhead; in the home; of Viśvasraṣṭā; the supremely powerful Lord.;
197.yw_zh: 在维施瓦刷施塔家中，至尊人格首神的一个完整扩展将从维舒祺的子宫中以维施瓦克森纳化身显现。他将与商布作朋友。
197.yw_en: In the home of Viśvasraṣṭā, a plenary portion of the Supreme Personality of Godhead will appear from the womb of Viṣūcī as the incarnation known as Viṣvaksena. He will make friends with Śambhu.

197.ldw:
manur vai dharma-sāvarṇir
 ekādaśama ātmavān
anāgatās tat-sutāś ca
 satyadharmādayo daśa|
197.ldw_fc: manuḥ ; vai ; dharma-sāvarṇiḥ ; ekādaśamaḥ ; ātmavān ; anāgatāḥ ; tat ; sutāḥ ; ca ; satyadharma-ādayaḥ ; daśa ;
197.words_en_fc: the Manu; indeed; Dharma-sāvarṇi; eleventh; the controller of the senses; will come in the future; his; sons; and; Satyadharma and others; ten.;
197.yw_zh: 在第十一位玛努统治期间，精通灵性知识的达尔玛一萨瓦尔尼将担任玛努一职。他将生育以萨提亚达尔玛为首的十个儿子。
197.yw_en: In the eleventh manvantara, the Manu will be Dharma-sāvarṇi, who will be extremely learned in spiritual knowledge. From him there will come ten sons, headed by Satyadharma.

197.ldw:
vihaṅgamāḥ kāmagamā
 nirvāṇarucayaḥ surāḥ
indraś ca vaidhṛtas teṣām
 ṛṣayaś cāruṇādayaḥ|
197.ldw_fc: vihaṅgamāḥ ; kāmagamāḥ ; nirvāṇarucayaḥ ; surāḥ ; indraḥ ; ca ; vaidhṛtaḥ ; teṣām ; ṛṣayaḥ ; ca ; aruṇa-ādayaḥ ;
197.words_en_fc: the Vihaṅgamas; the Kāmagamas; the Nirvāṇarucis; the demigods; the king of heaven, Indra; also; Vaidhṛta; of them; the seven sages; also; headed by Aruṇa.;
197.yw_zh: 那时，维汉嘎玛们、卡玛嘎玛们、尼尔瓦纳茹祺们和其他人将是半神人。半神人的君王因铎，将是外德瑞塔，七位圣人将以阿茹纳为首。
197.yw_en: The Vihaṅgamas, Kāmagamas, Nirvāṇarucis and others will be the demigods. The king of the demigods, Indra, will be Vaidhṛta, and the seven sages will be headed by Aruṇa.

197.ldw:
āryakasya sutas tatra
 dharmasetur iti smṛtaḥ
vaidhṛtāyāṁ harer aṁśas
 tri-lokīṁ dhārayiṣyati|
197.ldw_fc: āryakasya ; sutaḥ ; tatra ; dharmasetuḥ ; iti ; smṛtaḥ ; vaidhṛtāyām ; hareḥ ; aṁśaḥ ; tri-lokīm ; dhārayiṣyati ;
197.words_en_fc: of Āryaka; the son; in that period (the eleventh manvantara); Dharmasetu; thus; celebrated; from the mother, Vaidhṛtā; of the Supreme Personality of Godhead; a partial incarnation; the three worlds; will rule.;
197.yw_zh: 阿尔亚卡的儿子一一至尊人格首神的部分化身达尔玛赛图，将从阿尔亚卡的妻子外德瑞塔的子宫显现，并统治三个世界。
197.yw_en: The son of Āryaka known as Dharmasetu, a partial incarnation of the Supreme Personality of Godhead, will appear from the womb of Vaidhṛtā, the wife of Āryaka, and will rule the three worlds.

197.ldw:
bhavitā rudra-sāvarṇī
 rājan dvādaśamo manuḥ
devavān upadevaś ca
 devaśreṣṭhādayaḥ sutāḥ|
197.ldw_fc: bhavitā ; rudra-sāvarṇiḥ ; rājan ; dvādaśamaḥ ; manuḥ ; devavān ; upadevaḥ ; ca ; devaśreṣṭha ; ādayaḥ ; sutāḥ ;
197.words_en_fc: will appear; Rudra-sāvarṇi; O King; the twelfth; Manu; Devavān; Upadeva; and; Devaśreṣṭha; such persons; sons of the Manu.;
197.yw_zh: 君王啊!第十二位玛努的名字将是茹铎一萨瓦尔尼。他的儿子中将有戴瓦万、乌帕戴瓦和戴瓦水施塔。
197.yw_en: O King, the twelfth Manu will be named Rudra-sāvarṇi. Devavān, Upadeva and Devaśreṣṭha will be among his sons.

197.ldw:
ṛtadhāmā ca tatrendro
 devāś ca haritādayaḥ
ṛṣayaś ca tapomūrtis
 tapasvy āgnīdhrakādayaḥ|
197.ldw_fc: ṛtadhāmā ; ca ; tatra ; indraḥ ; devāḥ ; ca ; harita-ādayaḥ ; ṛṣayaḥ ca ; tapomūrtiḥ ; tapasvī ; āgnīdhraka ; ādayaḥ ;
197.words_en_fc: Ṛtadhāmā; also; in that period; the king of heaven; the demigods; and; headed by the Haritas; and the seven sages; Tapomūrti; Tapasvī; Āgnīdhraka; and so on.;
197.yw_zh: 在这位玛努统治期间，因铎的名字将是瑞塔达玛，他将是以哈瑞塔们为首的半神人的君王。在圣人中将有塔袍穆尔提、塔帕斯维和阿格尼铎卡。
197.yw_en: In this manvantara, the name of Indra will be Ṛtadhāmā, and the demigods will be headed by the Haritas. Among the sages will be Tapomūrti, Tapasvī and Āgnīdhraka.

197.ldw:
svadhāmākhyo harer aṁśaḥ
 sādhayiṣyati tan-manoḥ
antaraṁ satyasahasaḥ
 sunṛtāyāḥ suto vibhuḥ|
197.ldw_fc: svadhāmā-ākhyaḥ ; hareḥ aṁśaḥ ; sādhayiṣyati ; tat-manoḥ ; antaram ; satyasahasaḥ ; sunṛtāyāḥ ; sutaḥ ; vibhuḥ ;
197.words_en_fc: Svadhāmā; a partial incarnation of the Supreme Personality of Godhead; will rule; of that Manu; the manvantara; of Satyasahā; of Sunṛtā; the son; most powerful.;
197.yw_zh: 至尊人格首神的部分化身斯瓦达玛将透过名叫孙日塔的母亲和萨提亚萨哈的父亲显现。他将在那个玛努统治期进行统治。
197.yw_en: From the mother named Sunṛtā and the father named Satyasahā will come Svadhāmā, a partial incarnation of the Supreme Personality of Godhead. He will rule that manvantara.

197.ldw:
manus trayodaśo bhāvyo
 deva-sāvarṇir ātmavān
citrasena-vicitrādyā
 deva-sāvarṇi-dehajāḥ|
197.ldw_fc: manuḥ ; trayodaśaḥ ; bhāvyaḥ ; deva-sāvarṇiḥ ; ātmavān ; citrasena ; vicitra-ādyāḥ ; deva-sāvarṇi ; deha-jāḥ ;
197.words_en_fc: the Manu; thirteenth; will become; Deva-sāvarṇi; well advanced in spiritual knowledge; Citrasena; and others, like Vicitra; of Deva-sāvarṇi; sons.;
197.yw_zh: 第十三位玛努的名字将是戴瓦一萨瓦尔尼，他会具有高度的灵性知识。他的儿子中将有祺陀森纳和维祺陀。
197.yw_en: The thirteenth Manu will be named Deva-sāvarṇi, and he will be very advanced in spiritual knowledge. Among his sons will be Citrasena and Vicitra.

197.ldw:
devāḥ sukarma-sutrāma-
 saṁjñā indro divaspatiḥ
nirmoka-tattvadarśādyā
 bhaviṣyanty ṛṣayas tadā|
197.ldw_fc: devāḥ ; sukarma ; sutrāma-saṁjñāḥ ; indraḥ ; divaspatiḥ ; nirmoka ; tattvadarśa-ādyāḥ ; bhaviṣyanti ; ṛṣayaḥ ; tadā ;
197.words_en_fc: the demigods; the Sukarmās; and the Sutrāmas; the king of heaven; Divaspati; Nirmoka; and others, like Tattvadarśa; will become; the seven sages; at that time.;
197.yw_zh: 在第十三位玛努统治期内，半神人中将有苏卡尔玛们及苏陀玛们。戴瓦斯帕提将是天堂的君王，而七位圣人中将有尼尔摩卡和塔特瓦达尔沙。
197.yw_en: In the thirteenth manvantara, the Sukarmās and Sutrāmas will be among the demigods, Divaspati will be the king of heaven, and Nirmoka and Tattvadarśa will be among the seven sages.

197.ldw:
devahotrasya tanaya
 upahartā divaspateḥ
yogeśvaro harer aṁśo
 bṛhatyāṁ sambhaviṣyati|
197.ldw_fc: devahotrasya ; tanayaḥ ; upahartā ; divaspateḥ ; yoga-īśvaraḥ ; hareḥ aṁśaḥ ; bṛhatyām ; sambhaviṣyati ;
197.words_en_fc: of Devahotra; the son; the benefactor; of Divaspati, the Indra at that time; Yogeśvara, the master of mystic powers; a partial representation of the Supreme Personality of Godhead; in the womb of his mother, Bṛhatī; will appear.;
197.yw_zh: 至尊人格首神的部分化身将显现为戴瓦厚陀的儿子尤给士瓦尔。祂母亲的名字将是布瑞哈缇。祂将从事有利于迪瓦斯帕提的活动。
197.yw_en: The son of Devahotra known as Yogeśvara will appear as a partial incarnation of the Supreme Personality of Godhead. His mother’s name will be Bṛhatī. He will perform activities for the welfare of Divaspati.

197.ldw:
manur vā indra-sāvarṇiś
 caturdaśama eṣyati
uru-gambhīra-budhādyā
 indra-sāvarṇi-vīryajāḥ|
197.ldw_fc: manuḥ ; vā ; indra-sāvarṇiḥ ; caturdaśamaḥ ; eṣyati ; uru ; gambhīra ; budha-ādyāḥ ; indra-sāvarṇi ; vīrya-jāḥ ;
197.words_en_fc: the Manu; either; Indra-sāvarṇi; fourteenth; will become; Uru; Gambhīra; and others, such as Budha; of Indra-sāvarṇi; born of the semen.;
197.yw_zh: 第十四位玛努的名字将是因铎一萨瓦尔尼。他将会有乌茹、刚毕尔和布达等儿子。
197.yw_en: The name of the fourteenth Manu will be Indra-sāvarṇi. He will have sons like Uru, Gambhīra and Budha.

197.ldw:
pavitrāś cākṣuṣā devāḥ
 śucir indro bhaviṣyati
agnir bāhuḥ śuciḥ śuddho
 māgadhādyās tapasvinaḥ|
197.ldw_fc: pavitrāḥ ; cākṣuṣāḥ ; devāḥ ; śuciḥ ; indraḥ ; bhaviṣyati ; agniḥ ; bāhuḥ ; śuciḥ ; śuddhaḥ ; māgadha ; ādyāḥ ; tapasvinaḥ ;
197.words_en_fc: the Pavitras; the Cākṣuṣas; the demigods; Śuci; the king of heaven; will become; Agni; Bāhu; Śuci; Śuddha; Māgadha; and so on; the sages.;
197.yw_zh: 半神人中将有帕维陀们和查克舒沙们，舒祺将是天帝因铎。七位圣人将由阿格尼、巴胡、舒祺、舒达、玛嘎达和其他伟大的权威人士担当。
197.yw_en: The Pavitras and Cākṣuṣas will be among the demigods, and Śuci will be Indra, the king of heaven. Agni, Bāhu, Śuci, Śuddha, Māgadha and others of great austerity will be the seven sages.

197.ldw:
satrāyaṇasya tanayo
 bṛhadbhānus tadā hariḥ
vitānāyāṁ mahārāja
 kriyā-tantūn vitāyitā|
197.ldw_fc: satrāyaṇasya ; tanayaḥ ; bṛhadbhānuḥ ; tadā ; hariḥ ; vitānāyām ; mahā-rāja ; kriyā-tantūn ; vitāyitā ;
197.words_en_fc: of Satrāyaṇa; the son; Bṛhadbhānu; at that time; the Supreme Personality of Godhead; in the womb of Vitānā; O King; all spiritual activities; will perform.;
197.yw_zh: 帕瑞克西持王啊!在第十四位玛努统治期间，至尊人格首神将从维塔娜的子宫显现，祂父亲的名字将是萨陀亚纳。这位化身将以毕尔哈德巴努闻名于世，祂将从事灵性活动。
197.yw_en: O King Parīkṣit, in the fourteenth manvantara the Supreme Personality of Godhead will appear from the womb of Vitānā, and His father’s name will be Satrāyaṇa. This incarnation will be celebrated as Bṛhadbhānu, and He will administer spiritual activities.

197.ldw:
rājaṁś caturdaśaitāni
 tri-kālānugatāni te
proktāny ebhir mitaḥ kalpo
 yuga-sāhasra-paryayaḥ|
197.ldw_fc: rājan ; caturdaśa ; etāni ; tri-kāla ; anugatāni ; te ; proktāni ; ebhiḥ ; mitaḥ ; kalpaḥ ; yuga-sāhasra ; paryayaḥ ;
197.words_en_fc: O King; fourteen; all these; the three periods of time (past, present and future); covering; to you; described; by these; estimated; one day of Brahmā; one thousand cycles of four yugas; consisting of.;
197.yw_zh: 君王啊!我现在给你描述了在过去、现在和将来显现的十四位玛努。这些玛努统治时间的总长度是一千个年大循环。在称为卡勒帕，也就是主布茹阿玛的一天。
197.yw_en: O King, I have now described to you the fourteen Manus appearing in the past, present and future. The total duration of time ruled by these Manus is one thousand yuga cycles. This is called a kalpa, or one day of Lord Brahmā.
197.yz_en: Thus end the Bhaktivedanta purports of the Eighth Canto, Thirteenth Chapter, of the Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam, entitled “Description of Future Manus.”

198.ldw:
śrī-rājovāca|manvantareṣu bhagavan
 yathā manv-ādayas tv ime
yasmin karmaṇi ye yena
 niyuktās tad vadasva me|
198.ldw_fc: śrī-rājā uvāca ; manvantareṣu ; bhagavan ; yathā ; manu-ādayaḥ ; tu ; ime ; yasmin ; karmaṇi ; ye ; yena ; niyuktāḥ ; tat ; vadasva ; me ;
198.words_en_fc: King Parīkṣit said; in the reign of each Manu; O great sage; as; the Manus and others; but; these; in which; activities; which persons; by whom; appointed; that; kindly describe; to me.;
198.yw_zh: 帕瑞克西特王询问道:最富有的舒卡戴瓦·哥斯瓦米啊！请为我解释，玛努和每一个玛努统治期内的人物如何致力于他们各自的职责;他们是遵从谁的命令这样做的。
198.yw_en: Mahārāja Parīkṣit inquired: O most opulent Śukadeva Gosvāmī, please explain to me how Manu and the others in each manvantara are engaged in their respective duties, and by whose order they are so engaged.

198.ldw:
śrī-ṛṣir uvāca|manavo manu-putrāś ca
 munayaś ca mahī-pate
indrāḥ sura-gaṇāś caiva
 sarve puruṣa-śāsanāḥ|
198.ldw_fc: śrī-ṛṣiḥ uvāca ; manavaḥ ; manu-putrāḥ ; ca ; munayaḥ ; ca ; mahī-pate ; indrāḥ ; sura-gaṇāḥ ; ca ; eva ; sarve ; puruṣa-śāsanāḥ ;
198.words_en_fc: Śrī Śukadeva Gosvāmī said; all the Manus; all the sons of Manu; and; all the great sages; and; O King; all the Indras; the demigods; and; certainly; all of them; under the rule of the Supreme person.;
198.yw_zh: 舒卡戴瓦·哥斯瓦米说:君王啊!玛努们、玛努的儿子们、伟大的圣人、众多的因铎和所有的半神人，都由雅格亚等至尊人格首神的各种化身指定。
198.yw_en: Mahārāja Parīkṣit inquired: O most opulent Śukadeva Gosvāmī, please explain to me how Manu and the others in each manvantara are engaged in their respective duties, and by whose order they are so engaged.

198.ldw:
yajñādayo yāḥ kathitāḥ
 pauruṣyas tanavo nṛpa
manv-ādayo jagad-yātrāṁ
 nayanty ābhiḥ pracoditāḥ|
198.ldw_fc: yajña-ādayaḥ ; yāḥ ; kathitāḥ ; pauruṣyaḥ ; tanavaḥ ; nṛpa ; manu-ādayaḥ ; jagat-yātrām ; nayanti ; ābhiḥ ; pracoditāḥ ;
198.words_en_fc: the Lord’s incarnation known as Yajña and others; who; already spoken of; of the Supreme Person; incarnations; O King; the Manus and others; universal affairs; conduct; by the incarnations; being inspired.;
198.yw_zh: 君王啊!我已经给你解释了至尊主的雅格亚等各种化身。玛努们和其他人物都由这些化身挑选，并在他们的指导下管理宇宙事务。
198.yw_en: O King, I have already described to you various incarnations of the Lord, such as Yajña. The Manus and others are chosen by these incarnations, under whose direction they conduct the universal affairs.
198.yz_zh: 玛努们执行至尊人格首神以各种化身所给予的命令。
198.yz_en: The Manus execute the orders of the Supreme Personality of Godhead in His various incarnations.

198.ldw:
catur-yugānte kālena
 grastāñ chruti-gaṇān yathā
tapasā ṛṣayo ’paśyan
 yato dharmaḥ sanātanaḥ|
198.ldw_fc: catuḥ-yuga-ante ; kālena ; grastān ; śruti-gaṇān ; yathā ; tapasā ; ṛṣayaḥ ; apaśyan ; yataḥ ; dharmaḥ ; sanātanaḥ ;
198.words_en_fc: at the end of every four yugas (Satya, Dvāpara, Tretā and Kali); in due course of time; lost; the Vedic instruction; as; by austerity; great saintly persons; by seeing misuse; wherefrom; occupational duties; eternal.;
198.yw_zh: 在每一次四个年代交替结束时，伟大圣洁的人看到人类的永恒职责被误用，就重建宗教原则。
198.yw_en: At the end of every four yugas, the great saintly persons, upon seeing that the eternal occupational duties of mankind have been misused, reestablish the principles of religion.
198.yz_zh:
在这节诗中，梵文”职责(dharmah)”和”永恒的(sa-natanah)”二个词十分重要。从萨提亚年代(Satya-yuga)到喀历年代(Kali-yuga)，宗教原则和职责逐渐降低。在萨提亚年代中，人们毫不偏离地执行宗教原则。然而，到特瑞塔年代(Treta-yuga)，人们开始有些疏忽这些原则，只继续遵守四分之三的宗教原则。在杜瓦帕尔年代(Dvapara-yuga)中只有一半的宗教原则得到继续执行， 宗教原则逐渐消失，到喀历年代就只剩下四分之一了。在喀历年代末期，宗教原则或人类的职责几乎丧失殆尽。事实上，我们这个喀历年代虽然只过了五千年，但人们已经十分明显地很少遵守永恒的宗教原则。因此，圣洁之人的责任是:为全人类的利益而认真遵守宗教原则，并努力地宣传、重建宗教原则。奎师那意识运动就是按照这一原则开创的。正如《圣典博伽瓦谭》(Srimad-Bhagavatam)第12篇第3章的第51节诗说明:

整个喀历年代充满了缺陷，恰似由缺陷构成的无边汪洋。但奎师那意识运动极有权威性。因此，跟随圣柴坦亚·玛哈帕布(Caitanya Mahaprabhu)的步伐，我们努力按照前辈灵性导师的命令，在全世界介绍由他在五百年前开创的集体歌唱神的圣名运动(sankirtana或krsna-kirtana)。现在，如果这场运动的拓展者严格遵守规范原则，为全人类的利益而推展这场运动，他们必将通过重建宗教原则——人类的永恒职责而引领一种崭新的生活方式。侍奉奎师那是人类永恒的宗教职责(jivera 'svarupa' haya-krsnera 'nitya-dasa)。这是永恒宗教原则的目的。梵文萨纳坦(sanatana)的意思是”永恒的(nitya)”，奎师那-达斯(krsna-dasa)的意思是”奎师那的仆人”。人类永恒的职责是为奎师那服务。这是奎师那意识运动总体的实质。
198.yz_en:
In this verse, the words dharmaḥ and sanātanaḥ are very important. Sanātana means “eternal,” and dharma means “occupational duties.” From Satya-yuga to Kali-yuga, the principles of religion and occupational duty gradually deteriorate. In Satya-yuga, the religious principles are observed in full, without deviation. In Tretā-yuga, however, these principles are somewhat neglected, and only three fourths of the religious duties continue. In Dvāpara-yuga only half of the religious principles continue, and in Kali-yuga only one fourth of the religious principles, which gradually disappear. At the end of Kali-yuga, the principles of religion, or the occupational duties of humanity, are almost lost. Indeed, in this Kali-yuga we have passed through only five thousand years, yet the decline of sanātana-dharma is very prominent. The duty of saintly persons, therefore, is to take up seriously the cause of sanātana-dharma and try to reestablish it for the benefit of the entire human society. The Kṛṣṇa consciousness movement has been started according to this principle. As stated in Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam (12.3.51):

kaler doṣa-nidhe rājan
 asti hy eko mahān guṇaḥ
kīrtanād eva kṛṣṇasya
 mukta-saṅgaḥ paraṁ vrajet

The entire Kali-yuga is full of faults. It is like an unlimited ocean of faults. But the Kṛṣṇa consciousness movement is very authorized. Therefore, following in the footsteps of Śrī Caitanya Mahāprabhu, who five hundred years ago inaugurated the movement of saṅkīrtana, kṛṣṇa-kīrtana, we are trying to introduce this movement, according to superior orders, all over the world. Now, if the inaugurators of this movement strictly follow the regulative principles and spread this movement for the benefit of all human society, they will certainly usher in a new way of life by reestablishing sanātana-dharma, the eternal occupational duties of humanity. The eternal occupational duty of the human being is to serve Kṛṣṇa. Jīvera ‘svarūpa’ haya-kṛṣṇera ‘nitya-dāsa.’ This is the purport of sanātana-dharma. Sanātana means nitya, or “eternal,” and kṛṣṇa-dāsa means “servant of Kṛṣṇa.” The eternal occupational duty of the human being is to serve Kṛṣṇa. This is the sum and substance of the Kṛṣṇa consciousness movement.

198.ldw:
tato dharmaṁ catuṣpādaṁ
 manavo hariṇoditāḥ
yuktāḥ sañcārayanty addhā
 sve sve kāle mahīṁ nṛpa|
198.ldw_fc: tataḥ ; dharmam ; catuḥ-pādam ; manavaḥ ; hariṇā ; uditāḥ ; yuktāḥ ; sañcārayanti ; addhā ; sve sve ; kāle ; mahīm ; nṛpa ;
198.words_en_fc: thereafter (at the end of Kali-yuga); the religious principle; in four parts; all the Manus; by the Supreme Personality of Godhead; being instructed; being engaged; reestablish; directly; in their own; time; within this world; O King.;
198.yw_zh: 那之后，君王啊!玛努们因为按照至尊人格首神的教导，全心致力于重建规定职责中完整的四部分原则。
198.yw_en: Thereafter, O King, the Manus, being fully engaged according to the instructions of the Supreme Personality of Godhead, directly reestablish the principles of occupational duty in its full four parts.
198.yz_zh:
正如《博伽梵歌》中所解释，达尔玛(Dharma)——职责，可以重建为完整的四个部分。《博伽梵歌》第4章的第1节诗记载，至尊主说:

“我给太阳神维瓦斯万讲授了这门不朽的瑜伽科学，维瓦斯万把它传授给人类之父玛努，玛努随后又将其传授给依克施瓦库。”这是师徒传承的程序。奎师那意识运动按照这同一个程序，毫不偏离地教导《博伽梵歌原意》的原则。这个时代的人们如果有幸接受主奎师那的教导，就必将因为执行圣柴坦亚·玛哈帕布的使命而感到快乐。柴坦亚·玛哈帕布想要每一个人，至少是印度人，成为这个使命的宣传者。换句话说，人们应该成为灵性导师，为人类的和平与繁荣在全世界宣传至尊主的教导。
198.yz_en:
Dharma, or occupational duty, can be established in its full four parts as explained in Bhagavad-gītā. In Bhagavad-gītā (4.1) the Lord says:

imaṁ vivasvate yogaṁ
 proktavān aham avyayam
vivasvān manave prāha
 manur ikṣvākave ’bravīt

“I instructed this imperishable science of yoga to the sun-god, Vivasvān, and Vivasvān instructed it to Manu, the father of mankind, and Manu in turn instructed it to Ikṣvāku.” This is the process of disciplic succession. Following the same process, the Kṛṣṇa consciousness movement is teaching the principles of Bhagavad-gītā as it is, without deviation, all over the world. If the fortunate people of this time accept the instructions of Lord Kṛṣṇa, they will certainly be happy in Śrī Caitanya Mahāprabhu’s mission. Caitanya Mahāprabhu wanted everyone, at least in India, to become a preacher of this mission. In other words, one should become a guru and preach the Lord’s instructions all over the world for the peace and prosperity of humanity.

198.ldw:
pālayanti prajā-pālā
 yāvad antaṁ vibhāgaśaḥ
yajña-bhāga-bhujo devā
 ye ca tatrānvitāś ca taiḥ|
198.ldw_fc: pālayanti ; prajā-pālāḥ ; yāvat antam ; vibhāgaśaḥ ; yajña-bhāga-bhujaḥ ; devāḥ ; ye ; ca ; tatra anvitāḥ ; ca ; taiḥ ;
198.words_en_fc: execute the order; the rulers of the world, namely the sons and grandsons of Manu; unto the end of Manu’s reign; in divisions; the enjoyers of the result of yajñas; the demigods; others; also; engaged in that business; also; by them.;
198.yw_zh: 为享受祭祀的结果，世界的统治者一一玛努努的儿子和孙子们，执行至尊人格首神的命令直到玛努统治期结束。半神人也分享这些祭祀的结果。
198.yw_en: To enjoy the results of sacrifices [yajñas], the rulers of the world, namely the sons and grandsons of Manu, discharge the orders of the Supreme Personality of Godhead until the end of Manu’s reign. The demigods also share the results of these sacrifices.
198.yz_zh:
正如《博伽梵歌》第4章的第2节诗说明:

“这门至高无上的科学就这样通过师徒传承世代相传，神圣的君王都经这渠道了解它。”这师徒传承(parampara)从玛努到依克施瓦库，从依克施瓦库到他的儿子和孙子。师徒传承中的历代世界帝王，都执行至尊人格首神的命令。有志于过和平生活的人，必须参加这个师徒传承并举行祭祀(yajna)。作为圣柴坦亚·玛哈帕布传下的高迪亚·外士纳瓦(Gaudiya Vaisnava)师徒传承中的成员，我们必须在全世界举行集体歌唱神的圣名运动祭祀(yajnaih sankirtana-prayair yajanti hi sumedhasah)。圣柴坦亚·玛哈帕布是至尊人格首神在这个喀历年代中的化身;我们倘若在全世界积极地开展这场集体歌唱神的圣名运动，就很容易令他满意。毫无疑问，这也将使世人感到快乐。
198.yz_en:
As stated in Bhagavad-gītā (4.2):

evaṁ paramparā-prāptam
 imaṁ rājarṣayo viduḥ

“This supreme science was thus received through the chain of disciplic succession, and the saintly kings understood it in that way.” This paramparā system extends from Manu to Ikṣvāku and from Ikṣvāku to his sons and grandsons. The rulers of the world in the line of hierarchy execute the order of the Supreme Personality of Godhead in the paramparā system. Anyone interested in peaceful life must participate in this paramparā system and perform yajñas. As Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇavas in the paramparā system of Śrī Caitanya Mahāprabhu, we must perform saṅkīrtana-yajña all over the world (yajñaiḥ saṅkīrtana-prāyair yajanti hi sumedhasaḥ). Śrī Caitanya Mahāprabhu is the incarnation of the Supreme Personality of Godhead in this Age of Kali, and He will be easily satisfied if the saṅkīrtana movement is spread vigorously all over the world. This will also make people happy without a doubt.

198.ldw:
indro bhagavatā dattāṁ
 trailokya-śriyam ūrjitām
bhuñjānaḥ pāti lokāṁs trīn
 kāmaṁ loke pravarṣati|
198.ldw_fc: indraḥ ; bhagavatā ; dattām ; trailokya ; śriyam ūrjitām ; bhuñjānaḥ ; pāti ; lokān ; trīn ; kāmam ; loke ; pravarṣati ;
198.words_en_fc: the King of heaven; by the Supreme Personality of Godhead; given; of the three worlds; the great opulences; enjoying; maintains; all the planets; within the three worlds; as much as necessary; within the world; pours rain.;
198.yw_zh: 天帝因铎从至尊人格首神得到祝福，从而享受高度发达的财富，并通过向所有的星球倾注足量的雨水，维系遍布三个世界中的众生。
198.yw_en: Indra, King of heaven, receiving benedictions from the Supreme Personality of Godhead and thus enjoying highly developed opulences, maintains the living entities all over the three worlds by pouring sufficient rain on all the planets.

198.ldw_fc: jñānam ; ca ; anuyugam ; brūte ; hariḥ ; siddha-svarūpa-dhṛk ; ṛṣi-rūpa-dharaḥ ; karma ; yogam ; yoga-īśa-rūpa-dhṛk ;
198.words_en_fc: transcendental knowledge; and; according to the age; explains; the Supreme Personality of Godhead; assuming the form of liberated persons like Sanaka and Sanātana; assuming the form of great saintly persons like Yājñavalkya; karma; the mystic yoga system; by assuming the form of a great yogī like Dattātreya.;
198.yw_zh: 在每一个年代中，至尊人格首神哈尔依都呈现萨纳卡等解脱之人的形象，传播超然的知识;呈现雅格亚瓦勒克亚等大圣人的形象，教导功利性活动的方式;呈现达塔垂亚等非凡瑜伽师的形象，教导神秘瑜伽体系。
198.yw_en: In every yuga, the Supreme Personality of Godhead, Hari, assumes the form of Siddhas such as Sanaka to preach transcendental knowledge, He assumes the form of great saintly persons such as Yājñavalkya to teach the way of karma, and He assumes the form of great yogīs such as Dattātreya to teach the system of mystic yoga.
198.yz_zh: 为了利益人类社会，至尊主不仅化身为玛努正确地统治宇宙，而且还呈现教师、瑜伽师(yogi)和知识思辨者(jnani)等形象。因此，人类社会的责任是接受由至尊主以实际行动指明的路途。在如今这个年代中，由至尊人格首神亲自讲述的《博伽梵歌》包括了韦达知识的全部精华;不仅如此，同一位至尊首神还呈现圣柴坦亚·玛哈怕布的形象，将《博伽梵歌》的教导扩展到全世界。换句话说，至尊人格首神哈尔依(Hari)对人类社会是如此仁慈，以至总是渴望将坠落到物质世界里的灵魂带回家园， 带回到他自己身边。
198.yz_en: For the benefit of all human society, not only does the Lord assume the form of Manu as an incarnation to rule the universe properly, but He also assumes the forms of a teacher, yogī, jñānī and so on, for the benefit of human society. The duty of human society, therefore, is to accept the path of action enunciated by the Supreme Lord. In the present age, the sum and substance of all Vedic knowledge is to be found in Bhagavad-gītā, which is personally taught by the Supreme Personality of Godhead, and the same Supreme Godhead, assuming the form of Śrī Caitanya Mahāprabhu, expands the teachings of Bhagavad-gītā all over the world. In other words, the Supreme Personality of Godhead, Hari, is so kind and merciful to human society that He is always anxious to take the fallen souls back home, back to Godhead.

198.ldw:
sargaṁ prajeśa-rūpeṇa
 dasyūn hanyāt svarāḍ-vapuḥ
kāla-rūpeṇa sarveṣām
 abhāvāya pṛthag guṇaḥ|
198.ldw_fc: sargam ; prajā-īśa-rūpeṇa ; dasyūn ; hanyāt ; sva-rāṭ-vapuḥ ; kāla-rūpeṇa ; sarveṣām ; abhāvāya ; pṛthak ; guṇaḥ ;
198.words_en_fc: creation of progeny; in the form of the Prajāpati Marīci and others; thieves and rogues; kills; in the form of the king; in the form of time; of everything; for the annihilation; different; possessing qualities.;
198.yw_zh: 至尊人格首神以生物体祖先玛瑞祺的形象生育各种后代;以君王的形象杀死盗贼和恶棍;以时间的形象毁灭一切。应该明白，物质存在所有不同的品质，都是至尊人格首神的品质。
198.yw_en: In the form of Prajāpati Marīci, the Supreme Personality of Godhead creates progeny; becoming the king, He kills the thieves and rogues; and in the form of time, He annihilates everything. All the different qualities of material existence should be understood to be qualities of the Supreme Personality of Godhead.

198.ldw:
stūyamāno janair ebhir
 māyayā nāma-rūpayā
vimohitātmabhir nānā-
 darśanair na ca dṛśyate|
198.ldw_fc: stūyamānaḥ ; janaiḥ ; ebhiḥ ; māyayā ; nāma-rūpayā ; vimohita ; ātmabhiḥ ; nānā ; darśanaiḥ ; na ; ca ; dṛśyate ;
198.words_en_fc: being sought; by people in general; by all of them; under the influence of māyā; possessing different names and forms; bewildered; by illusion; various; by philosophical approaches; not; and; the Supreme Personality of Godhead can be found.;
198.yw_zh: 人民大众被错觉能量所迷惑，因此试图透过各种类型的调查研究和哲学推测找到绝对真理一一至尊人格首神。但他们无法看到至尊主。
198.yw_en: People in general are bewildered by the illusory energy, and therefore they try to find the Absolute Truth, the Supreme Personality of Godhead, through various types of research and philosophical speculation. Nonetheless, they are unable to see the Supreme Lord.
198.yz_zh: 因这个物质世界的创造、维系和毁灭而产生的作用及反作用，其实都是由同一位至尊人引发的。世上有各种各样的哲学家试图以各种名义和形式找出最初的原因，但都无法找到至尊人格首神奎师那，而他在《博伽梵歌》中解释说:他是万事万物的源头，是一切原因的起因(aham sarvasya prabhavah)。这种无能为力由至尊主的错觉能量造成。与他们相反，奉献者如实地接受至尊人格首神，仅仅靠歌唱至尊主的荣耀就保持十分快乐的状态。
198.yz_en: Whatever actions and reactions take place for the creation, maintenance and annihilation of this material world are actually brought about by the one Supreme Person. There are many varieties of philosophers trying to search for the ultimate cause under different names and forms, but they are unable to find the Supreme Personality of Godhead, Kṛṣṇa, who explains in Bhagavad-gītā that He is the origin of everything and the cause of all causes (ahaṁ sarvasya prabhavaḥ). This inability is due to the illusory energy of the Supreme Lord. Devotees, therefore, accept the Supreme Personality of Godhead as He is and remain happy simply by chanting the glories of the Lord.

198.ldw_fc: etat ; kalpa ; vikalpasya ; pramāṇam ; parikīrtitam ; yatra ; manvantarāṇi ; āhuḥ ; caturdaśa ; purā-vidaḥ ;
198.words_en_fc: all these; in one day of Lord Brahmā; of the changes in a kalpa, such as the change of Manus; evidences; described (by me); wherein; periods of Manu; said; fourteen; learned scholars.;
198.yw_zh: 在主布茹阿玛的一天一一一个卡勒帕中，发生许多被称为维卡勒帕的改变。君王啊!我以前给你解释过所有这一切。了解过去、现在和未来的博学学者明确地知道，布茹阿玛的一天中有十四位玛努。
198.yw_en: In one kalpa, or one day of Brahmā, there take place the many changes called vikalpas. O King, all of these have been previously described to you by me. Learned scholars who know the past, present and future have ascertained that in one day of Brahmā there are fourteen Manus.
198.yz_en: Thus end the Bhaktivedanta purports of the Eighth Canto, Fourteenth Chapter, of the Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam, entitled “The System of Universal Management.”

199.ldw:

 kasmād dharir ayācata
bhūteśvaraḥ kṛpaṇa-val

 mahat kautūhalaṁ hi naḥ
yācñeśvarasya pūrṇasya
 bandhanaṁ cāpy anāgasaḥ|

199.words_en_fc: the King said; of Bali Mahārāja; three steps; of land; why; the Supreme Personality of Godhead (in the form of Vāmana); begged; the proprietor of all the universe; like a poor man; He got the gift; although; arrested; him (Bali); all this; to understand; we desire; very great; eagerness; indeed; our; begging; of the Supreme Personality of Godhead; who is full in everything; arresting; also; although; of he who was faultless.;
199.yw_zh: 帕瑞克西特王询问道:至尊人格首神是一切的拥有者。祂为何如同穷人般向巴利王乞讨三跨步长的土地?祂得到祂乞讨的礼物后为何还要逮捕巴利王?我很渴望了解这些矛盾背后的秘密。
199.yw_en: Mahārāja Parīkṣit inquired: The Supreme Personality of Godhead is the proprietor of everything. Why did He beg three paces of land from Bali Mahārāja like a poor man, and when He got the gift for which He had begged, why did He nonetheless arrest Bali Mahārāja? I am very much anxious to know the mystery of these contradictions.

199.ldw:
śrī-śuka uvāca|parājita-śrīr asubhiś ca hāpito
 hīndreṇa rājan bhṛgubhiḥ sa jīvitaḥ
sarvātmanā tān abhajad bhṛgūn baliḥ
 śiṣyo mahātmārtha-nivedanena|
199.ldw_fc: śrī-śukaḥ uvāca ; parājita ; śrīḥ ; asubhiḥ ca ; hāpitaḥ ; hi ; indreṇa ; rājan ; bhṛgubhiḥ ; saḥ ; jīvitaḥ ; sarva-ātmanā ; tān ; abhajat ; bhṛgūn ; baliḥ ; śiṣyaḥ ; mahātmā ; artha-nivedanena ;
199.words_en_fc: Śrī Śukadeva Gosvāmī said; being defeated; opulences; of life also; deprived; indeed; by King Indra; O King; by the descendants of Bhṛgu Muni; he (Bali Mahārāja); brought back to life; in full submission; them; worshiped; the descendants of Bhṛgu Muni; Mahārāja Bali; a disciple; the great soul; by giving them everything.;
199.yw_zh: 舒卡戴瓦·哥斯瓦米说:君王啊!当巴利王失去他所有的财富，战死沙场时，布瑞古·牟尼的一个后人舒夸查尔亚使他复活。为此，伟大的灵魂巴利王当了舒夸查尔亚的门徒，从此满怀信心地侍奉他，将自己有的一切都献给他。
199.yw_en: Śukadeva Gosvāmī said: O King, when Bali Mahārāja lost all his opulence and died in the fight, Śukrācārya, a descendant of Bhṛgu Muni, brought him back to life. Because of this, the great soul Bali Mahārāja became a disciple of Śukrācārya and began to serve him with great faith, offering everything he had.

199.ldw:
taṁ brāhmaṇā bhṛgavaḥ prīyamāṇā
 ayājayan viśvajitā tri-ṇākam
jigīṣamāṇaṁ vidhinābhiṣicya
 mahābhiṣekeṇa mahānubhāvāḥ|
199.ldw_fc: tam ; brāhmaṇāḥ ; bhṛgavaḥ ; prīyamāṇāḥ ; ayājayan ; viśvajitā ; tri-nākam ; jigīṣamāṇam ; vidhinā ; abhiṣicya ; mahā-abhiṣekeṇa ; mahā-anubhāvāḥ ;
199.words_en_fc: upon him (Bali Mahārāja); all the brāhmaṇas; the descendants of Bhṛgu Muni; being very pleased; engaged him in performing a sacrifice; known as Viśvajit; the heavenly planets; desiring to conquer; according to regulative principles; after purifying; by bathing him in a great abhiṣeka ceremony; the exalted brāhmaṇas.;
199.yw_zh: 布瑞古·牟尼的布茹阿玛纳后裔们都对巴利王很满意。巴利王想要攻克天帝因铎的王国。所以，他们净化他，按照规范原则为他正确地沐浴后，安排他举行名为”征服天下”的祭祀。
199.yw_en: The brāhmaṇa descendants of Bhṛgu Muni were very pleased with Bali Mahārāja, who desired to conquer the kingdom of Indra. Therefore, after purifying him and properly bathing him according to regulative principles, they engaged him in performing the yajña known as Viśvajit.

199.ldw:
tato rathaḥ kāñcana-paṭṭa-naddho
 hayāś ca haryaśva-turaṅga-varṇāḥ
dhvajaś ca siṁhena virājamāno
 hutāśanād āsa havirbhir iṣṭāt|
199.ldw_fc: tataḥ ; rathaḥ ; kāñcana ; paṭṭa ; naddhaḥ ; hayāḥ ca ; haryaśva-turaṅga-varṇāḥ ; dhvajaḥ ca ; siṁhena ; virājamānaḥ ; huta-aśanāt ; āsa ; havirbhiḥ ; iṣṭāt ;
199.words_en_fc: thereafter; a chariot; with gold; and silk garments; wrapped; horses also; exactly of the same color as the horses of Indra (yellow); a flag also; with the mark of a lion; existing; from the blazing fire; there was; by offerings of clarified butter; worshiped.;
199.yw_zh: 当纯净酥油被供奉到祭祀之火中时，火中出现了一辆用金子和丝绸包裹的天国战车，还出现了像因铎拥有的那种黄色马匹，以及有狮子标志的旗帜。
199.yw_en: When ghee [clarified butter] was offered in the fire of sacrifice, there appeared from the fire a celestial chariot covered with gold and silk. There also appeared yellow horses like those of Indra, and a flag marked with a lion.

199.ldw:
dhanuś ca divyaṁ puraṭopanaddhaṁ
 tūṇāv ariktau kavacaṁ ca divyam
pitāmahas tasya dadau ca mālām
 amlāna-puṣpāṁ jalajaṁ ca śukraḥ|

199.words_en_fc: a bow; also; uncommon; covered with gold; two quivers; infallible; and armor; celestial; his grandfather, namely Prahlāda Mahārāja; gave; and; a garland; made of flowers that do not fade away; a conchshell (which is born in water); as well as; Śukrācārya.;
199.yw_zh: 火中还出现一把镀金的弓、两筒百发百中的箭， 以及天国才有的盔甲。巴利王的祖父帕拉德王送给巴利王一串永不枯萎的鲜花花环，舒卡查尔亚送给他一个海螺。
199.yw_en: A gilded bow, two quivers of infallible arrows, and celestial armor also appeared. Bali Mahārāja’s grandfather Prahlāda Mahārāja offered Bali a garland of flowers that would never fade, and Śukrācārya gave him a conchshell.

199.ldw:
evaṁ sa viprārjita-yodhanārthas
 taiḥ kalpita-svastyayano ’tha viprān
pradakṣiṇī-kṛtya kṛta-praṇāmaḥ
 prahrādam āmantrya namaś-cakāra|

199.words_en_fc: in this way; he (Bali Mahārāja); gained by the grace of the brāhmaṇas; possessing equipment for fighting; by them (the brāhmaṇas); advice; ritualistic performance; as; all the brāhmaṇas (Śukrācārya and others); circumambulating; offered his respectful obeisances; unto Prahlāda Mahārāja; addressing; offered him obeisances.;
199.yw_zh: 当巴利王按照布茹阿玛纳们的忠告举行特殊的仪式性典礼，并靠他们的恩典得到战斗武器配备后，他绕拜了众布茹阿玛纳，向他们顶礼。他也向帕拉德王致敬、顶礼。
199.yw_en: When Mahārāja Bali had thus performed the special ritualistic ceremony advised by the brāhmaṇas and had received, by their grace, the equipment for fighting, he circumambulated the brāhmaṇas and offered them obeisances. He also saluted Prahlāda Mahārāja and offered obeisances to him.

 bhṛgu-dattaṁ mahārathaḥ
susrag-dharo ’tha sannahya
 dhanvī khaḍgī dhṛteṣudhiḥ|hemāṅgada-lasad-bāhuḥ

199.words_en_fc: thereupon; getting on; the chariot; celestial; given by Śukrācārya; Bali Mahārāja, the great charioteer; decorated with a nice garland; thus; covering his body with armor; equipped with a bow; taking a sword; taking a quiver of arrows; decorated with golden bangles on his arms; decorated with brilliant earrings resembling sapphires; was illuminating; getting on the chariot; situated on the altar of sacrifice; like; worshipable fire.;
199.yw_zh: 接着，在登上舒夸查尔亚给的战车后，巴利王载上美丽的花环，将盔甲套在身上，用弓、一筒箭及一把宝刀武装自己。他在战车的座位上坐下，手臂用金镯子装饰， 戴蓝宝石耳坠，如同可崇拜的火一样闪亮。
199.yw_en: Then, after getting on the chariot given by Śukrācārya, Bali Mahārāja, decorated with a nice garland, put protective armor on his body, equipped himself with a bow, and took up a sword and a quiver of arrows. When he sat down on the seat of the chariot, his arms decorated with golden bangles and his ears with sapphire earrings, he shone like a worshipable fire.

199.words_en_fc: equal in opulence; strength; and in beauty; by his own men; and by the chiefs of the demons; drinking; as if; the sky; with the sight; burning; all directions; as if; surrounded; attracting; very great; demoniac; soldiers; most powerful; went; to the capital of King Indra; very opulent; causing to tremble; as if; the complete surface of the world.;
199.yw_zh: 当他召集起他的士兵及与他一样强壮、富有和俊美的恶魔首领们时，他们看起来像是要吞下天空，用他们的目光燃烧四面八方。这样召集起恶魔士兵后，巴利王启程前往因铎富有的首都。事实上，他看似使整个世界的大地都在颤抖。
199.yw_en: When he assembled with his own soldiers and the demon chiefs, who were equal to him in strength, opulence and beauty, they appeared as if they would swallow the sky and burn all directions with their vision. After thus gathering the demoniac soldiers, Bali Mahārāja departed for the opulent capital of Indra. Indeed, he seemed to make the entire surface of the world tremble.

199.ldw:
ramyām upavanodyānaiḥ
 śrīmadbhir nandanādibhiḥ

 gāyan-matta-madhuvrataiḥ

199.words_en_fc: very pleasing; with orchards; and gardens; very beautiful to see; such as Nandana; chirping; birds; with pairs; singing; mad; with bees; of leaves; fruits and flowers; very great; bearing the weight; whose branches; with eternal trees.;
199.yw_zh: 因铎王的首都城市满是令人心旷神怡的果树林和南达纳那样的花园。树上的鲜花、树叶和水果的重量，压弯了那些永恒之树的枝头。成双成对吱喳叫着的小鸟和唱着歌的蜜蜂到访花园。整个环境就是仙境。
199.yw_en: King Indra’s city was full of pleasing orchards and gardens, such as the Nandana garden. Because of the weight of the flowers, leaves and fruit, the branches of the eternally existing trees were bending down. The gardens were visited by pairs of chirping birds and singing bees. The entire atmosphere was celestial.

199.ldw:
haṁsa-sārasa-cakrāhva-
 kāraṇḍava-kulākulāḥ
nalinyo yatra krīḍanti
 pramadāḥ sura-sevitāḥ|

199.words_en_fc: of swans; cranes; birds known as cakravākas; and water fowl; by groups; congested; lotus flowers; where; enjoyed sporting; beautiful women; protected by the demigods.;
199.yw_zh: 花园里有满足天鹅、仙鹤、查夸瓦卡鸟和鸭子的莲花池塘，美丽的仙女们在半神人的保护下于花园中游戏、玩耍。
199.yw_en: Beautiful women protected by the demigods sported in the gardens, which had lotus ponds full of swans, cranes, cakravākas and ducks.

199.ldw:
ākāśa-gaṅgayā devyā
 vṛtāṁ parikha-bhūtayā
prākāreṇāgni-varṇena
 sāṭṭālenonnatena ca|
199.ldw_fc: ākāśa-gaṅgayā ; devyā ; vṛtām ; parikha-bhūtayā ; prākāreṇa ; agni-varṇena ; sa-aṭṭālena ; unnatena ; ca ;
199.words_en_fc: by Ganges water known as Ākāśa-gaṅgā; the always-worshipable goddess; surrounded; as a trench; by ramparts; resembling fire; with places for fighting; very high; and.;
199.yw_zh: 城市由注满了名叫阿喀莎的恒河水的水渠及颜色如火焰般的高墙环绕着。城墙上是为作战而设的胸墙。
199.yw_en: The city was surrounded by trenches full of Ganges water, known as Ākāśa-gaṅgā, and by a high wall, which was the color of fire. Upon this wall were parapets for fighting.

199.ldw:
rukma-paṭṭa-kapāṭaiś ca
 dvāraiḥ sphaṭika-gopuraiḥ
juṣṭāṁ vibhakta-prapathāṁ
 viśvakarma-vinirmitām|
199.ldw_fc: rukma-paṭṭa ; kapāṭaiḥ ; ca ; dvāraiḥ ; sphaṭika-gopuraiḥ ; juṣṭām ; vibhakta-prapathām ; viśvakarma-vinirmitām ;
199.words_en_fc: possessing plates made of gold; the doors of which; and; with entrances; with gates made of excellent marble; linked; with many different public roads; constructed by Viśvakarmā, the heavenly architect.;
199.yw_zh: 大门由牢固的金子铸成，门道由优质大理石砌成。各种公路连接着那些大门。整个城市由天堂建筑师维施瓦卡尔玛设计建造。
199.yw_en: The doors were made of solid gold plates, and the gates were of excellent marble. These were linked by various public roads. The entire city had been constructed by Viśvakarmā.

199.ldw:
sabhā-catvara-rathyāḍhyāṁ
 vimānair nyarbudair yutām
śṛṅgāṭakair maṇimayair
 vajra-vidruma-vedibhiḥ|

199.words_en_fc: with assembly houses; courtyards; and public roads; opulent; by airplanes; not less than ten crores (one hundred million); endowed; with crossroads; made of pearls; made of diamonds; and coral; with places to sit.;
199.yw_zh: 城市中满足庭院、宽阔的大路、聚会大厅，以及至少一亿架飞机。十字路口用珍珠铺设，路边设置了由钻石和珊瑚制成的座椅。
199.yw_en: The city was full of courtyards, wide roads, assembly houses, and not less than one hundred million airplanes. The crossroads were made of pearl, and there were sitting places made of diamond and coral.

199.ldw:
yatra nitya-vayo-rūpāḥ
 śyāmā viraja-vāsasaḥ
bhrājante rūpavan-nāryo
 hy arcirbhir iva vahnayaḥ|
199.ldw_fc: yatra ; nitya-vayaḥ-rūpāḥ ; śyāmāḥ ; viraja-vāsasaḥ ; bhrājante ; rūpa-vat ; nāryaḥ ; hi ; arcirbhiḥ ; iva ; vahnayaḥ ;
199.words_en_fc: in that city; who were ever beautiful and young; possessing the quality of śyāmā; always dressed with clean garments; glitter; well decorated; women; certainly; with many flames; like; fires.;
199.yw_zh: 永远美丽、年轻的仙女们身穿干净的衣服，光彩夺目恰似火焰般在城市中穿梭。她们都拥有夏玛的品质。
199.yw_en: Everlastingly beautiful and youthful women, who were dressed with clean garments, glittered in the city like fires with flames. They all possessed the quality of śyāmā.
199.yz_zh:
圣维施瓦纳特·查夸瓦尔提·塔库尔(Visvanatha Cakra-varti Thakura)对被称为夏玛(syama)的女性所具有的特质给予一些提示说:

身体冬暖夏凉且乳房一般都很坚挺的女人，被称为夏玛类的女性。
199.yz_en:
Śrīla Viśvanātha Cakravartī Ṭhākura gives a hint of the quality of the śyāmā woman.

śīta-kāle bhaved uṣṇā
 uṣma-kāle suśītalāḥ
stanau sukaṭhinau yāsāṁ
 tāḥ śyāmāḥ parikīrtitāḥ

A woman whose body is very warm during the winter and cool during the summer and who generally has very firm breasts is called śyāmā.

199.ldw:
sura-strī-keśa-vibhraṣṭa-
 nava-saugandhika-srajām
yatrāmodam upādāya
 mārga āvāti mārutaḥ|

199.words_en_fc: of the women of the demigods; from the hair; fallen; made of fresh, fragrant flowers; of the flower garlands; wherein; the fragrance; carrying; on the roads; blows; the breeze.;
199.yw_zh: 微风在城市的街道中吹拂，携带着从仙女们头发上落下的鲜花的芬芳。
199.yw_en: The breezes blowing in the streets of the city bore the fragrance of the flowers falling from the hair of the women of the demigods.

199.ldw:
hema-jālākṣa-nirgacchad-
 dhūmenāguru-gandhinā
pāṇḍureṇa praticchanna-
 mārge yānti sura-priyāḥ|

199.words_en_fc: from dainty little windows made of networks of gold; emanating; by smoke; fragrant due to burning incense known as aguru; very white; covered; on the street; pass; beautiful public women known as Apsarās, celestial girls.;
199.yw_zh: 天堂社交女郎走在街上，街道笼罩在从金丝编织出的华丽窗户飘出的龙舌兰焚香燃烧出的白色、芬芳的烟雾中。
199.yw_en: Apsarās passed on the streets, which were covered with the white, fragrant smoke of aguru incense emanating from windows with golden filigree.

199.ldw:
muktā-vitānair maṇi-hema-ketubhir
 nānā-patākā-valabhībhir āvṛtām
śikhaṇḍi-pārāvata-bhṛṅga-nāditāṁ
 vaimānika-strī-kala-gīta-maṅgalām|

199.words_en_fc: by canopies decorated with pearls; with flags made with pearls and gold; possessing various kinds of flags; with the domes of the palaces; covered; of birds like peacocks; pigeons; bees; vibrated by the respective sounds; getting on airplanes; of women; from the choral singing; full of auspiciousness.;
199.yw_zh: 城市上方有用珍珠装饰的遮阳项蓬，以及插着用珍珠和金子镶嵌之旗帜的宫殿圆顶。孔雀、鸽子和蜜蜂的叫声始终在城市中回荡，飞机满载一直在歌唱悦耳动听的吉祥歌曲的美丽仙女，在城市上空飞翔。
199.yw_en: The city was shaded by canopies decorated with pearls, and the domes of the palaces had flags of pearl and gold. The city always resounded with the vibrations of peacocks, pigeons and bees, and above the city flew airplanes full of beautiful women who constantly chanted auspicious songs that were very pleasing to the ear.

199.ldw:
mṛdaṅga-śaṅkhānaka-dundubhi-svanaiḥ
 satāla-vīṇā-murajeṣṭa-veṇubhiḥ
nṛtyaiḥ savādyair upadeva-gītakair
 manoramāṁ sva-prabhayā jita-prabhām|

199.words_en_fc: of drums; conchshells; and kettledrums; by the sounds; in perfect tune; a stringed instrument; a kind of drum; accompanied by the very nice sound of the flute; with dancing; with concert instruments; with singing by the secondary demigods like the Gandharvas; beautiful and pleasing; by its own brilliance; the personification of beauty was conquered.;
199.yw_zh: 城市中到处是音乐会上正在演奏的姆瑞当嘎鼓、海螺、定音鼓、笛子和弦乐器发出的声音。歌仙的歌唱与舞蹈持续不断地进行着。因铎城市的综合美，使美丽的人格化身黯然失色。
199.yw_en: The city was filled with the sounds of mṛdaṅgas, conchshells, kettledrums, flutes and well-tuned stringed instruments all playing in concert. There was constant dancing and the Gandharvas sang. The combined beauty of Indrapurī defeated beauty personified.

199.ldw:
yāṁ na vrajanty adharmiṣṭhāḥ
 khalā bhūta-druhaḥ śaṭhāḥ
māninaḥ kāmino lubdhā
 ebhir hīnā vrajanti yat|
