keśavāya namas tubhyaṁ
 namas te pīta-vāsase|
200.ldw_fc: namaḥ ; marakata-śyāma-vapuṣe ; adhigata-śriye ; keśavāya ; namaḥ tubhyam ; namaḥ te ; pīta-vāsase ;
200.words_en_fc: I offer my respectful obeisances unto You; whose bodily hue is blackish like the marakata gem; under whose control is mother Lakṣmī, the goddess of fortune; Lord Keśava, who killed the Keśī demon; I offer my respectful obeisances unto You; again I offer my respectful obeisances unto You; whose garment is yellow.;
200.yw_zh: 我的至尊主，我恭恭敬敬地顶拜您，您穿着黄色的衣衫，您的肤色恰似黑色绿宝石，幸运女神完全受您的支配。亲爱的凯沙瓦啊!我向您致以虔敬的顶礼。
200.yw_en: My Lord, I offer my respectful obeisances unto You, who are dressed in yellow garments, whose bodily hue resembles the marakata gem, and who have full control over the goddess of fortune. O my Lord Keśava, I offer my respectful obeisances unto You.

200.ldw:
tvaṁ sarva-varadaḥ puṁsāṁ
 vareṇya varadarṣabha
atas te śreyase dhīrāḥ
 pāda-reṇum upāsate|
200.ldw_fc: tvam ; sarva-vara-daḥ ; puṁsām ; vareṇya ; vara-da-ṛṣabha ; ataḥ ; te ; śreyase ; dhīrāḥ ; pāda-reṇum upāsate ;
200.words_en_fc: You; who can give all kinds of benedictions; to all living entities; O most worshipable; O most powerful of all givers of benediction; for this reason; Your; the source of all auspiciousness; the most sober; worship the dust of the lotus feet.;
200.yw_zh: 啊，最崇高、最值得崇拜的至尊主，赐予祝福之人中最卓越者!您可以满足每一个人的愿望。因此，清醒并为自己的福利着想的人，崇拜您的莲花足。
200.yw_en: O most exalted and worshipable Lord, best of those who bestow benediction, You can fulfill the desires of everyone, and therefore those who are sober, for their own welfare, worship the dust of Your lotus feet.

200.ldw:
anvavartanta yaṁ devāḥ
 śrīś ca tat-pāda-padmayoḥ
spṛhayanta ivāmodaṁ
 bhagavān me prasīdatām|
200.ldw_fc: anvavartanta ; yam ; devāḥ ; śrīḥ ca ; tat-pāda-padmayoḥ ; spṛhayantaḥ ; iva ; āmodam ; bhagavān ; me ; prasīdatām ;
200.words_en_fc: engaged in devotional service; unto whom; all the demigods; and the goddess of fortune; of the lotus feet of His Lordship; desiring; exactly; celestial bliss; the Supreme Personality of Godhead; upon me; may be pleased.;
200.yw_zh: 幸运女神和所有的半神人都致力于侍奉祂的莲花足。他们尊重您莲花足的芳香。愿至尊人格首神对我满意。
200.yw_en: All the demigods, as well as the goddess of fortune, engage in the service of His lotus feet. Indeed, they respect the fragrance of those lotus feet. May the Supreme Personality of Godhead be pleased with me.

200.ldw:
etair mantrair hṛṣīkeśam
 āvāhana-puraskṛtam
arcayec chraddhayā yuktaḥ
 pādyopasparśanādibhiḥ|
200.ldw_fc: etaiḥ mantraiḥ ; hṛṣīkeśam ; āvāhana ; puraskṛtam ; arcayet ; śraddhayā ; yuktaḥ ; pādya-upasparśana-ādibhiḥ ;
200.words_en_fc: by chanting all these mantras; unto the Supreme Personality of Godhead, the master of all senses; calling; honoring Him in all respects; one should worship; with faith and devotion; engaged; with the paraphernalia of worship (pādya, arghya, etc).;
200.yw_zh: 喀夏帕·牟尼接着说:人应该靠吟诵这些赞美诗，用信心和奉爱之情迎接至尊人格首神，向祂献上崇拜用的一切(洗莲花足的水和洗手用水等)，以此崇拜至尊人格首神凯沙瓦一一慧希凯施一一奎师那。
200.yw_en: Kaśyapa Muni continued: By chanting all these mantras, welcoming the Supreme Personality of Godhead with faith and devotion, and offering Him items of worship [such as pādya and arghya], one should worship Keśava, Hṛṣīkeśa, Kṛṣṇa, the Supreme Personality of Godhead.

200.ldw:
arcitvā gandha-mālyādyaiḥ
 payasā snapayed vibhum
vastropavītābharaṇa-
 pādyopasparśanais tataḥ
gandha-dhūpādibhiś cārced
 dvādaśākṣara-vidyayā|
200.ldw_fc: arcitvā ; gandha-mālya-ādyaiḥ ; payasā ; snapayet ; vibhum ; vastra ; upavīta ; ābharaṇa ; pādya ; upasparśanaiḥ ; tataḥ ; gandha ; dhūpa ; ādibhiḥ ; ca ; arcet ; dvādaśa-akṣara-vidyayā ;
200.words_en_fc: worshiping in this way; with incense, flower garlands, etc; with milk; should bathe; the Lord; dress; sacred thread; ornaments; water for washing the lotus feet; touching; thereafter; fragrance; incense; with all of these; and; should worship; with the mantra of twelve syllables.;
200.yw_zh: 在开始时，奉献者应该吟诵用十二个音节组成的赞美诗、给至尊主供奉花环和焚香等。这样崇拜至尊主后， 就应该用牛奶给至尊主沐浴，为祂穿上合身的衣服，为祂配戴上一条圣线和各种首饰。在给至尊主献上水，洗浴祂的莲花足后，应该再次用芬芳的鲜花、焚香和其它供品崇拜至尊主。
200.yw_en: In the beginning, the devotee should chant the dvādaśākṣara-mantra and offer flower garlands, incense and so on. After worshiping the Lord in this way, one should bathe the Lord with milk and dress Him with proper garments, a sacred thread, and ornaments. After offering water to wash the Lord’s feet, one should again worship the Lord with fragrant flowers, incense and other paraphernalia.
200.yz_zh: 有十二个音节的曼陀(dvadasaksara-mantra)是: om namo bhagavate vasudevaya。在崇拜神像时，人应该用左手摇铃，献上洗莲花足的水(padya)、洗手用的水(arghya)、衣服(vastra)、檀香桨(gandha)、花环(mala)、首饰(abharana)和装饰品(bhusana)等。接着，人应该用牛奶给至尊主沐浴，给他穿衣、打扮，用各种用品再次崇拜他。
200.yz_en: The dvādaśākṣara-mantra is oṁ namo bhagavate vāsudevāya. While worshiping the Deity, one should ring a bell with his left hand and offer pādya, arghya, vastra, gandha, mālā, ābharaṇa, bhūṣaṇa and so on. In this way, one should bathe the Lord with milk, dress Him and again worship Him with all paraphernalia.

200.ldw:
śṛtaṁ payasi naivedyaṁ
 śāly-annaṁ vibhave sati
sasarpiḥ saguḍaṁ dattvā
 juhuyān mūla-vidyayā|
200.ldw_fc: śṛtam ; payasi ; naivedyam ; śāli-annam ; vibhave ; sati ; sa-sarpiḥ ; sa-guḍam ; dattvā ; juhuyāt ; mūla-vidyayā ;
200.words_en_fc: cooked; in milk; offering to the Deity; fine rice; if available; in this way; with ghee (clarified butter); with molasses; offering Him; should offer oblations in the fire; with chanting of the same dvādaśākṣara-mantra.;
200.yw_zh: 如果有能力的话，人应该给神像供奉加入了纯净酥油和糖浆的甜奶粥。在吟诵最开始吟诵的那首赞美诗的同时，将所有这一切供奉到火中。
200.yw_en: If one can afford to, one should offer the Deity fine rice boiled in milk with clarified butter and molasses. While chanting the same original mantra, one should offer all this to the fire.

200.ldw:
niveditaṁ tad-bhaktāya
 dadyād bhuñjīta vā svayam
dattvācamanam arcitvā
 tāmbūlaṁ ca nivedayet|
200.ldw_fc: niveditam ; tat-bhaktāya ; dadyāt ; bhuñjīta ; vā ; svayam ; dattvā ācamanam ; arcitvā ; tāmbūlam ; ca ; nivedayet ;
200.words_en_fc: this offering of prasāda; unto His devotee; should be offered; one should take; either; personally; giving water to wash the hands and mouth; in this way worshiping the Deity; betel nuts with spices; also; one should offer.;
200.yw_zh: 人应该将所有的帕萨达给予一位外士纳瓦，或者给外士纳瓦一些，然后自己进食一些。这之后，人应该给神像供奉洗手和洗嘴用的水，随后是槟榔。这之后再次崇拜至尊主。
200.yw_en: One should offer all the prasāda to a Vaiṣṇava or offer him some of the prasāda and then take some oneself. After this, one should offer the Deity ācamana and then betel nut and then again worship the Lord.

200.ldw:
japed aṣṭottara-śataṁ
 stuvīta stutibhiḥ prabhum
kṛtvā pradakṣiṇaṁ bhūmau
 praṇamed daṇḍavan mudā|
200.ldw_fc: japet ; aṣṭottara-śatam ; stuvīta ; stutibhiḥ ; prabhum ; kṛtvā ; pradakṣiṇam ; bhūmau ; praṇamet ; daṇḍavat ; mudā ;
200.words_en_fc: should silently murmur; 108 times; should offer prayers; by various prayers of glorification; unto the Lord; thereafter doing; circumambulation; on the ground; should offer obeisances; straight, with the whole body; with great satisfaction.;
200.yw_zh: 那之后，人应该默默地吟诵那个赞美诗一百零八遍，向祂敬献祈祷，赞美祂的荣耀。接着，人应该绕拜至尊主;最后怀着十分喜悦和满足的心情如一根棍子般扑倒，向祂顶礼。
200.yw_en: Thereafter, one should silently murmur the mantra 108 times and offer prayers to the Lord for His glorification. Then one should circumambulate the Lord and finally, with great delight and satisfaction, offer obeisances, falling straight like a rod [daṇḍavat].

200.ldw:
kṛtvā śirasi tac-cheṣāṁ
 devam udvāsayet tataḥ
dvy-avarān bhojayed viprān
 pāyasena yathocitam|
200.ldw_fc: kṛtvā ; śirasi ; tat-śeṣām ; devam ; udvāsayet ; tataḥ ; dvi-avarān ; bhojayet ; viprān ; pāyasena ; yathā-ucitam ;
200.words_en_fc: taking; on the head; all the remnants (the water and flowers offered to the Deity); unto the Deity; should be thrown into a sacred place; thereafter; a minimum of two; should feed; brāhmaṇas; with sweet rice; as each deserves.;
200.yw_zh: 在用献给神像的鲜花和水触碰自己的头后，人应该将它们置于神圣的地方。随后，人应该请至少两位布茹阿玛纳进食甜奶饭。
200.yw_en: After touching to one’s head all the flowers and water offered to the Deity, one should throw them into a sacred place. Then one should feed at least two brāhmaṇas with sweet rice.

200.ldw:
bhuñjīta tair anujñātaḥ
 seṣṭaḥ śeṣaṁ sabhājitaiḥ
brahmacāry atha tad-rātryāṁ
 śvo bhūte prathame ’hani|snātaḥ śucir yathoktena
 vidhinā susamāhitaḥ
payasā snāpayitvārced
 yāvad vrata-samāpanam|
200.ldw_fc: bhuñjīta ; taiḥ ; anujñātaḥ ; sa-iṣṭaḥ ; śeṣam ; sabhājitaiḥ ; brahmacārī ; atha ; tat-rātryām ; śvaḥ bhūte ; prathame ahani ; snātaḥ ; śuciḥ ; yathā-uktena ; vidhinā ; su-samāhitaḥ ; payasā ; snāpayitvā ; arcet ; yāvat ; vrata-samāpanam ;
200.words_en_fc: should take the prasāda; by the brāhmaṇas; being permitted; with friends and relatives; the remnants; properly honored; observance of celibacy; of course; at night; at the end of the night, when the morning comes; on the first day; bathing; becoming purified; as stated before; by following the regulative principles; with great attention; with milk; bathing the Deity; should offer worship; as long as; the period of worship is not over.;
200.yw_zh: 人应该尽善尽美地向被邀请来进食的可尊敬的布茹阿玛纳致以敬意。之后，在征得他们的允许后，与自己的朋友和亲属进食帕萨达。人应该在当天晚上严格禁欲;第二天清晨再次沐于后，用牛奶给维施努的神像沐浴，按照前面详述的说明崇拜祂。
200.yw_en: One should perfectly honor the respectable brāhmaṇas one has fed, and then, after taking their permission, one should take prasāda with his friends and relatives. For that night, one should observe strict celibacy, and the next morning, after bathing again, with purity and attention one should bathe the Deity of Viṣṇu with milk and worship Him according to the methods formerly stated in detail.

200.ldw:
payo-bhakṣo vratam idaṁ
 cared viṣṇv-arcanādṛtaḥ
pūrvavaj juhuyād agniṁ
 brāhmaṇāṁś cāpi bhojayet|
200.ldw_fc: payaḥ-bhakṣaḥ ; vratam idam ; caret ; viṣṇu-arcana-ādṛtaḥ ; pūrva-vat ; juhuyāt ; agnim ; brāhmaṇān ; ca api ; bhojayet ;
200.words_en_fc: one who drinks milk only; this process of worshiping with a vow; one should execute; worshiping Lord Viṣṇu with great faith and devotion; as prescribed previously; one should offer oblations; into the fire; unto the brāhmaṇas; as well as; should feed.;
200.yw_zh: 怀着巨大的信心和牶爱之情对主维施努的崇拜， 并靠喝牛奶维持生命:这就是人应该遵守的誓言。除此之外，人还应该如前面谈到的，向火中供奉供品，请布茹阿玛纳进食。
200.yw_en: Worshiping Lord Viṣṇu with great faith and devotion and living only by drinking milk, one should follow this vow. One should also offer oblations to the fire and feed the brāhmaṇas as mentioned before.

200.ldw:
evaṁ tv ahar ahaḥ kuryād
 dvādaśāhaṁ payo-vratam
harer ārādhanaṁ homam
 arhaṇaṁ dvija-tarpaṇam|
200.ldw_fc: evam ; tu ; ahaḥ ahaḥ ; kuryāt ; dvādaśa-aham ; payaḥ-vratam ; hareḥ ārādhanam ; homam ; arhaṇam ; dvija-tarpaṇam ;
200.words_en_fc: in this way; indeed; day after day; should execute; until twelve days; the observance of the vrata known as payo-vrata; worshiping the Supreme Personality of Godhead; by executing a fire sacrifice; worshiping the Deity; and satisfying the brāhmaṇas by feeding them.;
200.yw_zh: 在整整十二天中，人应该每天以此方式执行这个帕尤一瓦塔誓言，崇拜至尊主，履行日常责任，举行祭祀并请布茹阿玛纳进食。
200.yw_en: In this way, until twelve days have passed, one should observe this payo-vrata, worshiping the Lord every day, executing the routine duties, performing sacrifices and feeding the brāhmaṇas.

200.ldw:
pratipad-dinam ārabhya
 yāvac chukla-trayodaśīm
brahmacaryam adhaḥ-svapnaṁ
 snānaṁ tri-ṣavaṇaṁ caret|
200.ldw_fc: pratipat-dinam ; ārabhya ; yāvat ; śukla ; trayodaśīm ; brahmacaryam ; adhaḥ-svapnam ; snānam ; tri-savanam ; caret ;
200.words_en_fc: on the day of pratipat; beginning; until; of the bright fortnight; the thirteenth day of the moon (the second day after Ekādaśī); observing complete celibacy; lying down on the floor; bathing; three times (morning, evening and noon); one should execute.;
200.yw_zh: 从月明的第一天直到月明的第十三天，人应该完全禁欲，睡在地上，一天沐浴三次，以此方式遵守誓言。
200.yw_en: From pratipat until the thirteenth day of the next bright moon [śukla-trayodaśī], one should observe complete celibacy, sleep on the floor, bathe three times a day and thus execute the vow.

200.ldw:
varjayed asad-ālāpaṁ
 bhogān uccāvacāṁs tathā
ahiṁsraḥ sarva-bhūtānāṁ
 vāsudeva-parāyaṇaḥ|
200.ldw_fc: varjayet ; asat-ālāpam ; bhogān ; ucca-avacān ; tathā ; ahiṁsraḥ ; sarva-bhūtānām ; vāsudeva-parāyaṇaḥ ;
200.words_en_fc: one should give up; unnecessary talk on material subject matters; sense gratification; superior or inferior; as well as; without being envious; of all living entities; simply being a devotee of Lord Vāsudeva.;
200.yw_zh: 在此期间，人不该毫无必要地谈论物质话题一一有关感官享乐的话题;应该完全去除对众生的嫉妒心，应该当主华苏戴瓦的一个纯粹、朴实的奉献者。
200.yw_en: During this period, one should not unnecessarily talk of material subjects or topics of sense gratification, one should be completely free from envy of all living entities, and one should be a pure and simple devotee of Lord Vāsudeva.

200.ldw:
trayodaśyām atho viṣṇoḥ
 snapanaṁ pañcakair vibhoḥ
kārayec chāstra-dṛṣṭena
 vidhinā vidhi-kovidaiḥ|
200.ldw_fc: trayodaśyām ; atho ; viṣṇoḥ ; snapanam ; pañcakaiḥ ; vibhoḥ ; kārayet ; śāstra-dṛṣṭena ; vidhinā ; vidhi-kovidaiḥ ;
200.words_en_fc: on the thirteenth day of the moon; thereafter; of Lord Viṣṇu; bathing; by pañcāmṛta, five substances; the Lord; one should execute; enjoined in the scripture; under regulative principles; assisted by the priests who know the regulative principles.;
200.yw_zh: 那之后，人应该按照了解经典的布茹阿玛纳的指导，在月明的第十三天用五种液体(牛奶、酸奶、酥油、糖和蜂蜜)给主维施努沐浴。
200.yw_en: Thereafter, following the directions of the śāstra with help from brāhmaṇas who know the śāstra, on the thirteenth day of the moon one should bathe Lord Viṣṇu with five substances [milk, yogurt, ghee, sugar and honey].

200.ldw:
pūjāṁ ca mahatīṁ kuryād
 vitta-śāṭhya-vivarjitaḥ
caruṁ nirūpya payasi
 śipiviṣṭāya viṣṇave|sūktena tena puruṣaṁ
 yajeta susamāhitaḥ
naivedyaṁ cātiguṇavad
 dadyāt puruṣa-tuṣṭidam|
200.ldw_fc: pūjām ; ca ; mahatīm ; kuryāt ; vitta-śāṭhya ; vivarjitaḥ ; carum ; nirūpya ; payasi ; śipiviṣṭāya ; viṣṇave ; sūktena ; tena ; puruṣam ; yajeta ; su-samāhitaḥ ; naivedyam ; ca ; ati-guṇa-vat ; dadyāt ; puruṣa-tuṣṭi-dam ;
200.words_en_fc: worship; also; very gorgeous; should do; miserly mentality (not spending sufficient money); giving up; grains offered in the yajña; seeing properly; with milk; unto the Supersoul, who is situated in the heart of every living entity; unto Lord Viṣṇu; by chanting the Vedic mantra known as Puruṣa-sūkta; by that; the Supreme Personality of Godhead; one should worship; with great attention; food offered to the Deity; and; prepared very gorgeously with all varieties of taste; should offer; everything extremely pleasing to the Supreme Personality of Godhead.;
200.yw_zh: 人应该去除不愿意花钱的吝啬习惯，安排以最豪华的方式崇拜处在众生心中的至尊人格首神。人必须小心翼翼地用纯净酥油和牛奶烹煮谷物供品，并吟诵名叫菩茹沙一苏克塔的赞美诗。应该供奉有各种不同滋味的美食。人应该用这种方式崇拜至尊人格首神。
200.yw_en: Giving up the miserly habit of not spending money, one should arrange for the gorgeous worship of the Supreme Personality of Godhead, Viṣṇu, who is situated in the heart of every living entity. With great attention, one must prepare an oblation of grains boiled in ghee and milk and must chant the Puruṣa-sūkta mantra. The offerings of food should be of varieties of tastes. In this way, one should worship the Supreme Personality of Godhead.

200.ldw:
ācāryaṁ jñāna-sampannaṁ
 vastrābharaṇa-dhenubhiḥ
toṣayed ṛtvijaś caiva
 tad viddhy ārādhanaṁ hareḥ|
200.ldw_fc: ācāryam ; jñāna-sampannam ; vastra-ābharaṇa-dhenubhiḥ ; toṣayet ; ṛtvijaḥ ; ca eva ; tat viddhi ; ārādhanam ; hareḥ ;
200.words_en_fc: the spiritual master; very advanced in spiritual knowledge; with clothing, ornaments and many cows; should satisfy; the priests recommended by the spiritual master; as well as; try to understand that; worship; of the Supreme Personality of Godhead.;
200.yw_zh: 人应该取悦精通韦达文献的灵性导师，应该让协助他举行祭祀的祭司(hota，udgata， adhvaryu和brahma)感到满意， 应该通过给予他们衣服、装饰品和乳牛取悦他们。这种礼仪被称为对主维施努的崇拜。
200.yw_en: One should satisfy the spiritual master [ācārya], who is very learned in Vedic literature, and should satisfy his assistant priests [known as hotā, udgātā, adhvaryu and brahma]. One should please them by offering them clothing, ornaments and cows. This is the ceremony called viṣṇu-ārādhana, or worship of Lord Viṣṇu.

200.ldw:
bhojayet tān guṇavatā
 sad-annena śuci-smite
anyāṁś ca brāhmaṇāñ chaktyā
 ye ca tatra samāgatāḥ|
200.ldw_fc: bhojayet ; tān ; guṇa-vatā ; sat-annena ; śuci-smite ; anyān ca ; brāhmaṇān ; śaktyā ; ye ; ca ; tatra ; samāgatāḥ ;
200.words_en_fc: should distribute prasāda; unto all of them; by rich foods; with food prepared with ghee and milk, which is supposed to be very pure; O most pious lady; others also; brāhmaṇas; as far as possible; all of them who; also; there (at the ceremonies); assembled.;
200.yw_zh: 吉祥的女士啊!人应该在博学的灵性导师的指导下举行所有的仪式，应该让他们和他们的祭司满意。人还应该靠分发帕萨达取悦布茹阿玛纳和聚集在一起的其他来者。
200.yw_en: O most auspicious lady, one should perform all the ceremonies under the direction of learned ācāryas and should satisfy them and their priests. By distributing prasāda, one should also satisfy the brāhmaṇas and others who have assembled.

200.ldw:
dakṣiṇāṁ gurave dadyād
 ṛtvigbhyaś ca yathārhataḥ
annādyenāśva-pākāṁś ca
 prīṇayet samupāgatān|
200.ldw_fc: dakṣiṇām ; gurave ; dadyāt ; ṛtvigbhyaḥ ca ; yathā-arhataḥ ; anna-adyena ; āśva-pākān ; ca ; prīṇayet ; samupāgatān ;
200.words_en_fc: some contribution of money or gold; unto the spiritual master; one should give; and to the priests engaged by the spiritual master; as far as possible; by distributing prasāda; even to the caṇḍālas, persons habituated to eating the flesh of dogs; also; one should please; because they have assembled there for the ceremony.;
200.yw_zh: 人应该将衣服、装饰品、乳牛和礼金送给灵性导师及协助他们的祭司，以此方式取悦他们。人应该分发帕萨达，以此方式让参加聚会的每个人都感到满意，甚至包括最低等的人一一吃狗肉者。
200.yw_en: One should satisfy the spiritual master and assistant priests by giving them cloth, ornaments, cows and also some monetary contribution. And by distributing prasāda one should satisfy everyone assembled, including even the lowest of men, the caṇḍālas [eaters of dog flesh].
200.yz_zh: 在韦达系统中对于帕萨达(prasada)的派发，就如这节诗文中所介绍的一样，不对人加以区分。无论一个人是布茹阿玛纳(brahmana)、查锤亚(ksatriya)、外夏(vaisya)、庶铎(sudra)，甚或是最低等的人——吃狗肉者(candala)，都该受到欢迎，接受给至尊神供奉过的食物——帕萨达。然而，当低等阶层或贫穷阶层的人(candala)接受帕萨达时，并不意味着他们就因此而变成了纳茹阿亚纳或维施努·纳茹阿亚纳处在每一个生物体的心中，但这并不意味着纳茹阿亚纳是可怜之人。将可怜人视为是纳茹阿亚纳的假象宗(Mayavada)哲学，是对至尊主的嫉妒，是对神的不敬。应该完全放弃这种心态。应该给每一个人机会进食帕萨达，但这并不意味着每一个人都可以成为纳茹阿亚纳。
200.yz_en: In the Vedic system, prasāda is distributed, as recommended here, without discrimination as to who may take the prasāda. Regardless of whether one be a brāhmaṇa, śūdra, vaiśya, kṣatriya, or even the lowest of men, a caṇḍāla, he should be welcome to accept prasāda. However, when the caṇḍālas, the lower class or poorer class, are taking prasāda, this does not mean that they have become Nārāyaṇa or Viṣṇu. Nārāyaṇa is situated in everyone’s heart, but this does not mean Nārāyaṇa is a caṇḍāla or poor man. The Māyāvāda philosophy of accepting a poor man as Nārāyaṇa is the most envious and atheistic movement in Vedic culture. This mentality should be completely given up. Everyone should be given the opportunity to take prasāda, but this does not mean that everyone has the right to become Nārāyaṇa.

200.ldw:
bhuktavatsu ca sarveṣu
 dīnāndha-kṛpaṇādiṣu
viṣṇos tat prīṇanaṁ vidvān
 bhuñjīta saha bandhubhiḥ|
200.ldw_fc: bhuktavatsu ; ca ; sarveṣu ; dīna ; andha ; kṛpaṇa ; ādiṣu ; viṣṇoḥ ; tat ; prīṇanam ; vidvān ; bhuñjīta ; saha ; bandhubhiḥ ;
200.words_en_fc: after feeding; also; everyone present there; very poor; blind; those who are not brāhmaṇas; and so on; of Lord Viṣṇu, who is situated in everyone’s heart; that (prasāda); pleasing; one who understands this philosophy; should take prasāda himself; with; friends and relatives.;
200.yw_zh: 人应该向每一个人分量给维施努供奉过的帕萨达，包括穷人、盲人、非奉献者和不是布茹阿玛纳的人。请大家一起进食维施努-帕萨达会使主维施努十分满意。在暸解这一点的情况下，举行祭祀的人应该在向上述之人分发帕萨达后，与自己的朋友和亲属进食帕萨达。
200.yw_en: One should distribute viṣṇu-prasāda to everyone, including the poor man, the blind man, the nondevotee and the non-brāhmaṇa. Knowing that Lord Viṣṇu is very pleased when everyone is sumptuously fed with viṣṇu-prasāda, the performer of yajña should then take prasāda with his friends and relatives.

200.ldw:
nṛtya-vāditra-gītaiś ca
 stutibhiḥ svasti-vācakaiḥ
kārayet tat-kathābhiś ca
 pūjāṁ bhagavato ’nvaham|
200.ldw_fc: nṛtya ; vāditra ; gītaiḥ ; ca ; stutibhiḥ ; svasti-vācakaiḥ ; kārayet ; tat-kathābhiḥ ; ca ; pūjām ; bhagavataḥ ; anvaham ;
200.words_en_fc: by dancing; by beating the drum; and by singing; also; by chanting auspicious mantras; by offering prayers; should execute; by reciting the Bhāgavatam, Bhagavad-gītā and similar literature; also; worship; of the Supreme Personality of Godhead, Viṣṇu; every day (from pratipat to trayodaśī).;
200.yw_zh: 从月明的第一天到第十三天，人应该持续举行仪式，仪式中始终伴随有舞蹈、歌唱、击鼓、吟诵赞美诗和所有吉祥的曼，以及朗诵《圣典博伽瓦谭》。人应以此方式崇拜至尊人格首神。
200.yw_en: Every day from pratipat to trayodaśī, one should continue the ceremony, to the accompaniment of dancing, singing, the beating of a drum, the chanting of prayers and all-auspicious mantras, and recitation of Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam. In this way, one should worship the Supreme Personality of Godhead.

200.ldw:
etat payo-vrataṁ nāma
 puruṣārādhanaṁ param
pitāmahenābhihitaṁ
 mayā te samudāhṛtam|
200.ldw_fc: etat ; payaḥ-vratam ; nāma ; puruṣa-ārādhanam ; param ; pitāmahena ; abhihitam ; mayā ; te ; samudāhṛtam ;
200.words_en_fc: this; ceremony known as payo-vrata; by that name; the process of worshiping the Supreme Personality of Godhead; the best; by my grandfather, Lord Brahmā; stated; by me; unto you; described in all details.;
200.yw_zh: 这就是被称为帕尤一瓦的宗教仪式，人可以通这一仪式崇拜至尊人格首神。我的祖父布茹阿玛将这信息传给我，我现在给你详细地讲解了它。
200.yw_en: This is the religious ritualistic ceremony known as payo-vrata, by which one may worship the Supreme Personality of Godhead. I received this information from Brahmā, my grandfather, and now I have described it to you in all details.

200.ldw:
tvaṁ cānena mahā-bhāge
 samyak cīrṇena keśavam
ātmanā śuddha-bhāvena
 niyatātmā bhajāvyayam|
200.ldw_fc: tvam ca ; anena ; mahā-bhāge ; samyak cīrṇena ; keśavam ; ātmanā ; śuddha-bhāvena ; niyata-ātmā ; bhaja ; avyayam ;
200.words_en_fc: you also; by this process; O greatly fortunate one; executed properly; unto Lord Keśava; by oneself; in a pure state of mind; controlling oneself; go on worshiping; the Supreme Personality of Godhead, who is inexhaustible.;
200.yw_zh: 最幸运的女士啊!让你的心处于良好的精神状态，执行这个帕尤一瓦塔程序，以此崇拜无穷无尽的至尊人格首神凯沙瓦。
200.yw_en: O most fortunate lady, establishing your mind in a good spirit, execute this process of payo-vrata and thus worship the Supreme Personality of Godhead, Keśava, who is inexhaustible.

200.ldw:
ayaṁ vai sarva-yajñākhyaḥ
 sarva-vratam iti smṛtam
tapaḥ-sāram idaṁ bhadre
 dānaṁ ceśvara-tarpaṇam|
200.ldw_fc: ayam ; vai ; sarva-yajña ; ākhyaḥ ; sarva-vratam ; iti ; smṛtam ; tapaḥ-sāram ; idam ; bhadre ; dānam ; ca ; īśvara ; tarpaṇam ;
200.words_en_fc: this; indeed; all kinds of religious rituals and sacrifices; called; all religious ceremonies; thus; understood; the essence of all austerities; this; O good lady; acts of charity; and; the Supreme Personality of Godhead; the process of pleasing.;
200.yw_zh: 这个帕尤一瓦塔程序又称萨尔瓦祭祀。换句话说，举行这个祭祀就等于举行了所有其它的祭祀。这个祭祀还被公认为是最佳的祭祀仪式。高贵的女士啊!它是一切苦修质，是给予布施的程序，令至尊控制者满意。
200.yw_en: This payo-vrata is also known as sarva-yajña. In other words, by performing this sacrifice one can perform all other sacrifices automatically. This is also acknowledged to be the best of all ritualistic ceremonies. O gentle lady, it is the essence of all austerities, and it is the process of giving charity and pleasing the supreme controller.
200.yz_zh: 崇拜主维施努是崇拜中最高的程序(aradhananam sarve-sam visnor aradhanam param)。这是主希瓦对帕尔娃缇(Parvati)的说明。就如何透过执行帕尤-瓦塔仪式崇拜主维施努，到这节诗为止已经给予了完整的讲解。通过遵守社会四阶层和灵性四阶段制度(varnasrama-dharma)取悦主维施努，是生命的最高目标。社会四阶层(varnas)和灵性四阶段(asrama)的韦达制度，专门为崇拜维施努而设(visnur aradhyate pumsam nanyat tat-tosa-karanam)。奎师那意识运动是根据现在这个年代的情况对主维施努的崇拜(visnu-aradhanam)，崇拜主维施努的帕尤-瓦塔方法，在很久、很久以前由喀夏帕在天堂星球中介绍给他妻于阿迪缇;这一程序甚至在如今的地球上仍然具有权威性。尤其在这个喀历年代，奎师那意识运动所采用的方法是在全球建立成百上千的维施努庙宇(茹阿妲-奎师那庙、佳千纳特庙、巴拉茹阿玛庙、悉塔-茹阿玛庙和高尔-尼泰庙等)。在这些维施努的庙宇中按照规定崇拜至尊主，与这一章中介绍的帕尤-瓦塔仪式一样。帕尤-瓦塔仪式需要从月明的十四天中的第一天到第十三天举行，但在我们的奎师那意识运动中，每一个庙里都按照日程安排表，一天二十四小时地吟唱哈瑞-奎师那(Hare Krsna)这首伟大的曼陀，给主维施努供奉美味的食物，再将供奉过的食物派发给奉献者(Vaisnava)和其他人，以这种方式崇拜主维施努。这些都是经授权的活动;奎师那意识运动中的成员如果坚持从事这些活动，就会获得举行帕尤-瓦塔仪式所能获得的结果。因此，奎师那意识运动中包括了举行祭祀、给予布施和遵守誓言(vrata)等所有精华的吉祥活动。这个运动的成员应该立刻认真遵守已经推荐的各种程序。当然，祭祀意味着取悦主维施努。在喀历年代中，智者举行集体歌唱神的圣名祭祀(yajnaih sankirtana-pra-yair yajanti hi sumedhasah)。人应该认真地按照这一程序做。
200.yz_en: Ārādhanānāṁ sarveṣāṁ viṣṇor ārādhanaṁ param. This is a statement made by Lord Śiva to Pārvatī. Worshiping Lord Viṣṇu is the supreme process of worship. And how Lord Viṣṇu is worshiped in this payo-vrata ceremony has now been fully described. The ultimate goal of life is to please Lord Viṣṇu by varṇāśrama-dharma. The Vedic principles of four varṇas and four āśramas are meant for worship of Viṣṇu (viṣṇur ārādhyate panthā nānyat tat-toṣa-kāraṇam). The Kṛṣṇa consciousness movement is also viṣṇu-ārādhanam, or worship of Lord Viṣṇu, according to the age. The payo-vrata method of viṣṇu-ārādhanam was enunciated long, long ago by Kaśyapa Muni to his wife, Aditi, in the heavenly planets, and the same process is bona fide on earth even now. Especially for this Age of Kali, the process accepted by the Kṛṣṇa consciousness movement is to open hundreds and thousands of Viṣṇu temples (temples of Rādhā-Kṛṣṇa, Jagannātha, Balarāma, Sītā-Rāma, Gaura-Nitāi and so on). Performing prescribed worship in such temples of Viṣṇu and thus worshiping the Lord is as good as performing the payo-vrata ceremony recommended here. The payo-vrata ceremony is performed from the first to the thirteenth day of the bright fortnight of the moon, but in our Kṛṣṇa consciousness movement Lord Viṣṇu is worshiped in every temple according to a schedule of twenty-four hours of engagement in performing kīrtana, chanting the Hare Kṛṣṇa mahā-mantra, offering palatable food to Lord Viṣṇu and distributing this food to Vaiṣṇavas and others. These are authorized activities, and if the members of the Kṛṣṇa consciousness movement stick to these principles, they will achieve the same result one gains by observing the payo-vrata ceremony. Thus the essence of all auspicious activities, such as performing yajña, giving in charity, observing vratas, and undergoing austerities, is included in the Kṛṣṇa consciousness movement. The members of this movement should immediately and sincerely follow the processes already recommended. Of course, sacrifice is meant to please Lord Viṣṇu. Yajñaiḥ saṅkīrtana-prāyair yajanti hi sumedhasaḥ: in Kali-yuga, those who are intelligent perform the saṅkīrtana-yajña. One should follow this process conscientiously.

200.ldw:
ta eva niyamāḥ sākṣāt
 ta eva ca yamottamāḥ
tapo dānaṁ vrataṁ yajño
 yena tuṣyaty adhokṣajaḥ|
200.ldw_fc: te ; eva ; niyamāḥ ; sākṣāt ; te ; eva ; ca ; yama-uttamāḥ ; tapaḥ ; dānam ; vratam ; yajñaḥ ; yena ; tuṣyati ; adhokṣajaḥ ;
200.words_en_fc: that is; indeed; all regulative principles; directly; that is; indeed; also; the best process of controlling the senses; austerities; charity; observing vows; sacrifice; by which process; is very pleased; the Supreme Lord, who is not perceived by material senses.;
200.yw_zh: 这是取悦至尊人格首神阿宝沙佳的最佳方法。 它是最好的规范原则、最有效的苦修，给予布施的最恰当方法，祭祀的最佳程序。
200.yw_en: This is the best process for pleasing the transcendental Supreme Personality of Godhead, known as Adhokṣaja. It is the best of all regulative principles, the best austerity, the best process of giving charity, and the best process of sacrifice.
200.yz_zh:
《博伽梵歌》第18章的第66节诗记载，至尊主说:

“抛弃一切种类的宗教，只向我归依。我将把你从所有的恶报中解救出来。不必害怕! “人除非按照至尊人格首神的要求取悦他，否则所从事的活动不会产生好的结果。《圣典博伽瓦谭》第1篇第2章的第8节诗说:

“如果人们按各自的状况所从事的职业活动并没有使他们受人格首神信息的吸引，那么从事这些活动就是徒劳无益的。 “没兴趣让主维施努(华苏戴瓦)感到满意的人，无论从事什么所谓的吉祥活动，都是徒劳无益的。如此迷惑的人希望会落空，活动会失败，培养的知识毫无用处(moghasa mogha-karmano mogha-jnana vi-cetasah)。就有关这一点，圣维施瓦纳特•查夸瓦尔提•塔库尔评论说: napumsakam anapumsakenety-adinaikatvam。现代假象宗人士中有一种时髦的说法是:一个人无论做什么，无论走什么路，都是好的。但这些都是愚蠢的说明。这节诗文中强有力地声明，做奉爱服务是唯一能使人生获得成功的方式。除非主维施努感到满意，否则所有的虔诚活动、仪式和祭祀都只不过是表演而已，毫无价值(isvara-tarpanam vina sarvam eva viphalam)。不幸的是，人们不知道成功的秘密。他们不知道自我真正的利益是取悦主维施努(nate viduh svartha-gatim hi visnum)。
200.yz_en:
The Supreme Lord says in Bhagavad-gītā (18.66):

sarva-dharmān parityajya
 mām ekaṁ śaraṇaṁ vraja
ahaṁ tvāṁ sarva-pāpebhyo
 mokṣayiṣyāmi mā śucaḥ

“Abandon all varieties of religion and just surrender unto Me. I shall deliver you from all sinful reaction. Do not fear.” Unless one pleases the Supreme Personality of Godhead according to His demand, no good result will come from any of his actions.

dharmaḥ svanuṣṭhitaḥ puṁsāṁ
 viṣvaksena-kathāsu yaḥ
notpādayed yadi ratiṁ
 śrama eva hi kevalam

“The occupational activities a man performs according to his own position are only so much useless labor if they do not provoke attraction for the message of the Personality of Godhead.” (Bhāg. 1.2.8) If one is not interested in satisfying Lord Viṣṇu, Vāsudeva, all his so-called auspicious activities are fruitless. Moghāśā mogha-karmāṇo mogha-jñānā vicetasaḥ: because he is bewildered, he is baffled in his hopes, baffled in his activities, and baffled in his knowledge. In this regard, Śrīla Viśvanātha Cakravartī remarks, napuṁsakam anapuṁsakenety-ādinaikatvam. One cannot equate the potent and the impotent. Among modern Māyāvādīs it has become fashionable to say that whatever one does or whatever path one follows is all right. But these are all foolish statements. Here it is forcefully affirmed that this is the only method for success in life. Īśvara-tarpaṇaṁ vinā sarvam eva viphalam. Unless Lord Viṣṇu is satisfied, all of one’s pious activities, ritualistic ceremonies and yajñas are simply for show and have no value. Unfortunately, foolish people do not know the secret of success. Na te viduḥ svārtha-gatiṁ hi viṣṇum. They do not know that real self-interest ends in pleasing Lord Viṣṇu.

200.ldw:
tasmād etad vrataṁ bhadre
 prayatā śraddhayācara
bhagavān parituṣṭas te
 varān āśu vidhāsyati|
200.ldw_fc: tasmāt ; etat ; vratam ; bhadre ; prayatā ; śraddhayā ; ācara ; bhagavān ; parituṣṭaḥ ; te ; varān ; āśu ; vidhāsyati ;
200.words_en_fc: therefore; this; observance of a vrata ceremony; my dear gentle lady; by observing rules and regulations; with faith; execute; the Supreme Personality of Godhead; being very satisfied; unto you; benedictions; very soon; will bestow.;
200.yw_zh: 因此，我亲爱的高贵女士，履行仪式的誓言， 严格遵守规范原则吧。透过这个程序，至尊人格首神会很快对你满意，满足你所有的愿望。
200.yw_en: Therefore, my dear gentle lady, follow this ritualistic vow, strictly observing the regulative principles. By this process, the Supreme Person will very soon be pleased with you and will satisfy all your desires.
200.yz_en: Thus end the Bhaktivedanta purports of the Eighth Canto, Sixteenth Chapter, of the Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam, entitled “Executing the Payo-vrata Process of Worship.”

201.ldw:
śrī-śuka uvāca|ity uktā sāditī rājan
 sva-bhartrā kaśyapena vai
anv atiṣṭhad vratam idaṁ
 dvādaśāham atandritā|
201.ldw_fc: śrī-śukaḥ uvāca ; iti ; uktā ; sā ; aditiḥ ; rājan ; sva-bhartrā ; kaśyapena ; vai ; anu ; atiṣṭhat ; vratam idam ; dvādaśa-aham ; atandritā ;
201.words_en_fc: Śrī Śukadeva Gosvāmī said; thus; being advised; that lady; Aditi; O King; by her husband; Kaśyapa Muni; indeed; similarly; executed; this payo-vrata ritualistic ceremony; for twelve days; without any laziness.;
201.yw_zh: 舒卡戴瓦·哥斯瓦米说:君王啊!阿迪缇得到她丈夫喀夏帕·牟尼的忠告后，严格按他的指示勤奋地执行帕尤一瓦塔仪式。
201.yw_en: Śukadeva Gosvāmī said: O King, after Aditi was thus advised by her husband, Kaśyapa Muni, she strictly followed his instructions without laziness and in this way performed the payo-vrata ritualistic ceremony.
201.yz_zh: 要想在所有的领域取得成功，尤其是灵性生活中取得进步，人必须严格地遵守真正的老师的训示。阿迪缇这样做了。她严格按照她丈夫，也是她灵性导师的教导去做。正如韦达训谕证实，”韦达知识的全部意义，只会自动地揭示给对至尊主和灵性导师绝对有信心的伟大灵魂(yasya deve para bhaktir yatha deve tathagurau)。”人应该对帮助门徒在灵性生活中取得进步的灵性导师充满信心。门徒一旦在不理会灵性导师教导的情况下思考问题，就会在灵性生活中失败(yasyaprasadan na gatih koto 'pi)。阿迪缇很严格地遵守她丈夫兼灵性导师的指示，从而获得了成功。
201.yz_en: For advancement in anything, especially in spiritual life, one must strictly follow the bona fide instructions of the teacher. Aditi did this. She strictly followed the instructions of her husband and guru. As confirmed in the Vedic injunctions, yasya deve parā bhaktir yathā deve tathā gurau. One should have complete faith in the guru, who helps the disciple make progress in spiritual life. As soon as the disciple thinks independently, not caring for the instructions of the spiritual master, he is a failure (yasyāprasādān na gatiḥ kuto ’pi). Aditi very strictly followed the instructions of her husband and spiritual master, and thus she was successful.

201.ldw:
cintayanty ekayā buddhyā
 mahā-puruṣam īśvaram
pragṛhyendriya-duṣṭāśvān
 manasā buddhi-sārathiḥ|manaś caikāgrayā buddhyā
 bhagavaty akhilātmani
vāsudeve samādhāya
 cacāra ha payo-vratam|
201.ldw_fc: cintayanti ; ekayā ; buddhyā ; mahā-puruṣam ; īśvaram ; pragṛhya ; indriya ; duṣṭa ; aśvān ; manasā ; buddhi-sārathiḥ ; manaḥ ; ca ; eka-agrayā ; buddhyā ; bhagavati ; akhila-ātmani ; vāsudeve ; samādhāya ; cacāra ; ha ; payaḥ-vratam ;
201.words_en_fc: constantly thinking; with one attention; and intelligence; upon the Supreme Personality of Godhead; the supreme controller, Lord Viṣṇu; completely controlling; the senses; formidable, powerful; horses; by the mind; with the help of intelligence, the chariot driver; the mind; also; with full attention; with the intelligence; unto the Supreme Personality of Godhead; the Supreme Soul, the Supersoul of all living entities; unto Lord Vāsudeva; keeping full attention; executed; thus; the ritualistic ceremony known as payo-vrata.;
201.yw_zh: 阿迪缇全神贯注地想着至尊人格首神，以此方式完全控制住自己那恰似野马的心和感官。她将注意力完全集中在至尊主华苏戴瓦身上，这样开始执行帕尤一瓦塔仪式。
201.yw_en: With full, undiverted attention, Aditi thought of the Supreme Personality of Godhead and in this way brought under full control her mind and senses, which resembled forceful horses. She concentrated her mind upon the Supreme Lord, Vāsudeva. Thus she performed the ritualistic ceremony known as payo-vrata.
201.yz_zh:
这是奉爱瑜伽(bhakti-yoga)的程序。

“人应该善意地为至尊主奎师那做超然的爱心服务，不想靠功利性活动或哲学思辨获得物质收益。这称为纯粹的奉爱服务。”人应该只全神贯注于华苏戴瓦——奎师那的莲花足(sa vaimanah krsna-padaravindayoh)。这样就能控制住心和感官，全心致力于为至尊主做奉爱服务。奉献者不需要靠练哈塔-瑜伽(hatha-yoga)控制自己的心和感官，为至尊主做纯粹的奉爱服务使心和感官自然而然得到控制。
201.yz_en:
This is the process of bhakti-yoga.

anyābhilāṣitā-śūnyaṁ
 jñāna-karmādy-anāvṛtam
ānukūlyena kṛṣṇānu-
 śīlanaṁ bhaktir uttamā

“One should render transcendental loving service to the Supreme Lord Kṛṣṇa favorably and without desire for material profit or gain through fruitive activities or philosophical speculation. That is called pure devotional service.” One simply has to concentrate upon the lotus feet of Vāsudeva, Kṛṣṇa (sa vai manaḥ kṛṣṇa-padāravindayoḥ). Then the mind and senses will be controlled, and one can engage himself fully in the devotional service of the Lord. The devotee does not need to practice the haṭha-yoga system to control the mind and senses; his mind and senses are automatically controlled because of unalloyed devotional service to the Lord.

201.ldw:
tasyāḥ prādurabhūt tāta
 bhagavān ādi-puruṣaḥ
pīta-vāsāś catur-bāhuḥ
 śaṅkha-cakra-gadā-dharaḥ|

201.words_en_fc: before her; appeared; my dear King; the Supreme Personality of Godhead; the original person; dressed in yellow garments; with four arms; bearing the conchshell, disc, club and lotus flower.;
201.yw_zh: 我亲爱的君王，那之后，至尊人格首神穿着黄色衣衫，四支手中分别持有海螺、飞轮、大头棒和莲花，出现在阿迪缇面前。
201.yw_en: My dear King, the original Supreme Personality of Godhead, dressed in yellow garments and bearing a conchshell, disc, club and lotus in His four hands, then appeared before Aditi.

201.ldw:
taṁ netra-gocaraṁ vīkṣya
 sahasotthāya sādaram
nanāma bhuvi kāyena
 daṇḍavat-prīti-vihvalā|

201.words_en_fc: Him (the Supreme Personality of Godhead); visible by her eyes; after seeing; all of a sudden; getting up; with great respect; offered respectful obeisances; on the ground; by the whole body; falling like a rod; almost puzzled because of transcendental bliss.;
201.yw_zh: 当至尊人格首神变得让阿迪缇的眼睛能看到祂时，阿迪缇完全沈醉在超然的极乐中，以至立刻站起身，随即如一根棍子般扑倒在地，恭敬地向至尊主献上她的顶礼。
201.yw_en: When the Supreme Personality of Godhead became visible to Aditi’s eyes, Aditi was so overwhelmed by transcendental bliss that she at once stood up and then fell to the ground like a rod to offer the Lord her respectful obeisances.

201.ldw:
sotthāya baddhāñjalir īḍituṁ sthitā
 notseha ānanda-jalākulekṣaṇā
babhūva tūṣṇīṁ pulakākulākṛtis
 tad-darśanātyutsava-gātra-vepathuḥ|

201.words_en_fc: she; standing up; with folded hands; to worship the Lord; situated; could not endeavor; from transcendental bliss; with water; her eyes were filled; remained; silent; with standing of the hairs of the body; overwhelmed; her form; by seeing the Lord; with great pleasure; her body; began to tremble.;
201.yw_zh: 阿迪缇双手合十沉默地站着。无法向至尊主献上祈祷。超然的极乐使她泪如泉涌，全身毛发直竖。她因为能面对面地看到至尊人格首神而如痴如醉，浑身颤抖。
201.yw_en: Aditi stood silently with folded hands, unable to offer prayers to the Lord. Because of transcendental bliss, tears filled her eyes, and the hairs on her body stood on end. Because she could see the Supreme Personality of Godhead face to face, she felt ecstasy, and her body trembled.

201.ldw:
prītyā śanair gadgadayā girā hariṁ
 tuṣṭāva sā devy aditiḥ kurūdvaha
udvīkṣatī sā pibatīva cakṣuṣā
 ramā-patiṁ yajña-patiṁ jagat-patim|
201.ldw_fc: prītyā ; śanaiḥ ; gadgadayā ; girā ; harim ; tuṣṭāva ; sā ; devī ; aditiḥ ; kuru-udvaha ; udvīkṣatī ; sā ; pibatī iva ; cakṣuṣā ; ramā-patim ; yajña-patim ; jagat-patim ;
201.words_en_fc: because of love; again and again; faltering; with a voice; unto the Supreme Personality of Godhead; pleased; she; the demigoddess; Aditi; O Mahārāja Parīkṣit; while staring; she; appeared as if she were drinking; through the eyes; unto the Lord, the husband of the goddess of fortune; unto the Lord, the enjoyer of all sacrificial ceremonies; the master and Lord of the entire universe.;
201.yw_zh: 帕瑞克西特王啊!接着，女半神人阿迪缇开始怀着巨大的爱，声音颤抖地向至尊人格首神献上她的祈祷。至尊主是幸运女神的丈夫、一切祭祀典礼的享受者、整个宇宙的至尊主，阿迪缇看上去像是在透过眼睛喝饮至尊主。
201.yw_en: O Mahārāja Parīkṣit, the demigoddess Aditi then began offering her prayers to the Supreme Personality of Godhead in a faltering voice and with great love. She appeared as though drinking through her eyes the Supreme Lord, who is the husband of the goddess of fortune, the enjoyer of all sacrificial ceremonies, and the master and Lord of the entire universe.
201.yz_zh: 在奉行帕尤-瓦塔后，阿迪缇确信至尊主以幸运女神丈夫的形象(Rama-pati)出现在她面前，赐予她的儿子们所有的财富。她在丈夫喀夏帕的指导下做了帕尤-瓦塔祭祀，一直想着至尊主是祭祀的主人(Yajna-pati)。看到整个宇宙的主人及至尊主到她面前来满足她的愿望，她感到心满意足。
201.yz_en: After observing the payo-vrata, Aditi was certain that the Lord had appeared before her as Ramā-pati, the husband of all good fortune, just to offer her sons all opulences. She had performed the yajña of payo-vrata under the direction of her husband, Kaśyapa, and therefore she thought of the Lord as Yajña-pati. She was completely satisfied to see the master and Lord of the entire universe come before her to fulfill her desire.

201.ldw:
śrī-aditir uvāca|yajñeśa yajña-puruṣācyuta tīrtha-pāda
 tīrtha-śravaḥ śravaṇa-maṅgala-nāmadheya
āpanna-loka-vṛjinopaśamodayādya
 śaṁ naḥ kṛdhīśa bhagavann asi dīna-nāthaḥ|
201.ldw_fc: śrī-aditiḥ uvāca ; yajña-īśa ; yajña-puruṣa ; acyuta ; tīrtha-pāda ; tīrtha-śravaḥ ; śravaṇa ; maṅgala ; nāmadheya ; āpanna ; loka ; vṛjina ; upaśama ; udaya ; ādya ; śam ; naḥ ; kṛdhi ; īśa ; bhagavan ; asi ; dīna-nāthaḥ ;
201.words_en_fc: the demigoddess Aditi said; O controller of all sacrificial ceremonies; the person who enjoys the benefits of all sacrifices; infallible; at whose lotus feet stand all the holy places of pilgrimage; celebrated as the ultimate shelter of all saintly persons; hearing about whom; is auspicious; to chant His name is also auspicious; surrendered; of people; dangerous material position; diminishing; who has appeared; the original Personality of Godhead; auspiciousness; our; kindly bestow upon us; O supreme controller; O Lord; You are; the only shelter of the downtrodden.;
201.yw_zh: 女半神人阿迪缇说:啊，一切祭祀典礼的主人和享受者！绝对可靠、最著名的人啊!您的名字在被吟诵、吟唱时传播所有的好运。啊，最初的至尊人格首神、至尊控制者、一切圣地的保护者!您给予所有可怜、受苦的生物体以庇护，您为减轻他们的痛苦而显现。请仁慈地对待我们，赐子我们好运。
201.yw_en: The goddess Aditi said: O master and enjoyer of all sacrificial ceremonies, O infallible and most famous person, whose name, when chanted, spreads all good fortune! O original Supreme Personality of Godhead, supreme controller, shelter of all holy places, You are the shelter of all poor, suffering living entities, and You have appeared to diminish their suffering. Please be kind to us and spread our good fortune.
201.yz_zh: 至尊人格首神是遵守誓言和苦修之人的主人，是他给他们赐福。他从不食言，所以值得奉献者毕生崇拜。正如《博伽梵歌》(Bhagavad-gita) 第9章的第31节诗记载，至尊主说:琨缇的儿子啊!你勇敢地宣布，我的奉献者永不毁灭(kaunteya pratijanihi name bhaktah pranasyati)。这节诗文中称至尊主为阿秋塔(acyuta)——绝对可靠的人，因为他照顾他的奉献者。对奉献者心怀敌意的人必将凭至尊主的仁慈被击败。至尊主是恒河水的源头，因此在此被称为tirtha-pada，以表明所有的圣地都在他的莲花足旁;或着说，他的莲花足所触碰到的地方都成为圣地。例如:《博伽梵歌》以梵文”在圣地库茹柴陀(dharma-ksetre kuru-ksetre)”一句为开始，因为至尊主出现在库茹柴陀战场上，库茹柴陀便成了朝圣之地。正因为如此，极其虔诚的潘达瓦(Pandava)五兄弟得到保证，注定会赢得胜利。至尊人格首神演出娱乐活动的地方，无论是温达文(Vrndavana)还是杜瓦尔卡(Dvaraka)，都变成了圣地。吟诵、吟唱至尊主的圣名，哈瑞-奎师那 哈瑞-奎师那 奎师那-奎师那 哈瑞-哈瑞/哈瑞-茹阿玛 哈瑞-茹阿玛 茹阿玛-茹阿玛 哈瑞-哈瑞(Hare Krsna， Hare Krsna， Krsna Krsna， Hare Hare/ Hare Rama， Hare Rama， Rama Rama， Hare Hare)，不仅令自已的耳朵听了愉快，而且将好运扩展给听到这吟诵、吟唱的听众。至尊人格首神的临在，使阿迪缇完全确信，恶魔给她制造的困境即将终止。
201.yz_en: The Supreme Personality of Godhead is the master of those who observe vows and austerities, and it is He who bestows benedictions upon them. He is worshipable for the devotee throughout the devotee’s life, for He never breaks His promises. As He says in Bhagavad-gītā (9.31), kaunteya pratijānīhi na me bhaktaḥ praṇaśyati: “O son of Kuntī, declare it boldly that My devotee never perishes.” The Lord is addressed here as acyuta, the infallible, because He takes care of His devotees. Anyone inimical to the devotees is certainly vanquished by the mercy of the Lord. The Lord is the source of the Ganges water, and therefore He is addressed here as tīrtha-pāda, indicating that all the holy places are at His lotus feet, or that whatever He touches with His foot becomes a holy place. Bhagavad-gītā, for example, begins with the words dharma-kṣetre kuru-kṣetre. Because the Lord was present on the Battlefield of Kurukṣetra, it became a dharma-kṣetra, a place of pilgrimage. Therefore the Pāṇḍavas, who were extremely religious, were assured of victory. Any place where the Supreme Personality of Godhead displays His pastimes, such as Vṛndāvana or Dvārakā, becomes a holy place. The chanting of the holy name of the Lord — Hare Kṛṣṇa, Hare Kṛṣṇa, Kṛṣṇa Kṛṣṇa, Hare Hare/ Hare Rāma, Hare Rāma, Rāma Rāma, Hare Hare — is pleasing to the ear, and it expands good fortune to the audience who hears it chanted. Owing to the presence of the Supreme Personality of Godhead, Aditi was fully assured that the troublesome condition created for her by the demons would now be ended.

201.ldw:
viśvāya viśva-bhavana-sthiti-saṁyamāya
 svairaṁ gṛhīta-puru-śakti-guṇāya bhūmne
sva-sthāya śaśvad-upabṛṁhita-pūrṇa-bodha-
 vyāpāditātma-tamase haraye namas te|
201.ldw_fc: viśvāya ; viśva ; bhavana ; sthiti ; saṁyamāya ; svairam ; gṛhīta ; puru ; śakti-guṇāya ; bhūmne ; sva-sthāya ; śaśvat ; upabṛṁhita ; pūrṇa ; bodha ; vyāpādita ; ātma-tamase ; haraye ; namaḥ te ;
201.words_en_fc: unto the Supreme Personality of Godhead, who is actually the entire universe; of the universe; creation; maintenance; and annihilation; fully independent; taking in hand; completely; controlling the three modes of material nature; the supreme great; who is always situated in His original form; eternally; achieved; complete; knowledge; completely vanquished; the illusory energy of Your Lordship; unto the Supreme Lord; I offer my respectful obeisances unto You.;
201.yw_zh: 我的至尊主，您是遍布一切的宇宙形象、完全独立的创造者、这个宇宙的维系者和毁灭者。您的知识绝对正确，始终适合所有的情况，因此您虽然安排您的能量处理事情，但自己却总是以原本的形象处之，永不从那种状态坠落。您从不被错觉和假象所迷惑。我的至尊主啊!请让我恭敬地向您献上我的顶礼。
201.yw_en: My Lord, You are the all-pervading universal form, the fully independent creator, maintainer and destroyer of this universe. Although You engage Your energy in matter, You are always situated in Your original form and never fall from that position, for Your knowledge is infallible and always suitable to any situation. You are never bewildered by illusion. O my Lord, let me offer my respectful obeisances unto You.
201.yz_zh:
《永恒的柴坦亚经》(Caitanya-caritamrta)首篇第2章的第117节诗说:

努力变得具有完全的奎师那意识的人，必须知道尽可能地了解至尊主的荣耀。阿迪缇在这节诗文中对这些荣耀稍微提了一点。整个宇宙只不过是至尊主的外在能量的展示而已。对此， 《博伽梵歌》第9章的第4节诗证实，我遍布整个宇宙(maya tamidam sarvam)。就像全宇宙的阳光和热量是太阳的扩展一样，我们在这个宇宙中所看到的一切，都只不过是至尊人格首神能量的一个扩展。人一旦投靠至尊人格首神，就超越错觉能量的影响，因为绝对英明且处在众生心中，尤其是奉献者心中的至尊主，给人以确保自己永不坠入错觉能量的智慧。
201.yz_en:
In the Caitanya-caritāmṛta (Ādi 2.117) it is said:

siddhānta baliyā citte nā kara alasa
 ihā ha-ite kṛṣṇe lāge sudṛḍha mānasa

Anyone trying to become fully Kṛṣṇa conscious must know the Lord’s glories as far as they are possible to understand. Here Aditi hints at these glories. The universe is nothing but the external potency of the Lord. This is confirmed in Bhagavad-gītā (9.4): mayā tatam idaṁ sarvam. Whatever we see in this universe is but an expansion of the potency of the Supreme Personality of Godhead, just as the sunshine and heat all over the universe are expansions of the sun. When one surrenders unto the Supreme Personality of Godhead, he surpasses the influence of the illusory energy, for the Supreme Lord, being fully wise and being situated in the heart of everyone, especially in the heart of the devotee, gives one intelligence by which one is sure never to fall into illusion.

201.ldw:
āyuḥ paraṁ vapur abhīṣṭam atulya-lakṣmīr
 dyo-bhū-rasāḥ sakala-yoga-guṇās tri-vargaḥ
jñānaṁ ca kevalam ananta bhavanti tuṣṭāt
 tvatto nṛṇāṁ kim u sapatna-jayādir āśīḥ|
201.ldw_fc: āyuḥ ; param ; vapuḥ ; abhīṣṭam ; atulya-lakṣmīḥ ; dyo ; bhū ; rasāḥ ; sakala ; yoga-guṇāḥ ; tri-vargaḥ ; jñānam ; ca ; kevalam ; ananta ; bhavanti ; tuṣṭāt ; tvattaḥ ; nṛṇām ; kim u ; sapatna ; jaya ; ādiḥ ; āśīḥ ;
201.words_en_fc: duration of life; as long as that of Lord Brahmā; a particular type of body; the goal of life; unparalleled opulence in material existence; the upper planetary system; Bhūloka; the lower planetary system; all kinds of; the eight mystic perfections; the principles of religiosity, economic development and sense gratification; transcendental knowledge; and; complete; O unlimited one; all become possible; by Your satisfaction; from You; of all living entities; what to speak of; enemies; conquering; and others; such benedictions.;
201.yw_zh: 不受限制的人啊！如果您圣上满意，人就能轻松地得到主布茹阿玛那样长的寿命、上中下星系中的一个躯体、无限的物质财富，就会很容易笃信宗教、发展经济，获得感官满足、超然的知识和八种瑜伽神通，更不要说战胜自己的竞争对手这类微不足道的成就了。
201.yw_en: O unlimited one, if Your Lordship is satisfied, one can very easily obtain a lifetime as long as that of Lord Brahmā, a body either in the upper, lower or middle planetary systems, unlimited material opulence, religion, economic development and satisfaction of the senses, full transcendental knowledge, and the eight yogic perfections, what to speak of such petty achievements as conquering one’s rivals.

201.ldw:
śrī-śuka uvāca|adityaivaṁ stuto rājan
 bhagavān puṣkarekṣaṇaḥ
kṣetra-jñaḥ sarva-bhūtānām
 iti hovāca bhārata|
201.ldw_fc: śrī-śukaḥ uvāca ; adityā ; evam ; stutaḥ ; rājan ; bhagavān ; puṣkara-īkṣaṇaḥ ; kṣetra-jñaḥ ; sarva-bhūtānām ; iti ; ha ; uvāca ; bhārata ;
201.words_en_fc: Śrī Śukadeva Gosvāmī said; by Aditi; thus; being worshiped; O King (Mahārāja Parīkṣit); the Supreme Personality of Godhead; whose eyes are like lotus flowers; the Supersoul; of all living entities; thus; indeed; replied; O best of the Bharata dynasty.;
201.yw_zh: 舒卡戴瓦·哥斯瓦米说:啊，帕瑞克西特王，巴茹阿特王朝中最优秀的人!眼似莲花的至尊主、众生的超灵，这样受到阿迪缇的崇拜后，说了如下一番话作为回答。
201.yw_en: Śukadeva Gosvāmī said: O King Parīkṣit, best of the Bharata dynasty, when the lotus-eyed Lord, the Supersoul of all living entities, was thus worshiped by Aditi, He replied as follows.

201.ldw:
śrī-bhagavān uvāca|deva-mātar bhavatyā me
 vijñātaṁ cira-kāṅkṣitam
yat sapatnair hṛta-śrīṇāṁ
 cyāvitānāṁ sva-dhāmataḥ|
201.ldw_fc: śrī-bhagavān uvāca ; deva-mātaḥ ; bhavatyāḥ ; me ; vijñātam ; cira-kāṅkṣitam ; yat ; sapatnaiḥ ; hṛta-śrīṇām ; cyāvitānām ; sva-dhāmataḥ ;
201.words_en_fc: the Supreme Personality of Godhead said; O mother of the demigods; of you; by Me; understood; what You have desired for a long time; because; by the rivals; of your sons, who are bereft of all opulences; vanquished; from their own residential quarters.;
201.yw_zh: 至尊人格首神说:半神人的母亲啊!我已经明白你为你儿子们的福利所长期怀有的愿望了。他们的敌人剥夺了他们的一切财富，把他们赶出自己的家园。
201.yw_en: The Supreme Personality of Godhead said: O mother of the demigods, I have already understood your long-cherished desires for the welfare of your sons, who have been deprived of all opulences and driven from their residence by their enemies.
201.yz_zh: 处在众生心中，尤其是奉献者心中的至尊人格首神， 始终准备帮助在逆境中的奉献者。他既然知道一切，也必然知道该如何做调整;他做需要做的一切，以解除他奉献者的痛苦。
201.yz_en: The Supreme Personality of Godhead, being situated in everyone’s heart, and especially in the hearts of His devotees, is always ready to help devotees in adversity. Since He knows everything, He knows how things are to be adjusted, and He does the needful to relieve the suffering of His devotee.

201.ldw:
tān vinirjitya samare
 durmadān asurarṣabhān
pratilabdha-jaya-śrībhiḥ
 putrair icchasy upāsitum|
201.ldw_fc: tān ; vinirjitya ; samare ; durmadān ; asura-ṛṣabhān ; pratilabdha ; jaya ; śrībhiḥ ; putraiḥ ; icchasi ; upāsitum ;
201.words_en_fc: them; defeating; in the fight; puffed up by strength; the leaders of the demons; getting back; victory; as well as the opulence; with your sons; you are desiring; to come together and worship Me.;
201.yw_zh: 女神啊！我能明白你想让你的儿子们在打败他们的敌人后返回家园，并在收回他们的住所及财富后与你一起崇拜我。
201.yw_en: O Devī, O goddess, I can understand that you want to regain your sons and be together with them to worship Me, after defeating the enemies in battle and retrieving your abode and opulences.

201.ldw:
indra-jyeṣṭhaiḥ sva-tanayair
 hatānāṁ yudhi vidviṣām
striyo rudantīr āsādya
 draṣṭum icchasi duḥkhitāḥ|

201.words_en_fc: persons of whom King Indra is the eldest; by your own sons; who are killed; in the fight; of the enemies; the wives; lamenting; coming near the dead bodies of their husbands; you want to see; very much aggrieved.;
201.yw_zh: 你想看到当恶魔一一你儿子们的敌人，被以因铎为首的半神人杀死在职场上后，那些恶魔的妻子为她们丈夫的死而悲伤。
201.yw_en: You want to see the wives of the demons lamenting for the death of their husbands when those demons, the enemies of your sons, are killed in battle by the demigods, of whom Indra is the chief.

201.ldw:
ātmajān susamṛddhāṁs tvaṁ
 pratyāhṛta-yaśaḥ-śriyaḥ
nāka-pṛṣṭham adhiṣṭhāya
 krīḍato draṣṭum icchasi|

201.words_en_fc: your own sons; completely opulent; you; having received back; reputation; opulence; in the heavenly kingdom; situated; enjoying their life; to see; you are desiring.;
201.yw_zh: 你要你的儿子们收回他们失去的名誉和财富，像以往一样重新在他们的天堂星球上生活。
201.yw_en: You want your sons to regain their lost reputation and opulence and live again on their heavenly planet as usual.

201.ldw:
prāyo ’dhunā te ’sura-yūtha-nāthā
 apāraṇīyā iti devi me matiḥ
yat te ’nukūleśvara-vipra-guptā
 na vikramas tatra sukhaṁ dadāti|
201.ldw_fc: prāyaḥ ; adhunā ; te ; asura-yūtha-nāthāḥ ; apāraṇīyāḥ ; iti ; devi ; me ; matiḥ ; yat ; te ; anukūla-īśvara-vipra-guptāḥ ; na ; vikramaḥ ; tatra ; sukham ; dadāti ;
201.words_en_fc: almost; at the present moment; all of them; the chiefs of the demons; unconquerable; thus; O mother Aditi; My; opinion; because; all the demons; protected by brāhmaṇas, by whose favor the supreme controller is always present; not; the use of power; there; happiness; can give.;
201.yw_zh: 半神人的母亲啊！依我看，几乎所有的恶魔首领现在都是不可战胜的，因为他们受到至尊主永远喜爱的布茹阿玛纳的保护。所以，现在去运用力量反抗他们，根本就不可能使人快乐。
201.yw_en: O mother of the demigods, in My opinion almost all the chiefs of the demons are now unconquerable, for they are being protected by brāhmaṇas, whom the Supreme Lord always favors. Thus the use of power against them now will not at all be a source of happiness.
201.yz_zh: 没人能打败得到布茹阿玛纳(brahmana)和外士纳瓦(Vaisnava)支持的人。当人得到布茹阿玛纳的支持时，就连至尊人格首神都不干涉和介入。经典中说:至尊主首先倾向于给乳牛和布茹阿玛纳一切祝福(go-brahmana-hitaya ca)。因此，当布茹阿玛纳支持某人时，至尊主不加以干涉，其他人也无法干扰这种人的幸福、快乐。
201.yz_en: When a person is favored by brāhmaṇas and Vaiṣṇavas, no one can defeat him. Even the Supreme Personality of Godhead does not interfere when one is protected by a brāhmaṇa. It is said, go-brāhmaṇa-hitāya ca. The Lord’s first inclination is to give all benedictions to the cows and brāhmaṇas. Therefore if brāhmaṇas favor someone, the Lord does not interfere, nor can anyone interfere with the happiness of such a person.

201.ldw:
athāpy upāyo mama devi cintyaḥ
 santoṣitasya vrata-caryayā te
mamārcanaṁ nārhati gantum anyathā
 śraddhānurūpaṁ phala-hetukatvāt|
201.ldw_fc: atha ; api ; upāyaḥ ; mama ; devi ; cintyaḥ ; santoṣitasya ; vrata-caryayā ; te ; mama arcanam ; na ; arhati ; gantum anyathā ; śraddhā-anurūpam ; phala ; hetukatvāt ;
201.words_en_fc: therefore; in spite of this situation; some means; by Me; O goddess; must be considered; very pleased; observing the vow; by you; worshiping Me; never; deserves; to become otherwise; according to one’s faith and devotion; of the result; from being the cause.;
201.yw_zh: 阿迪缇女神啊!但由于我对你遵守誓言的活动感到满意，我必须找个方法帮助你。这原因是:崇拜我永远都不会徒劳无功，相反必会使人按照自己应得的得到想要的结果
201.yw_en: Yet because I have been satisfied by the activities of your vow, O goddess Aditi, I must find some means to favor you, for worship of Me never goes in vain but certainly gives the desired result according to what one deserves.

201.ldw:
tvayārcitaś cāham apatya-guptaye
 payo-vratenānuguṇaṁ samīḍitaḥ
svāṁśena putratvam upetya te sutān

201.words_en_fc: by you; being worshiped; also; I; giving protection to your sons; by the payo-vrata vow; as far as possible; properly worshiped; by My plenary portion; becoming your son; taking this opportunity; to your other sons; I shall give protection; of Kaśyapa Muni; in the austerity; situated.;
201.yw_zh: 你向我祈祷，并为保护你的儿子们而靠执行非凡的帕尤一瓦塔仪式正确地崇拜了我。考虑到喀夏帕·牟尼的苦修，我应该同意当你的儿子，以此方式保护你其他的儿子们。
201.yw_en: You have prayed to Me and properly worshiped Me by performing the great payo-vrata ceremony for the sake of protecting your sons. Because of Kaśyapa Muni’s austerities, I shall agree to become your son and thus protect your other sons.

201.ldw:
upadhāva patiṁ bhadre
 prajāpatim akalmaṣam
māṁ ca bhāvayatī patyāv
 evaṁ rūpam avasthitam|
201.ldw_fc: upadhāva ; patim ; bhadre ; prajāpatim ; akalmaṣam ; mām ; ca ; bhāvayatī ; patyau ; evam ; rūpam ; avasthitam ;
201.words_en_fc: just go worship; your husband; O gentle woman; who is a Prajāpati; very much purified because of his austerity; Me; as well as; thinking of; within your husband; thus; form; situated there.;
201.yw_zh: 总是想着处在你丈夫喀夏帕体内的我，去崇拜你丈夫，他已经靠苦修净化了自己。
201.yw_en: Always thinking of Me as being situated within the body of your husband, Kaśyapa, go worship your husband, who has been purified by his austerity.

201.ldw:
naitat parasmā ākhyeyaṁ
 pṛṣṭayāpi kathañcana
sarvaṁ sampadyate devi
 deva-guhyaṁ susaṁvṛtam|
201.ldw_fc: na ; etat ; parasmai ; ākhyeyam ; pṛṣṭayā api ; kathañcana ; sarvam ; sampadyate ; devi ; deva-guhyam ; su-saṁvṛtam ;
201.words_en_fc: not; this; to outsiders; is to be disclosed; even though questioned; by anyone; everything; becomes successful; O lady; very confidential even to the demigods; very carefully kept confidential.;
201.yw_zh: 女士啊!哪怕有人问起，你也不要向任何人透露真相。如果保守这个秘密，那很机密的事情就会获得成功。
201.yw_en: O lady, even if someone inquires, you should not disclose this fact to anyone. That which is very confidential is successful if kept secret.

201.ldw:
śrī-śuka uvāca|etāvad uktvā bhagavāṁs
 tatraivāntaradhīyata
aditir durlabhaṁ labdhvā
 harer janmātmani prabhoḥ
