201.ldw_fc: śrī-śukaḥ uvāca ; etāvat ; uktvā ; bhagavān ; tatra eva ; antaḥ-adhīyata ; aditiḥ ; durlabham ; labdhvā ; hareḥ ; janma ; ātmani ; prabhoḥ ; upādhāvat ; patim ; bhaktyā ; parayā ; kṛta-kṛtya-vat ;
201.words_en_fc: Śrī Śukadeva Gosvāmī said; in this way; saying (to her); the Supreme Personality of Godhead; in that very spot; disappeared; Aditi; a very rare achievement; getting; of the Supreme Personality of Godhead; birth; in herself; of the Lord; immediately went; unto her husband; with devotion; great; thinking herself very successful.;
201.yw_zh: 舒卡戴瓦·哥斯瓦米说:说完这番话后，至尊人格首神就当场消失了。阿迪缇在得到”至尊主将要显现为她儿子”的极其珍贵的赐福后，认为自己获得了十分圆满的结果，于是怀着巨大的爱去接近她丈夫。
201.yw_en: Śukadeva Gosvāmī said: After speaking in this way, the Supreme Personality of Godhead disappeared from that very spot. Aditi, having received the extremely valuable benediction that the Lord would appear as her son, considered herself very successful, and with great devotion she approached her husband.

201.ldw:
sa vai samādhi-yogena
 kaśyapas tad abudhyata
praviṣṭam ātmani harer
 aṁśaṁ hy avitathekṣaṇaḥ|
201.ldw_fc: saḥ ; vai ; samādhi-yogena ; kaśyapaḥ ; tat ; abudhyata ; praviṣṭam ; ātmani ; hareḥ ; aṁśam ; hi ; avitatha-īkṣaṇaḥ ;
201.words_en_fc: Kaśyapa Muni; indeed; by mystic meditation; Kaśyapa Muni; then; could understand; entered; within himself; of the Supreme Lord; a plenary portion; indeed; whose vision is never mistaken.;
201.yw_zh: 看事情永无错误的喀夏帕·牟尼，因为处在冥想的全神贯注状态中，所以能看到至尊人格首神的完整扩展进入了自己的体内。
201.yw_en: Being situated in a meditational trance, Kaśyapa Muni, whose vision is never mistaken, could see that a plenary portion of the Supreme Personality of Godhead had entered within him.

201.ldw:
so ’dityāṁ vīryam ādhatta
 tapasā cira-sambhṛtam
samāhita-manā rājan
 dāruṇy agniṁ yathānilaḥ|
201.ldw_fc: saḥ ; adityām ; vīryam ; ādhatta ; tapasā ; cira-sambhṛtam ; samāhita-manāḥ ; rājan ; dāruṇi ; agnim ; yathā ; anilaḥ ;
201.words_en_fc: Kaśyapa; unto Aditi; semen; placed; by austerity; restrained for long, long years; being fully in trance upon the Supreme Personality of Godhead; O King; as in firewood; fire; as; wind.;
201.yw_zh: 君王啊!恰似风吹导致两片木柴彼此摩擦，从而燃起火焰，总是处在全神贯注于至尊人格首神的超然状态中的喀夏帕·牟尼，将他的力量转入阿迪缇的子宫中。
201.yw_en: O King, as the wind promotes friction between two pieces of wood and thus gives rise to fire, Kaśyapa Muni, whose transcendental position was fully absorbed in the Supreme Personality of Godhead, transferred his potency into the womb of Aditi.
201.yz_zh:
两片木柴相互摩擦，再加上风的吹拂，就会引起森林大火。但事实上，火既不是木柴也不是风;它永远不同于这两者。同样，从这节诗文可以明白，喀夏帕•牟尼与阿迪缇的结合，并非普通人的性交媾。至尊人格首神与人通过交媾产生的分泌物无关。他永远完全远离这种物质结合。

《博伽梵歌》第9章的第29节诗记载，至尊主说:”我平等对待众生(samo 'ham sarva-bhutesu)。”尽管如此，为了保护奉献者，消灭作为打扰因素的恶魔，至尊主进入阿迪缇的子宫。因此，这是至尊主超然的娱乐活动。我们不该误解这样的活动，不该以为至尊主像个普通孩子一样，是因男人和女人交媾而诞生成为阿迪缇之子的。

在此，我们认为应该解释一下如今人们正在争论的”生命起源”问题。生物——灵魂的生命力，不同于人类的卵子和精子。受制约的灵魂虽然与男人和女人的生殖细胞无关，但却因为自己从事过的活动而被置于适当的处境中(karmana daiva-netrena)。然而，生命并非两种分泌物结合的产物，而是独立于所有的物质元素。正如《博伽梵歌》中完整地描述说:生物不受制于物质的相互作用，火烧不毁，锐利的武器砍不碎，水浸不湿，空气吹不干。

灵魂完全不同于物质元素，而是透过更高力量的安排被置于这些物质元素中。灵魂与物质始终是分开的(asango hy ayam puru-sah)，但因为被置于物质处境中而受物质自然属性相互作用的苦。《博伽梵歌》第13章的第22节诗:

“物质自然中的生物就这样生活，享受自然的三种属性。这是他与物质自然接触的缘故。他就这样在不同的物种中遭遇善恶。”生物与物质元素虽然是分开的，但却被置于物质处境中， 因此必须受物质活动的反作用之苦。
201.yz_en:
A forest fire begins when two pieces of wood rub against one another, being agitated by the wind. Actually, however, fire belongs neither to the wood nor to the wind; it is always different from both. Similarly, here it is to be understood that the union of Kaśyapa Muni and Aditi was not like the sexual intercourse of ordinary human beings. The Supreme Personality of Godhead has nothing to do with the human secretions of sexual intercourse. He is always completely aloof from such material combinations.

The Lord says in Bhagavad-gītā (9.29), samo ’haṁ sarva-bhūteṣu: “I am equal toward all living entities.” Nonetheless, to protect the devotees and kill the demons, who were a disturbing element, the Lord entered the womb of Aditi. Therefore this is a transcendental pastime of the Lord. This should not be misunderstood. One should not think that the Lord became the son of Aditi the way an ordinary child is born because of sexual intercourse between man and woman.

Here it may also be appropriate to explain, in these days of controversy, the origin of life. The life force of the living entity — the soul — is different from the ovum and semen of the human being. Although the conditioned soul has nothing to do with the reproductive cells of man and woman, he is placed into the proper situation because of his work (karmaṇā daiva-netreṇa). Life is not, however, a product of two secretions, but is independent of all material elements. As fully described in Bhagavad-gītā, the living entity is not subject to any material reactions. He can neither be burnt by fire, cut by sharp weapons, moistened by water, nor dried by the air. He is completely different from the physical elements, but by a superior arrangement he is put into these material elements. He is always aloof from material contact (asaṅgo hy ayaṁ puruṣaḥ) but because he is placed in a material condition, he suffers the reactions of the material modes of nature.

puruṣaḥ prakṛti-stho hi
 bhuṅkte prakṛtijān guṇān
kāraṇaṁ guṇa-saṅgo ’sya
 sad-asad-yoni-janmasu

“The living entity in material nature thus follows the ways of life, enjoying the three modes of nature. This is due to his association with that material nature. Thus he meets with good and evil amongst various species.” (Bg. 13.22) Although the living entity is aloof from the material elements, he is put into material conditions, and thus he must suffer the reactions of material activities.

201.ldw:
aditer dhiṣṭhitaṁ garbhaṁ
 bhagavantaṁ sanātanam
hiraṇyagarbho vijñāya
 samīḍe guhya-nāmabhiḥ|
201.ldw_fc: aditeḥ ; dhiṣṭhitam ; garbham ; bhagavantam ; sanātanam ; hiraṇyagarbhaḥ ; vijñāya ; samīḍe ; guhya-nāmabhiḥ ;
201.words_en_fc: into the womb of Aditi; being established; pregnancy; unto the Supreme Personality of Godhead; who is eternal; Lord Brahmā; knowing this; offered prayers; with transcendental names.;
201.yw_zh: 主布茹阿玛明白至尊人格首神现在已进入阿迪缇的子宫时，开口吟诵至尊主的超然名字，以此向至尊主献上祈祷。
201.yw_en: When Lord Brahmā understood that the Supreme Personality of Godhead was now within the womb of Aditi, he began to offer prayers to the Lord by reciting transcendental names.
201.yz_zh: 至尊人格首神无所不在(andantara-stha-paramanu-cayanta-ra-stham)。因此，人一旦吟诵、吟唱至尊人格首神超然的名字，哈瑞-奎师那 哈瑞-奎师那 奎师那-奎师那 哈瑞-哈瑞/哈瑞-茹阿玛 哈瑞-茹阿玛 茹阿玛-茹阿玛 哈瑞-哈瑞，他就自然被这种集体歌唱神的圣名(sankirtana)活动所取悦。至尊人格首神无所不在，从没有不在的时候。当奉献者发出超然圣名的声音震荡时，那声音不是物质的声音。因此，至尊人格首神自然就会感到高兴。奉献者知道至尊主无所不在，仅仅靠吟诵、吟唱他的圣名就可以取悦他。
201.yz_en: The Supreme Personality of Godhead exists everywhere (aṇḍāntara-stha-paramāṇu-cayāntara-stham). Therefore when one chants His transcendental names — Hare Kṛṣṇa, Hare Kṛṣṇa, Kṛṣṇa Kṛṣṇa, Hare Hare/ Hare Rāma, Hare Rāma, Rāma Rāma, Hare Hare — the Supreme Personality of Godhead is automatically pleased by such saṅkīrtana. It is not that the Supreme Personality of Godhead is absent; He is present there. And when a devotee utters the transcendental name, it is not a material sound. Therefore, the Supreme Personality of Godhead is naturally pleased. A devotee knows that the Lord is present everywhere and that one can please Him simply by chanting His holy name.

201.ldw:
śrī-brahmovāca|jayorugāya bhagavann
 urukrama namo ’stu te
namo brahmaṇya-devāya
 tri-guṇāya namo namaḥ|
201.ldw_fc: śrī-brahmā uvāca ; jaya ; urugāya ; bhagavan ; urukrama ; namaḥ astu te ; namaḥ ; brahmaṇya-devāya ; tri-guṇāya ; namaḥ namaḥ ;
201.words_en_fc: Lord Brahmā offered prayers; all glories; unto the Lord, who is constantly glorified; O my Lord; whose activities are very glorious; I offer my respectful obeisances unto You; my respectful obeisances; unto the Lord of the transcendentalists; the controller of the three modes of nature; I offer my respectful obeisances unto You again and again.;
201.yw_zh: 主布茹阿玛说:至尊人格首神啊!一切荣耀归于您，您受到全体生物的赞美，您的活动皆属非凡。啊，超然主义者的至尊主，物质自然三种属性的控制者!我向您致以虔敬的顶礼。我一次又一次恭恭敬敬地顶拜您。
201.yw_en: Lord Brahmā said: O Supreme Personality of Godhead, all glories unto You, who are glorified by all and whose activities are all uncommon. I offer my respectful obeisances unto You, O Lord of the transcendentalists, controller of the three modes of nature. I offer my respectful obeisances unto You again and again.

201.ldw:
namas te pṛśni-garbhāya
 veda-garbhāya vedhase
tri-nābhāya tri-pṛṣṭhāya
 śipi-viṣṭāya viṣṇave|
201.ldw_fc: namaḥ te ; pṛśni-garbhāya ; veda-garbhāya ; vedhase ; tri-nābhāya ; tri-pṛṣṭhāya ; śipi-viṣṭāya ; viṣṇave ;
201.words_en_fc: I offer my respectful obeisances unto You; who formerly lived within the womb of Pṛśni (Aditi in her previous birth); who always remain within Vedic knowledge; who are full of knowledge; within the stem growing from whose navel live all the three worlds; who are transcendental to the three worlds; who are within the cores of the hearts of all living entities; unto the all-pervading Supreme Personality of Godhead.;
201.yw_zh: 无所不在的主维施努，您进入众生的心中，我向您献上我虔敬的顶礼。所有的三个世界都存在于您的肚脐。但您却在三个世界之上。您以前曾显现为菩瑞施妮的儿子。我向您一一只有透过韦达知识才能了解的至尊创造者， 献上我恭敬的顶礼。
201.yw_en: I offer my respectful obeisances unto You, the all-pervading Lord Viṣṇu, who have entered the cores of the hearts of all living entities. All the three worlds reside within Your navel, yet You are above the three worlds. Formerly You appeared as the son of Pṛśni. To You, the supreme creator, who are understood only through Vedic knowledge, I offer my respectful obeisances.

201.ldw:
tvam ādir anto bhuvanasya madhyam
 ananta-śaktiṁ puruṣaṁ yam āhuḥ
kālo bhavān ākṣipatīśa viśvaṁ
 sroto yathāntaḥ patitaṁ gabhīram|
201.ldw_fc: tvam ; ādiḥ ; antaḥ ; bhuvanasya ; madhyam ; ananta-śaktim ; puruṣam ; yam ; āhuḥ ; kālaḥ ; bhavān ; ākṣipati ; īśa ; viśvam ; srotaḥ ; yathā ; antaḥ patitam ; gabhīram ;
201.words_en_fc: Your Lordship; the original cause; the cause of dissolution; of the universe; maintenance of the present manifestation; the reservoir of unlimited potencies; the Supreme Person; whom; they say; the principle of eternal time; Your Lordship; attracting; the Supreme Lord; the whole universe; waves; as; fallen within the water; very deep.;
201.yw_zh: 我的至尊主啊!您是三个世界的开始、展现和最终的毁灭。您以无限力量的宝库、至尊人闻名于韦达经中。 我的至尊主啊!正如波涛吸引落入深水的枝叶，您一一至尊永恒的时间因素，吸引这个宇宙中的一切。
201.yw_en: O my Lord, You are the beginning, the manifestation and the ultimate dissolution of the three worlds, and You are celebrated in the Vedas as the reservoir of unlimited potencies, the Supreme Person. O my Lord, as waves attract branches and leaves that have fallen into deep water, You, the supreme eternal time factor, attract everything in this universe.
201.yz_zh: 时间因素有时被描述为是时间的波涛(kala-strota)。这个物质世界里的一切都在时间因素的影响下，随着代表至尊人格首神的时间波浪起伏、漂流。
201.yz_en: The time factor is sometimes described as kāla-srota, waves of time. Everything in this material world is within the time factor and is being carried away by waves of attraction, which represent the Supreme Personality of Godhead.

201.ldw:
tvaṁ vai prajānāṁ sthira-jaṅgamānāṁ
 prajāpatīnām asi sambhaviṣṇuḥ
divaukasāṁ deva divaś cyutānāṁ
 parāyaṇaṁ naur iva majjato ’psu|
201.ldw_fc: tvam ; vai ; prajānām ; sthira-jaṅgamānām ; prajāpatīnām ; asi ; sambhaviṣṇuḥ ; diva-okasām ; deva ; divaḥ cyutānām ; parāyaṇam ; nauḥ ; iva ; majjataḥ ; apsu ;
201.words_en_fc: Your Lordship; indeed; of all living entities; either stationary or moving; of all the Prajāpatis; You are; the generator of everyone; of the inhabitants of the upper planetary system; O Supreme Lord; of the demigods, who have now fallen from their residential quarters; the supreme shelter; boat; like; of one drowning; in the water.;
201.yw_zh: 我的至尊主，您是最初生出动与不动的众生的人，您也是生出生物体祖先的人。我的至尊主啊!正如一条船是溺水之人唯一的希望，您是半神人们唯一的庇护者;他们现在失去了他们的天堂地位。
201.yw_en: My Lord, You are the original generator of all living entities, stationary or moving, and You are also the generator of the Prajāpatis. O my Lord, as a boat is the only hope for a person drowning in the water, You are the only shelter for the demigods, who are now bereft of their heavenly position.
201.yz_en: Thus end the Bhaktivedanta purports of the Eighth Canto, Seventeenth Chapter, of the Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam, entitled “The Supreme Lord Agrees to Become Aditi’s Son.”

202.ldw:
śrī-śuka uvāca|itthaṁ viriñca-stuta-karma-vīryaḥ
 prādurbabhūvāmṛta-bhūr adityām
catur-bhujaḥ śaṅkha-gadābja-cakraḥ
 piśaṅga-vāsā nalināyatekṣaṇaḥ|
202.ldw_fc: śrī-śukaḥ uvāca ; ittham ; viriñca-stuta-karma-vīryaḥ ; prādurbabhūva ; amṛta-bhūḥ ; adityām ; catuḥ-bhujaḥ ; śaṅkha-gadā-abja-cakraḥ ; piśaṅga-vāsāḥ ; nalina-āyata-īkṣaṇaḥ ;
202.words_en_fc: Śrī Śukadeva Gosvāmī said; in this way; the Personality of Godhead, whose activities and prowess are always praised by Lord Brahmā; became manifested; whose appearance is always deathless; from the womb of Aditi; having four arms; decorated with conchshell, club, lotus and disc; dressed in yellow garments; having blooming eyes like the petals of a lotus.;
202.yw_zh: 舒卡戴瓦·哥斯瓦米说:主布茹阿玛这样赞美至尊主的活动和非凡能力后，永远不会像普通生物那样受死亡控制的至尊人格首神，便从阿迪缇的子宫中显现出来。祂的四只手分别持有海螺、大头棒、莲花和飞轮作装饰，祂穿着黄色的衣衫，祂的眼睛恰似盛开莲花的花瓣。
202.yw_en: Śukadeva Gosvāmī said: After Lord Brahmā had thus spoken, glorifying the Supreme Lord’s activities and prowess, the Supreme Personality of Godhead, who is never subject to death like an ordinary living being, appeared from the womb of Aditi. His four hands were decorated with a conchshell, club, lotus and disc, He was dressed in yellow garments, and His eyes appeared like the petals of a blooming lotus.
202.yz_zh: 这节诗中的”显现后永存不朽的人(amrta-bhuh)”一句十分重要。至尊主有时像普通孩子诞生一样显现，但这并不意味着他是出生、死亡或老年控制的对象。人必须十分明智地了解至尊主众多化身的显现和从事的活动。对此，《博伽梵歌》第4章的第9节诗证实说:谁能了解我显现和活动的超然本质，谁就在离开躯体后到达我永恒的住所，不再投生于这个物质世界(janma kar-ma ca me divyam evam yo vetti tattvatah)。人应该努力了解，至尊主的显现、隐迹和活动都是超然的(divyam)。至尊主与物质活动毫无关系。了解至尊主显现、隐迹和活动之实质的人立刻获得解脱，在放弃现有的这个躯体后不再接受物质躯体，而是被转到灵性世界去(tyaktva deham punar janma naiti mam eti so 'rjuna)。
202.yz_en: The word amṛta-bhūḥ is significant in this verse. The Lord sometimes appears like an ordinary child taking birth, but this does not mean that He is subject to birth, death or old age. One must be very intelligent to understand the appearance and activities of the Supreme Lord in His incarnations. This is confirmed in Bhagavad-gītā (4.9): janma karma ca me divyam evaṁ yo vetti tattvataḥ. One should try to understand that the Lord’s appearance and disappearance and His activities are all divyam, or transcendental. The Lord has nothing to do with material activities. One who understands the appearance, disappearance and activities of the Lord is immediately liberated. After giving up his body, he never again has to accept a material body, but is transferred to the spiritual world (tyaktvā dehaṁ punar janma naiti mām eti so ’rjuna).

202.ldw:
śyāmāvadāto jhaṣa-rāja-kuṇḍala-
 tviṣollasac-chrī-vadanāmbujaḥ pumān
śrīvatsa-vakṣā balayāṅgadollasat-
 kirīṭa-kāñcī-guṇa-cāru-nūpuraḥ|
202.ldw_fc: śyāma-avadātaḥ ; jhaṣa-rāja-kuṇḍala ; tviṣā ; ullasat ; śrī-vadana-ambujaḥ ; pumān ; śrīvatsa-vakṣāḥ ; balaya ; aṅgada ; ullasat ; kirīṭa ; kāñcī ; guṇa ; cāru ; nūpuraḥ ;
202.words_en_fc: whose body is blackish and free from inebriety; of the two earrings, made in the shape of sharks; by the luster; dazzling; having a beautiful lotus face; the Supreme Person; with the mark of Śrīvatsa on His bosom; bracelets; arm bands; dazzling; helmet; belt; sacred thread; beautiful; ankle bells.;
202.yw_zh: 至尊人格首神肤色微黑的身体，免于一切种类的缺陷。祂那用鲨鱼形耳坠衬托着的蓬花脸，显得十分俊美; 他胸膛上有施瑞瓦特萨标志。祂佩戡着手镯、臂镯、头盔、腰带，以及斜跨在胸膛的一条圣线和莲花足上作装饰的足铃。
202.yw_en: The body of the Supreme Personality of Godhead, blackish in complexion, was free from all inebrieties. His lotus face, decorated with earrings resembling sharks, appeared very beautiful, and on His bosom was the mark of Śrīvatsa. He wore bangles on His wrists, armlets on His arms, a helmet on His head, a belt on His waist, a sacred thread across His chest, and ankle bells decorating His lotus feet.

202.ldw:
madhu-vrata-vrāta-vighuṣṭayā svayā
 virājitaḥ śrī-vanamālayā hariḥ
prajāpater veśma-tamaḥ svarociṣā
 vināśayan kaṇṭha-niviṣṭa-kaustubhaḥ|
202.ldw_fc: madhu-vrata ; vrāta ; vighuṣṭayā ; svayā ; virājitaḥ ; śrī ; vana-mālayā ; hariḥ ; prajāpateḥ ; veśma-tamaḥ ; sva-rociṣā ; vināśayan ; kaṇṭha ; niviṣṭa ; kaustubhaḥ ;
202.words_en_fc: of bees always hankering for honey; with a bunch; resounding; uncommon; situated; beautiful; with a flower garland; the Supreme Lord; of Kaśyapa Muni, the Prajāpati; the darkness of the house; by His own effulgence; vanquishing; on the neck; worn; the Kaustubha gem.;
202.yw_zh: 祂胸膛上用一条美丽无比的鲜花花环作装饰;鲜花芳香无比，招来一大群鸣鸣叫着的蜜蜂围着花环。当这位颈部佩戴考斯图巴宝石的至尊主显现时，祂放射的光芒驱散了生物体祖先喀夏帕家中的黑暗。
202.yw_en: An uncommonly beautiful garland of flowers decorated His bosom, and because the flowers were extremely fragrant, a large group of bees, making their natural humming sounds, invaded them for honey. When the Lord appeared, wearing the Kaustubha gem on His neck, His effulgence vanquished the darkness in the home of the Prajāpati Kaśyapa.

202.ldw:
diśaḥ praseduḥ salilāśayās tadā
 prajāḥ prahṛṣṭā ṛtavo guṇānvitāḥ
dyaur antarīkṣaṁ kṣitir agni-jihvā
 gāvo dvijāḥ sañjahṛṣur nagāś ca|
202.ldw_fc: diśaḥ ; praseduḥ ; salila ; āśayāḥ ; tadā ; prajāḥ ; prahṛṣṭāḥ ; ṛtavaḥ ; guṇa-anvitāḥ ; dyauḥ ; antarīkṣam ; kṣitiḥ ; agni-jihvāḥ ; gāvaḥ ; dvijāḥ ; sañjahṛṣuḥ ; nagāḥ ca ;
202.words_en_fc: all directions; became happy; of water; the reservoirs; at that time; all living entities; very happy; the seasons; full of their respective qualities; the upper planetary system; outer space; the surface of the earth; the demigods; the cows; the brāhmaṇas; all became happy; and the mountains.;
202.yw_zh: 那时，四面八方及河流、海洋等水体，以及众生的，心中，都洋溢着快乐。各种季节同时展现他们各自的特征，在高等星球、太空中和地球表面的众生都喜气洋洋。半神人、乳牛、布茹阿玛纳、丘陵和山脉，都沈浸在欢乐中。
202.yw_en: At that time, there was happiness in all directions, in the reservoirs of water like the rivers and oceans, and in the core of everyone’s heart. The various seasons displayed their respective qualities, and all living entities in the upper planetary system, in outer space and on the surface of the earth were jubilant. The demigods, the cows, the brāhmaṇas and the hills and mountains were all filled with joy.

202.ldw:
śroṇāyāṁ śravaṇa-dvādaśyāṁ
 muhūrte ’bhijiti prabhuḥ
sarve nakṣatra-tārādyāś
 cakrus taj-janma dakṣiṇam|
202.ldw_fc: śroṇāyām ; śravaṇa-dvādaśyām ; muhūrte ; abhijiti ; prabhuḥ ; sarve ; nakṣatra ; tārā ; ādyāḥ ; cakruḥ ; tat-janma ; dakṣiṇam ;
202.words_en_fc: when the moon was situated in the Śravaṇa lunar mansion; on the twelfth lunar day of the bright fortnight in the month of Bhādra, the day famous as the Śravaṇa-dvādaśī; in the auspicious moment; in the first portion of the Śravaṇa lunar mansion known as the Abhijit-nakṣatra and in the Abhijit-muhūrta (occurring at midday); the Lord; all; stars; planets; beginning with the sun and followed by the other planets; made; the birthday of the Lord; very munificent.;
202.yw_zh: 在刷瓦纳一德瓦达西那一天(巴铎月中月渐明的两个星期中的第十二天)，当月亮在刷瓦纳月宫中的被称为阿碧吉特的吉祥时刻，至尊主显现在这个宇宙中。考虑到至尊主的显现极为吉祥，从太阳到土星一一所有的恒星和行星， 都慷慨地施展宽厚、仁慈的影响。
202.yw_en: On the day of Śravaṇa-dvādaśī [the twelfth day of the bright fortnight in the month of Bhādra], when the moon came into the lunar mansion Śravaṇa, at the auspicious moment of Abhijit, the Lord appeared in this universe. Considering the Lord’s appearance very auspicious, all the stars and planets, from the sun to Saturn, were munificently charitable.
202.yz_zh: 就梵文naksatra-taradyah一句，占星学专家圣维施瓦纳特•查夸瓦尔提•塔库尔(Visvanatha Cakravarti Thakura)给予解释说:梵文naksatra一词的意思是”天体”，tara在这个上下文中是指”行星”，而adyah的意思是”特别提到的第一个”。在行星当中，数第一的是太阳苏尔亚(Suya)，而不是月亮。因此，韦达文献的描述不同于现代天文学家所提出的”月亮离地球最近”的理论。全世界的人依时间的前后顺序将一个星期的每一天排列为星期天、星期一、星期二、星期三、星期四、星期五和星期六，而这正符合韦达占星学和天文学中的星球排列顺序。除此之外，按照占星学计算，当至尊主显现时，行星与恒星所处的位置都十分吉祥，以庆祝至尊主的显现。
202.yz_en: Śrīla Viśvanātha Cakravartī Ṭhākura, an expert astrologer, explains the word nakṣatra-tārādyāḥ. The word nakṣatra means “the stars,” the word tāra in this context refers to the planets, and ādyāḥ means “the first one specifically mentioned.” Among the planets, the first is Sūrya, the sun, not the moon. Therefore, according to the Vedic version, the modern astronomer’s proposition that the moon is nearest to the earth should not be accepted. The chronological order in which people all over the world refer to the days of the week — Sunday, Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday and Saturday — corresponds to the Vedic order of the planets and thus circumstantiates the Vedic version. Apart from this, when the Lord appeared the planets and stars became situated very auspiciously, according to astrological calculations, to celebrate the birth of the Lord.

202.ldw:
dvādaśyāṁ savitātiṣṭhan
 madhyandina-gato nṛpa
vijayā-nāma sā proktā
 yasyāṁ janma vidur hareḥ|
202.ldw_fc: dvādaśyām ; savitā ; atiṣṭhat ; madhyam-dina-gataḥ ; nṛpa ; vijayā-nāma ; sā ; proktā ; yasyām ; janma ; viduḥ ; hareḥ ;
202.words_en_fc: on the twelfth day of the moon; the sun; was staying; on the meridian; O King; by the name Vijayā; that day; is called; on which; the appearance; they know; of Lord Hari.;
202.yw_zh: 君王啊！就如每一个博学的学者所了解的，当至尊主在月明的第十二天德瓦达西显现时，太阳正运行在子午线上。这个德瓦达西被称为维佳亚。
202.yw_en: O King, when the Lord appeared — on dvādaśī, the twelfth day of the moon — the sun was at the meridian, as every learned scholar knows. This dvādaśī is called Vijayā.

202.ldw:
śaṅkha-dundubhayo nedur
 mṛdaṅga-paṇavānakāḥ
citra-vāditra-tūryāṇāṁ
 nirghoṣas tumulo ’bhavat|
202.ldw_fc: śaṅkha ; dundubhayaḥ ; neduḥ ; mṛdaṅga ; paṇava-ānakāḥ ; citra ; vāditra ; tūryāṇām ; nirghoṣaḥ ; tumulaḥ ; abhavat ;
202.words_en_fc: conchshells; kettledrums; vibrated; drums; drums named paṇavas and ānakas; various; of these vibrations of musical sound; and of other instruments; the loud sound; tumultuous; became.;
202.yw_zh: 海螺、定音鼓、帕纳瓦和阿纳卡鼓齐奏。这些声音及其它各种乐器发出的声音响成一片。
202.yw_en: Conchshells, kettledrums, drums, paṇavas and ānakas vibrated in concert. The sound of these and various other instruments was tumultuous.

202.ldw:
prītāś cāpsaraso ’nṛtyan
 gandharva-pravarā jaguḥ
tuṣṭuvur munayo devā
 manavaḥ pitaro ’gnayaḥ|
202.ldw_fc: prītāḥ ; ca ; apsarasaḥ ; anṛtyan ; gandharva-pravarāḥ ; jaguḥ ; tuṣṭuvuḥ ; munayaḥ ; devāḥ ; manavaḥ ; pitaraḥ ; agnayaḥ ;
202.words_en_fc: being very pleased; also; the celestial dancing girls; danced; the best of the Gandharvas; sang; satisfied the Lord by offering prayers; the great sages; the demigods; the Manus; the inhabitants of Pitṛloka; the fire-gods.;
202.yw_zh: 由于十分欢喜，天堂舞女们欢腾起舞;最优秀的歌仙们放声高歌;伟大的圣人、丰神人、玛努、祖先和火神们都为取悦至尊主而献上祈祷。
202.yw_en: Being very pleased, the celestial dancing girls [Apsarās] danced in jubilation, the best of the Gandharvas sang songs, and the great sages, demigods, Manus, Pitās and fire-gods offered prayers to satisfy the Lord.

202.ldw:
siddha-vidyādhara-gaṇāḥ
 sakimpuruṣa-kinnarāḥ
cāraṇā yakṣa-rakṣāṁsi
 suparṇā bhujagottamāḥ|gāyanto ’tipraśaṁsanto
 nṛtyanto vibudhānugāḥ
adityā āśrama-padaṁ
 kusumaiḥ samavākiran|
202.ldw_fc: siddha ; vidyādhara-gaṇāḥ ; sa ; kimpuruṣa ; kinnarāḥ ; cāraṇāḥ ; yakṣa ; rakṣāṁsi ; suparṇāḥ ; bhujaga-uttamāḥ ; gāyantaḥ ; ati-praśaṁsantaḥ ; nṛtyantaḥ ; vibudha-anugāḥ ; adityāḥ ; āśrama-padam ; kusumaiḥ ; samavākiran ;
202.words_en_fc: the inhabitants of Siddhaloka; the inhabitants of Vidyādhara-loka; with; the inhabitants of Kimpuruṣa-loka; the inhabitants of Kinnaraloka; the inhabitants of Cāraṇaloka; the Yakṣas; the Rākṣasas; the Suparṇas; the best of the inhabitants of the serpent loka; glorifying the Lord; praising the Lord; dancing; the followers of the demigods; of Aditi; the place of residence; by flowers; covered.;
202.yw_zh: 神秘仙、维迪亚达尔、克音普茹沙、克音纳尔、查冉纳、夜叉、食人魔、稣帕尔纳、最杰出的巨蛇及半神人的随从们，一边赞美至尊主、跳舞，一边纷纷向阿迪缇的住所抛撒鲜花。鲜花覆盖了整座房子。
202.yw_en: The Siddhas, Vidyādharas, Kimpuruṣas, Kinnaras, Cāraṇas, Yakṣas, Rākṣasas, Suparṇas, the best of serpents, and the followers of the demigods all showered flowers on Aditi’s residence, covering the entire house, while glorifying and praising the Lord and dancing.

202.ldw:
dṛṣṭvāditis taṁ nija-garbha-sambhavaṁ
 paraṁ pumāṁsaṁ mudam āpa vismitā
gṛhīta-dehaṁ nija-yoga-māyayā
 prajāpatiś cāha jayeti vismitaḥ|
202.ldw_fc: dṛṣṭvā ; aditiḥ ; tam ; nija-garbha-sambhavam ; param ; pumāṁsam ; mudam ; āpa ; vismitā ; gṛhīta ; deham ; nija-yoga-māyayā ; prajāpatiḥ ; ca ; āha ; jaya ; iti ; vismitaḥ ;
202.words_en_fc: seeing; mother Aditi; Him (the Supreme Personality of Godhead); born of her own womb; the Supreme; the Personality of Godhead; great happiness; conceived; being very much astonished; accepted; body, or transcendental form; by His own spiritual potency; Kaśyapa Muni; also; said; all glories; thus; being astonished.;
202.yw_zh: 阿迪缇看到从她子宫中显现并靠自己的灵性能量展现出超然身体的至尊人格首神时，她惊喜万分。看到这孩子，生物体祖先喀夏帕幸福而又惊奇地呼喊道，”胜利! 胜利！”。
202.yw_en: When Aditi saw the Supreme Personality of Godhead, who had appeared from her own womb, having accepted a transcendental body by His own spiritual potency, she was struck with wonder and was very happy. Upon seeing the child, Prajāpati Kaśyapa exclaimed, “Jaya! Jaya!” in great happiness and wonder.

202.ldw:
yat tad vapur bhāti vibhūṣaṇāyudhair
 avyakta-cid-vyaktam adhārayad dhariḥ
babhūva tenaiva sa vāmano vaṭuḥ
 sampaśyator divya-gatir yathā naṭaḥ|
202.ldw_fc: yat ; tat ; vapuḥ ; bhāti ; vibhūṣaṇa ; āyudhaiḥ ; avyakta ; cit-vyaktam ; adhārayat ; hariḥ ; babhūva ; tena ; eva ; saḥ ; vāmanaḥ ; vaṭuḥ ; sampaśyatoḥ ; divya-gatiḥ ; yathā ; naṭaḥ ;
202.words_en_fc: which; that; transcendental body; manifests; with regular ornaments; and with weapons; unmanifested; spiritually manifested; assumed; the Lord; immediately became; with that; certainly; He (the Lord); dwarf; a brāhmaṇa brahmacārī; while both His father and mother were seeing; whose movements are wonderful; as; a theatrical actor.;
202.yw_zh: 至尊主以祂原本手持武器和佩戴各种首饰的形象显现。尽管这永恒存在的形象在物质世界中是不可见的，祂还是以这一形象显现了。接着，祂恰似一个戏剧演员般，在衪父母面前转化为瓦玛纳一一侏儒布茹阿玛纳兼贞守生的形象。
202.yw_en: The Lord appeared in His original form, with ornaments and weapons in His hands. Although this ever-existing form is not visible in the material world, He nonetheless appeared in this form. Then, in the presence of His father and mother, He assumed the form of Vāmana, a brāhmaṇa-dwarf, a brahmacārī, just like a theatrical actor.
202.yz_zh: 梵文”戏剧演员(natah)”一词十分重要。演员在演不同的角色时换不同的衣服，但都是同一个人。同样，正如《布茹阿玛-萨密塔》(Brahma-samhita)第5章的第33节和第39节诗所描述的:至尊主采用千百万的形象(advaitam acyutam anadim ananta-rupamadyam purana-purusam);他总是以数不胜数的化身出现(ramadi-murti-su kala-niyamena tisthan nanavataram akarod bhuvanesu kintu)。他虽然以不同形象的化身显现，但那些化身彼此并没有区别。他还是同一个人，有着同样的力量、同样的永恒及同样的灵性存在，但同时采用不同的形象。当瓦玛纳戴瓦从他母亲的子宫中显现时，他展现的首先是纳茹阿亚纳(Narayana)形象，四只手中分别持有海螺等象征性武器。随后，他立刻将自己的形象转为贞守生的形象(varu)。这意味着他的身体不是物质的。认为至尊主采用物质躯体的人没有智慧，应该多了解一些有关至尊主的地位和状态。正如《博伽梵歌》第4章的第9节诗证实:谁能了解我显现和活动的超然本质， 谁就在离开躯体后到达我永恒的住所，不再投生于这个物质世界(janma karma ca me divyam evam yo vetti tattvatah)。人必须明白至尊主以他原本超然的身体(sac--cid-ananda-vigraha)显现的超然性。
202.yz_en: The word naṭaḥ is significant. An actor changes dress to play different parts, but is always the same man. Similarly, as described in the Brahma-saṁhitā (5.33, 39), the Lord assumes many thousands and millions of forms (advaitam acyutam anādim ananta-rūpam ādyaṁ purāṇa-puruṣam). He is always present with innumerable incarnations (rāmādi-mūrtiṣu kalā-niyamena tiṣṭhan nānāvatāram akarod bhuvaneṣu kintu). Nonetheless, although He appears in various incarnations, they are not different from one another. He is the same person, with the same potency, the same eternity and the same spiritual existence, but He can simultaneously assume various forms. When Vāmanadeva appeared from the womb of His mother, He appeared in the form of Nārāyaṇa, with four hands equipped with the necessary symbolic weapons, and then immediately transformed Himself into a brahmacārī (vaṭu). This means that His body is not material. One who thinks that the Supreme Lord assumes a material body is not intelligent. He has to learn more about the Lord’s position. As confirmed in Bhagavad-gītā (4.9), janma karma ca me divyam evaṁ yo vetti tattvataḥ. One has to understand the transcendental appearance of the Lord in His original transcendental body (sac-cid-ānanda-vigraha).

202.ldw:
taṁ vaṭuṁ vāmanaṁ dṛṣṭvā
 modamānā maharṣayaḥ
karmāṇi kārayām āsuḥ
 puraskṛtya prajāpatim|
202.ldw_fc: tam ; vaṭum ; vāmanam ; dṛṣṭvā ; modamānāḥ ; mahā-ṛṣayaḥ ; karmāṇi ; kārayām āsuḥ ; puraskṛtya ; prajāpatim ;
202.words_en_fc: Him; the brahmacārī; dwarf; seeing; in a happy mood; the great saintly persons; ritualistic ceremonies; performed; keeping in front; Kaśyapa Muni, the Prajāpati.;
202.yw_zh: 大圣人们看到至尊主的这个瓦玛纳贞守生一一侏儒布茹阿玛纳的形象时，无疑非常高兴。于是，他们让生物体祖先喀夏帕·牟尼站在他们前面，面对至尊主举行了诞生庆典等所有的仪式典礼。
202.yw_en: When the great sages saw the Lord as the brahmacārī-dwarf Vāmana, they were certainly very pleased. Thus they placed before them Kaśyapa Muni, the Prajāpati, and performed all the ritualistic ceremonies, such as the birthday ceremony.
202.yz_zh: 按照韦达文明，布茹阿玛纳家庭中有孩子诞生时，就会首先举行诞生仪式(jata-kama)，随后逐一举行其它仪式和典礼。但当至尊主以侏儒贞守生(brahmacari)的形象显现时，他的圣线仪式也立刻与诞生仪式一起举行。
202.yz_en: According to Vedic civilization, when a child is born in the family of a brāhmaṇa, the birthday ceremony, known as jāta-karma, is first performed, and then other ceremonies are also gradually performed. But when this vāmana-rūpa appeared in the form of a vaṭu, or brahmacārī, His sacred thread ceremony was also performed immediately.

202.ldw:
tasyopanīyamānasya
 sāvitrīṁ savitābravīt
bṛhaspatir brahma-sūtraṁ
 mekhalāṁ kaśyapo ’dadāt|
202.ldw_fc: tasya ; upanīyamānasya ; sāvitrīm ; savitā ; abravīt ; bṛhaspatiḥ ; brahma-sūtram ; mekhalām ; kaśyapaḥ ; adadāt ;
202.words_en_fc: of Lord Vāmanadeva; at the time of His being offered the sacred thread ceremony; the Gāyatrī mantra; the sun-god; chanted; Bṛhaspati, the guru of the demigods; the sacred thread; the belt of straw; Kaśyapa Muni; offered.;
202.yw_zh: 在瓦玛纳戴瓦的授予圣线仪式上，太阳神亲自吟唱了嘎雅垂·曼陀，毕尔哈斯帕提献上圣线，喀夏帕·牟尼献上稻草编的腰带。
202.yw_en: At the sacred thread ceremony of Vāmanadeva, the sun-god personally uttered the Gāyatrī mantra, Bṛhaspati offered the sacred thread, and Kaśyapa Muni offered a straw belt.

202.ldw:
dadau kṛṣṇājinaṁ bhūmir
 daṇḍaṁ somo vanaspatiḥ
kaupīnācchādanaṁ mātā
 dyauś chatraṁ jagataḥ pateḥ|
202.ldw_fc: dadau ; kṛṣṇa-ajinam ; bhūmiḥ ; daṇḍam ; somaḥ ; vanaḥ-patiḥ ; kaupīna ; ācchādanam ; mātā ; dyauḥ ; chatram ; jagataḥ ; pateḥ ;
202.words_en_fc: gave, offered; the skin of a deer; mother earth; a brahmacārī’s rod; the moon-god; the king of the forest; the underwear; covering the body; His mother, Aditi; the heavenly kingdom; an umbrella; of the whole universe; of the master.;
202.yw_zh: 大地母亲送祂一张鹿皮，森林之王月亮神送祂一根贞守生用的棍子(布茹阿玛一丹达)。衪母亲阿迪缇送祂一块当内衣的布料，掌管天堂王国的神明献给祂一把伞。
202.yw_en: Mother earth gave Him a deerskin, and the demigod of the moon, who is the king of the forest, gave Him a brahma-daṇḍa [the rod of a brahmacārī]. His mother, Aditi, gave Him cloth for underwear, and the deity presiding over the heavenly kingdom offered Him an umbrella.

202.ldw:
kamaṇḍaluṁ veda-garbhaḥ
 kuśān saptarṣayo daduḥ
akṣa-mālāṁ mahārāja
 sarasvaty avyayātmanaḥ|
202.ldw_fc: kamaṇḍalum ; veda-garbhaḥ ; kuśān ; sapta-ṛṣayaḥ ; daduḥ ; akṣa-mālām ; mahārāja ; sarasvatī ; avyaya-ātmanaḥ ;
202.words_en_fc: a waterpot; Lord Brahmā; kuśa grass; the seven sages; offered; a string of Rudrākṣa beads; O King; the goddess Sarasvatī; to the Supreme Personality of Godhead.;
202.yw_zh: 君王啊!主布茹阿玛向无穷无尽的至尊人格首神献上一个水罐。七圣人献给祂库沙草，学问女神萨茹阿斯瓦缇母亲送给祂一串茹铎克沙念珠。
202.yw_en: O King, Lord Brahmā offered a waterpot to the inexhaustible Supreme Personality of Godhead, the seven sages offered Him kuśa grass, and mother Sarasvatī gave Him a string of Rudrākṣa beads.

202.ldw:
tasmā ity upanītāya
 yakṣa-rāṭ pātrikām adāt
bhikṣāṁ bhagavatī sākṣād
 umādād ambikā satī|
202.ldw_fc: tasmai ; iti ; upanītāya ; yakṣa-rāṭ ; pātrikām ; adāt ; bhikṣām ; bhagavatī ; sākṣāt ; umā ; adāt ; ambikā ; satī ;
202.words_en_fc: unto Him (Lord Vāmanadeva); in this way; who had undergone His sacred thread ceremony; Kuvera, the treasurer of heaven and King of the Yakṣas; a pot for begging alms; delivered; alms; mother Bhavānī, the wife of Lord Śiva; directly; Umā; gave; the mother of the universe; the chaste.;
202.yw_zh: 当瓦玛纳戴瓦这样被授予圣线后，夜叉之王库维尔给祂一个乞讨用的罐子，主希瓦的妻子及整个宇宙最贞洁的母亲巴嘎娃缇，给祂第一份布施。
202.yw_en: When Vāmanadeva had thus been given the sacred thread, Kuvera, King of the Yakṣas, gave Him a pot for begging alms, and mother Bhagavatī, the wife of Lord Śiva and most chaste mother of the entire universe, gave Him His first alms.

202.ldw:
sa brahma-varcasenaivaṁ
 sabhāṁ sambhāvito vaṭuḥ
brahmarṣi-gaṇa-sañjuṣṭām
 atyarocata māriṣaḥ|
202.ldw_fc: saḥ ; brahma-varcasena ; evam ; sabhām ; sambhāvitaḥ ; vaṭuḥ ; brahma-ṛṣi-gaṇa-sañjuṣṭām ; ati-arocata ; māriṣaḥ ;
202.words_en_fc: He (Vāmanadeva); by His Brahman effulgence; in this way; the assembly; having been welcomed by everyone; the brahmacārī; filled with great brāhmaṇa sages; surpassing, appeared beautiful; the best of the brahmacārīs.;
202.yw_zh: 主瓦玛纳戴瓦一一最优秀的贞守生，在这样受到大家的欢迎后，放射出祂的梵光。祂的美就这样胜过挤满现场的全体伟大圣洁的布茹阿玛纳的美。
202.yw_en: Having thus been welcomed by everyone, Lord Vāmanadeva, the best of the brahmacārīs, exhibited His Brahman effulgence. Thus He surpassed in beauty that entire assembly, which was filled with great saintly brāhmaṇas.

202.ldw:
samiddham āhitaṁ vahniṁ
 kṛtvā parisamūhanam
paristīrya samabhyarcya
 samidbhir ajuhod dvijaḥ|
202.ldw_fc: samiddham ; āhitam ; vahnim ; kṛtvā ; parisamūhanam ; paristīrya ; samabhyarcya ; samidbhiḥ ; ajuhot ; dvijaḥ ;
202.words_en_fc: blazing; being situated; the fire; after making; properly; surpassing; after offering worship; with sacrificial offerings; completed the fire sacrifice; the best of the brāhmaṇas.;
202.yw_zh: 圣主瓦玛纳戴瓦设置祭坛后献上崇拜，并在祭祀场中举行了一场祭祀。
202.yw_en: After Lord Śrī Vāmanadeva set a sacrificial fire, He offered worship and performed a fire sacrifice on the sacrificial field.

202.ldw:
śrutvāśvamedhair yajamānam ūrjitaṁ
 baliṁ bhṛgūṇām upakalpitais tataḥ
jagāma tatrākhila-sāra-sambhṛto
 bhāreṇa gāṁ sannamayan pade pade|
202.ldw_fc: śrutvā ; aśvamedhaiḥ ; yajamānam ; ūrjitam ; balim ; bhṛgūṇām ; upakalpitaiḥ ; tataḥ ; jagāma ; tatra ; akhila-sāra-sambhṛtaḥ ; bhāreṇa ; gām ; sannamayan ; pade pade ;
202.words_en_fc: after hearing; by aśvamedha sacrifices; the performer; very glorious; Bali Mahārāja; under the guidance of the brāhmaṇas born in the Bhṛgu dynasty; performed; from that place; went; there; the Supreme Personality of Godhead, the essence of all creation; with the weight; the earth; depressing; at every step.;
202.yw_zh: 在所有方面都最圆满的至尊主，听到巴利王正在布瑞古王朝的布茹阿玛纳的帮助下举行马祭时，便出发去向巴利王展现衪的仁慈。祂身体的重量使祂每走一步都造成大地凹陷。
202.yw_en: When the Lord heard that Bali Mahārāja was performing aśvamedha sacrifices under the patronage of brāhmaṇas belonging to the Bhṛgu dynasty, the Supreme Lord, who is full in every respect, proceeded there to show His mercy to Bali Mahārāja. By His weight, He pushed down the earth with every step.
202.yz_zh: 至尊人格首神是整个创造的本质(akhila-sara-sambhr-ta)。换句话说，他拥有这个物质世界里万物的精华。因此，尽管至尊主去找巴利王要东西，但他其实永远自身完整，具备一切，没什么要从其他人那里要的。事实上，他是如此强大有力，拥有绝对财富的他每走一步，都在地球表面造成凹陷。
202.yz_en: The Supreme Personality of Godhead is akhila-sāra-sambhṛta. In other words, He is the proprietor of everything essential in this material world. Thus although the Lord was going to Bali Mahārāja to beg something, He is always complete and has nothing to beg from anyone. Indeed, He is so powerful that in His full opulence He pressed down the surface of the earth at every step.

202.ldw:
taṁ narmadāyās taṭa uttare baler
 ya ṛtvijas te bhṛgukaccha-saṁjñake
pravartayanto bhṛgavaḥ kratūttamaṁ
 vyacakṣatārād uditaṁ yathā ravim|
202.ldw_fc: tam ; narmadāyāḥ ; taṭe ; uttare ; baleḥ ; ye ; ṛtvijaḥ ; te ; bhṛgukaccha-saṁjñake ; pravartayantaḥ ; bhṛgavaḥ ; kratu-uttamam ; vyacakṣata ; ārāt ; uditam ; yathā ; ravim ;
202.words_en_fc: Him (Vāmanadeva); of the river Narmadā; on the bank; northern; of Mahārāja Bali; who; the priests engaged in ritualistic ceremonies; all of them; in the field named Bhṛgukaccha; performing; all the descendants of Bhṛgu; the most important sacrifice, named aśvamedha; they observed; nearby; risen; like; the sun.;
202.yw_zh: 布瑞古的后裔一一布茹阿玛纳祭司们，在纳尔玛达河北岸名叫布瑞古喀查的场地中正忙着举行祭祀时，看到瓦玛纳戴如同太阳升起般出现在附近。
202.yw_en: While engaged in performing the sacrifice in the field known as Bhṛgukaccha, on the northern bank of the Narmadā River, the brahminical priests, the descendants of Bhṛgu, saw Vāmanadeva to be like the sun rising nearby.

202.ldw:
te ṛtvijo yajamānaḥ sadasyā
 hata-tviṣo vāmana-tejasā nṛpa
sūryaḥ kilāyāty uta vā vibhāvasuḥ
 sanat-kumāro ’tha didṛkṣayā kratoḥ|
202.ldw_fc: te ; ṛtvijaḥ ; yajamānaḥ ; sadasyāḥ ; hata-tviṣaḥ ; vāmana-tejasā ; nṛpa ; sūryaḥ ; kila ; āyāti ; uta vā ; vibhāvasuḥ ; sanat-kumāraḥ ; atha ; didṛkṣayā ; kratoḥ ;
202.words_en_fc: all of them; the priests; as well as Bali Mahārāja, who had engaged them in performing the yajña; all the members of the assembly; decreased in their bodily effulgence; by the brilliant effulgence of Lord Vāmana; O King; the sun; whether; is coming; either; the fire-god; the Kumāra known as Sanat-kumāra; either; with a desire to observe; the sacrificial ceremony.;
202.yw_zh: 君王啊!瓦玛纳戴瓦发出的明亮光辉，使祭司们、巴利王及所有聚集在现场的人都黯然失色。因此，他们互相询问是不是太阳神本人、萨纳特一库玛尔或火神亲自来观看祭祀仪式了。
202.yw_en: O King, because of Vāmanadeva’s bright effulgence, the priests, along with Bali Mahārāja and all the members of the assembly, were robbed of their splendor. Thus they began to ask one another whether the sun-god himself, Sanat-kumāra or the fire-god had personally come to see the sacrificial ceremony.

202.ldw:
itthaṁ saśiṣyeṣu bhṛguṣv anekadhā
 vitarkyamāṇo bhagavān sa vāmanaḥ
chatraṁ sadaṇḍaṁ sajalaṁ kamaṇḍaluṁ
 viveśa bibhrad dhayamedha-vāṭam|
202.ldw_fc: ittham ; sa-śiṣyeṣu ; bhṛguṣu ; anekadhā ; vitarkyamāṇaḥ ; bhagavān ; saḥ ; vāmanaḥ ; chatram ; sa-daṇḍam ; sa-jalam ; kamaṇḍalum ; viveśa ; bibhrat ; hayamedha ; vāṭam ;
202.words_en_fc: in this way; with their disciples; among the Bhṛgus; in many ways; being talked and argued about; the Supreme Personality of Godhead; that; Lord Vāmana; umbrella; with the rod; filled with water; waterpot; entered; taking in hand; of the aśvamedha sacrifice; the arena.;
202.yw_zh: 就在布瑞古王朝的祭司和他们的门徒以各种方式商谈和争论时，至尊人格首神瓦玛纳手持棍子、伞和一个装满了水的水罐，进入举行马祭的祭祀场。
202.yw_en: While the priests of the Bhṛgu dynasty and their disciples talked and argued in various ways, the Supreme Personality of Godhead, Vāmanadeva, holding in His hands the rod, the umbrella and a waterpot full of water, entered the arena of the aśvamedha sacrifice.

202.ldw:
mauñjyā mekhalayā vītam
 upavītājinottaram
jaṭilaṁ vāmanaṁ vipraṁ
 māyā-māṇavakaṁ harim|praviṣṭaṁ vīkṣya bhṛgavaḥ
 saśiṣyās te sahāgnibhiḥ
pratyagṛhṇan samutthāya
 saṅkṣiptās tasya tejasā|
202.ldw_fc: mauñjyā ; mekhalayā ; vītam ; upavīta ; ajina-uttaram ; jaṭilam ; vāmanam ; vipram ; māyā-māṇavakam ; harim ; praviṣṭam ; vīkṣya ; bhṛgavaḥ ; sa-śiṣyāḥ ; te ; saha-agnibhiḥ ; pratyagṛhṇan ; samutthāya ; saṅkṣiptāḥ ; tasya ; tejasā ;
202.words_en_fc: made of muñja straw; with a belt; circled; sacred thread; wearing a deerskin upper garment; having matted locks of hair; Lord Vāmana; a brāhmaṇa; the illusory son of a human being; the Supreme Personality of Godhead; entered; seeing; the priests who were descendants of Bhṛgu; with their disciples; all of them; with the fire sacrifice; properly welcomed; standing up; being diminished; His; by brilliance.;
202.yw_zh: 显现为布茹阿玛纳男孩的主瓦玛纳戴瓦进入祭祀场所，祂佩戴一条稻草编的腰带、一条圣线，穿一件鹿皮上衣，顶着一头盛成一团的头发。祂发出的明亮光芒，使在场所有的祭司及他们的门徒黯然失色;大家都从自己的座位上起身，以向至尊主敬礼的方式恰当地迎接祂。
202.yw_en: Appearing as a brāhmaṇa boy, wearing a belt of straw, a sacred thread, an upper garment of deerskin, and matted locks of hair, Lord Vāmanadeva entered the arena of sacrifice. His brilliant effulgence diminished the brilliance of all the priests and their disciples, who thus stood from their seats and welcomed the Lord properly by offering obeisances.

202.ldw:
yajamānaḥ pramudito
 darśanīyaṁ manoramam
rūpānurūpāvayavaṁ
 tasmā āsanam āharat|
202.ldw_fc: yajamānaḥ ; pramuditaḥ ; darśanīyam ; manoramam ; rūpa ; anurūpa ; avayavam ; tasmai ; āsanam ; āharat ;
202.words_en_fc: Bali Mahārāja, who had engaged all the priests in performing the sacrifice; being very jubilant; pleasing to see; so beautiful; with beauty; equal to His bodily beauty; all the different parts of the body; unto Him; a sitting place; offered.;
202.yw_zh: 巴利王很高兴看到主瓦玛纳戴瓦，祂美丽的四肢为祂整个身体平添美色。巴利王满怀喜悦之情地为祂提供一个座位。
202.yw_en: Bali Mahārāja, jubilant at seeing Lord Vāmanadeva, whose beautiful limbs contributed equally to the beauty of His entire body, offered Him a seat with great satisfaction.

202.ldw:
svāgatenābhinandyātha
 pādau bhagavato baliḥ
avanijyārcayām āsa
 mukta-saṅga-manoramam|
202.ldw_fc: su-āgatena ; abhinandya ; atha ; pādau ; bhagavataḥ ; baliḥ ; avanijya ; arcayām āsa ; mukta-saṅga-manoramam ;
202.words_en_fc: by words of welcome; welcoming; thus; the two lotus feet; of the Lord; Bali Mahārāja; washing; worshiped; the Supreme Personality of Godhead, who is beautiful to the liberated souls.;
202.yw_zh: 这样恰当地接待了在解脱灵魂眼里永远美丽的至拿人格首神后，巴利王又以洗浴祂莲花足的方式崇拜祂。
202.yw_en: Thus offering a proper reception to the Supreme Personality of Godhead, who is always beautiful to the liberated souls, Bali Mahārāja worshiped Him by washing His lotus feet.

202.ldw:
tat-pāda-śaucaṁ jana-kalmaṣāpahaṁ
 sa dharma-vin mūrdhny adadhāt sumaṅgalam
yad deva-devo giriśaś candra-maulir
 dadhāra mūrdhnā parayā ca bhaktyā|
202.ldw_fc: tat-pāda-śaucam ; jana-kalmaṣa-apaham ; saḥ ; dharma-vit ; mūrdhni ; adadhāt ; su-maṅgalam ; yat ; deva-devaḥ ; giriśaḥ ; candra-mauliḥ ; dadhāra ; mūrdhnā ; parayā ; ca ; bhaktyā ;
202.words_en_fc: the water that washed the lotus feet of the Lord; which washes away all the sinful reactions of the people in general; he (Bali Mahārāja); completely aware of religious principles; on the head; carried; all-auspicious; which; the best of the demigods; Lord Śiva; who carries on his forehead the emblem of the moon; carried; on the head; supreme; also; with devotion.;
202.yw_zh: 将月亮标志戴在自己前额上的最卓越的半神人主希瓦，怀着巨大的奉爱之情，用自己的头承受从主维施努的足尖流出的恒河水。巴利王因为清楚宗教原则，所以了解这一点。为此，他以主希瓦为榜样，将洗浴过至尊主莲花足的水撒在自己头上。
202.yw_en: Lord Śiva, the best of demigods, who carries on his forehead the emblem of the moon, receives on his head with great devotion the Ganges water emanating from the toe of Viṣṇu. Being aware of religious principles, Bali Mahārāja knew this. Consequently, following in the footsteps of Lord Śiva, he also placed on his head the water that had washed the Lord’s lotus feet.
202.yz_zh: 主希瓦被称为”用头承接恒河水的人(Ganga-dha-ra)”。主希瓦的前额上有一个半月形标记，但为了向至尊人格首神表示最高的敬意，主希瓦将这恒河水置于那标记之上。主希瓦是伟大的权威人士(mahajana)之一，每一个人，至少每一个奉献者都应该学习主希瓦树立的榜样。巴利王后来也成为伟大的权威人士之一。一位伟大的权威人士跟随另一位伟大的人士，就这样， 透过师徒传承学习伟大人士的活动，可以使人提升灵性意识。恒河水从主维施努的大脚趾流出，所以是神圣的。巴利王用水冲洗瓦玛纳戴瓦的莲花足，那水变得与恒河水一样。正因为如此，完美地了解所有宗教原则的巴利王，向主希瓦学习，将那水洒在自己头上。
202.yz_en: Lord Śiva is known as Gaṅgā-dhara, or one who carries the water of the Ganges on his head. On Lord Śiva’s forehead is the emblem of the half-moon, yet to give supreme respect to the Supreme Personality of Godhead, Lord Śiva placed the water of the Ganges above this emblem. This example should be followed by everyone, or at least by every devotee, because Lord Śiva is one of the mahājanas. Similarly, Mahārāja Bali also later became a mahājana. One mahājana follows another mahājana, and by following the paramparā system of mahājana activities one can become advanced in spiritual consciousness. The water of the Ganges is sanctified because it emanates from the toe of Lord Viṣṇu. Bali Mahārāja washed the lotus feet of Vāmanadeva, and the water with which he did so became equal to the Ganges. Bali Mahārāja, who perfectly knew all religious principles, therefore took that water on his head, following in the footsteps of Lord Śiva.

202.ldw:
śrī-balir uvāca|svāgataṁ te namas tubhyaṁ
 brahman kiṁ karavāma te
brahmarṣīṇāṁ tapaḥ sākṣān
 manye tvārya vapur-dharam|

202.words_en_fc: Bali Mahārāja said; all welcome; unto You; I offer my respectful obeisances unto You; O brāhmaṇa; what; can we do; for You; of the great brāhmaṇa sages; austerity; directly; I think; You; O noble one; personified.;
202.yw_zh: 巴利王接着对主瓦玛纳戴瓦说:布茹阿玛纳啊! 我衷心地欢迎您，向您致以我恭敬的顶礼。请告诉我们，我们能为您做什么。我们认为您是伟大的布茹阿玛纳圣人的苦修人格化身。
202.yw_en: Bali Mahārāja then said to Lord Vāmanadeva: O brāhmaṇa, I offer You my hearty welcome and my respectful obeisances. Please let us know what we may do for You. We think of You as the personified austerity of the great brāhmaṇa-sages.

202.ldw:
adya naḥ pitaras tṛptā
 adya naḥ pāvitaṁ kulam
adya sviṣṭaḥ kratur ayaṁ
 yad bhavān āgato gṛhān|

202.words_en_fc: today; our; forefathers; satisfied; today; our; purified; the whole family; today; properly executed; the sacrifice; this; because; Your Lordship; arrived; at our residence.;
202.yw_zh: 我的主啊！您仁慈地来到我们家，我所有的祖先都为此而感到满足，我们家和整个王朝都被神圣，我们正举行的祭祀因您的到来而圆满。
202.yw_en: O my Lord, because You have kindly arrived at our home, all my forefathers are satisfied, our family and entire dynasty have been sanctified, and the sacrifice we are performing is now complete because of Your presence.

202.ldw:
adyāgnayo me suhutā yathā-vidhi
 dvijātmaja tvac-caraṇāvanejanaiḥ
hatāṁhaso vārbhir iyaṁ ca bhūr aho
 tathā punītā tanubhiḥ padais tava|

202.words_en_fc: today; the sacrificial fires; executed by me; properly offered oblations; in terms of the śāstric injunction; O son of a brāhmaṇa; which washed Your lotus feet; who have become cleansed of all sinful reactions; by the water; this; also; the surface of the globe; oh; as well; sanctified; small; by the touch of the lotus feet; Your.;
202.yw_zh: 布茹阿玛纳的儿子啊!今天，祭祀之火按经典的训示燃起，洗浴过您莲花足的水洗净我一生从事罪恶活动所产生的恶报。我的上帝啊!整个世界的地表因您小小莲花足的触碰而被神圣化。
202.yw_en: O son of a brāhmaṇa, today the fire of sacrifice is ablaze according to the injunction of the śāstra, and I have been freed from all the sinful reactions of my life by the water that has washed Your lotus feet. O my Lord, by the touch of Your small lotus feet the entire surface of the world has been sanctified.

202.ldw:
yad yad vaṭo vāñchasi tat pratīccha me
 tvām arthinaṁ vipra-sutānutarkaye
gāṁ kāñcanaṁ guṇavad dhāma mṛṣṭaṁ
 tathānna-peyam uta vā vipra-kanyām
grāmān samṛddhāṁs turagān gajān vā

202.words_en_fc: whatever; O brahmacārī; You desire; that; You may take; from me; You; desiring something; O son of a brāhmaṇa; I consider; a cow; gold; a furnished residence; palatable; as well as; food grains; drink; indeed; either; the daughter of a brāhmaṇa; villages; prosperous; horses; elephants; either; chariots; as well as; O best of those who are worshipable; You may take.;
202.yw_zh: 布茹阿玛纳的儿子啊！看起来，您来这里是问我要什么东西。所以，无论您要什么，您都可以从我这里拿走。在值得崇拜的人中最卓越的人啊！您可以向我要一头乳牛、金子、美味的食物和饮料、能当你妻子的布茹阿玛纳的女儿、一座设施齐全的房子、丰足的村庄、马匹、大象、马车，或您想要的一切。
202.yw_en: O son of a brāhmaṇa, it appears that You have come here to ask me for something. Therefore, whatever You want You may take from me. O best of those who are worshipable. You may take from me a cow, gold, a furnished house, palatable food and drink, the daughter of a brāhmaṇa for Your wife, prosperous villages, horses, elephants, chariots or whatever You desire.
202.yz_en: Thus end the Bhaktivedanta purports of the Eighth Canto, Eighteenth Chapter, of the Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam, entitled “Lord Vāmanadeva, the Dwarf Incarnation.”

203.ldw:
śrī-śuka uvāca|iti vairocaner vākyaṁ
 dharma-yuktaṁ sa sūnṛtam
niśamya bhagavān prītaḥ
 pratinandyedam abravīt|
203.ldw_fc: śrī-śukaḥ uvāca ; iti ; vairocaneḥ ; vākyam ; dharma-yuktam ; saḥ ; sū-nṛtam ; niśamya ; bhagavān ; prītaḥ ; pratinandya ; idam ; abravīt ;
203.words_en_fc: Śrī Śukadeva Gosvāmī said; thus; of the son of Virocana; the words; in terms of religious principles; He; very pleasing; hearing; the Supreme Personality of Godhead; completely pleased; congratulating him; the following words; said.;
203.yw_zh: 舒卡戴瓦·哥斯瓦米继续道:至尊人格首神瓦玛钠戴瓦听巴利王说出这番令人愉快的话后，感到十分满意， 因为巴利王所说的话符合宗教原则。为此，至尊主开始赞扬巴利王。
203.yw_en: Śukadeva Gosvāmī continued: When the Supreme Personality of Godhead, Vāmanadeva, heard Bali Mahārāja speaking in this pleasing way, He was very satisfied, for Bali Mahārāja had spoken in terms of religious principles. Thus the Lord began to praise him.

203.ldw:
śrī-bhagavān uvāca|vacas tavaitaj jana-deva sūnṛtaṁ
 kulocitaṁ dharma-yutaṁ yaśas-karam
yasya pramāṇaṁ bhṛgavaḥ sāmparāye
 pitāmahaḥ kula-vṛddhaḥ praśāntaḥ|
203.ldw_fc: śrī-bhagavān uvāca ; vacaḥ ; tava ; etat ; jana-deva ; sū-nṛtam ; kula-ucitam ; dharma-yutam ; yaśaḥ-karam ; yasya ; pramāṇam ; bhṛgavaḥ ; sāmparāye ; pitāmahaḥ ; kula-vṛddhaḥ ; praśāntaḥ ;
203.words_en_fc: the Supreme Personality of Godhead said; words; your; this kind of; O King of the people; very true; exactly befitting your dynasty; completely in accord with the principles of religion; fit for spreading your reputation; of whom; the evidence; the brāhmaṇas of the Bhṛgu dynasty; in the next world; your grandfather; the oldest in the family; very peaceful (Prahlāda Mahārāja).;
203.yw_zh: 至尊人格首神说:君王啊!由于你现有的顾问们都是布瑞古的布茹阿玛纳后代，由于指导你今后生活的人是你的祖父一一平静且德高望重的帕拉德王，你确实是地位崇高。你所说的一切都很真实，完全符合宗教礼仪。它们与你家庭的所作所为完全一致，它们增添你的光荣。
203.yw_en: The Supreme Personality of Godhead said: O King, you are indeed exalted because your present advisors are the brāhmaṇas who are descendants of Bhṛgu and because your instructor for your future life is your grandfather, the peaceful and venerable Prahlāda Mahārāja. Your statements are very true, and they completely agree with religious etiquette. They are in keeping with the behavior of your family, and they enhance your reputation.
203.yz_zh:
帕拉德王(Prahlada Maharaja)是纯粹奉献者的一个生动典范。有人也许会争论说，既然帕拉达王那么老了还依恋他的家庭，尤其是他的孙子巴利王，怎么能说他是理想的典范呢?为此，这节诗用了梵文”十分平静(prasantah)”一词。奉献者总是很冷静、清醒，从不受任何情况的打扰。即使一个奉献者留在居士生活阶段，没有放弃物质的拥有，我们也要明白:他对至尊主所具有的纯粹奉爱之情，使他总是很平静，冷静和清醒。正因为如此，圣柴坦亚·玛哈帕布(Caitanya Mahaprabhu)说:

“无论一个人是布茹阿玛纳、进入弃绝阶层的人(sannyasi)，庶铎，还是其他什么人，只要他了解奎师那的科学，就可以成为灵性导师。”(《永恒的柴坦亚经》中篇8。128)完全了解奎师那科学的人，在人生中的任何一个阶段和阶层，都是灵性导师(guru)。因此，帕拉德王在所有的情况中都是灵性导师。

在此，圣主瓦玛纳戴瓦也教导进入弃绝阶层的人(sannyasi)和贞守生(brahmacari)，人不该要求多于实际所需的一切。尽管巴利王准备把他想要的一切都给他，但他只要三跨步的土地。
203.yz_en:
Prahlāda Mahārāja is a vivid example of a pure devotee. Someone might argue that since Prahlāda Mahārāja, even though very old, was attached to his family, and specifically to his grandson Bali Mahārāja, how could he be an ideal example? Therefore this verse uses the word praśāntaḥ. A devotee is always sober. He is never disturbed by any conditions. Even if a devotee remains in gṛhastha life and does not renounce material possessions, he should still be understood to be praśānta, sober, because of his pure devotion to the Lord. Śrī Caitanya Mahāprabhu therefore said:

kibā vipra, kibā nyāsī, śūdra kene naya
 yei kṛṣṇa-tattva-vettā, sei ‘guru’ haya

“Whether one is a brāhmaṇa, a sannyāsī or a śūdra — regardless of what he is — he can become a spiritual master if he knows the science of Kṛṣṇa.” (Cc. Madhya 8.128) Anyone completely aware of the science of Kṛṣṇa, regardless of his status in life, is a guru. Thus Prahlāda Mahārāja is a guru in all circumstances.

Here His Lordship Vāmanadeva also teaches sannyāsīs and brahmacārīs that one should not ask more than necessary. He wanted only three paces of land, although Bali Mahārāja wanted to give Him anything He wanted.

203.ldw:
na hy etasmin kule kaścin
 niḥsattvaḥ kṛpaṇaḥ pumān
pratyākhyātā pratiśrutya
 yo vādātā dvijātaye|
203.ldw_fc: na ; hi ; etasmin ; kule ; kaścit ; niḥsattvaḥ ; kṛpaṇaḥ ; pumān ; pratyākhyātā ; pratiśrutya ; yaḥ vā ; adātā ; dvijātaye ;
203.words_en_fc: not; indeed; in this; in the dynasty or family; anyone; poor-minded; miser; any person; refuses; after promising to give; either; not being charitable; unto the brāhmaṇas.;
203.yw_zh: 我知道，甚至直到目前为止，出生在你们家的人没有一个是小心眼或吝啬的。你们家没人能拒绝给布茹阿玛纳布施，也没人在承诺给予布施后不实现自己的诺言。
203.yw_en: I know that even until now, no one taking birth in your family has been poor-minded or miserly. No one has refused to give charity to brāhmaṇas, nor after promising to give charity has anyone failed to fulfill his promise.

203.ldw:
na santi tīrthe yudhi cārthinārthitāḥ
 parāṅmukhā ye tv amanasvino nṛpa
yuṣmat-kule yad yaśasāmalena
 prahrāda udbhāti yathoḍupaḥ khe|
203.ldw_fc: na ; santi ; tīrthe ; yudhi ; ca ; arthinā ; arthitāḥ ; parāṅmukhāḥ ; ye ; tu ; amanasvinaḥ ; nṛpa ; yuṣmat-kule ; yat ; yaśasā amalena ; prahrādaḥ ; udbhāti ; yathā ; uḍupaḥ ; khe ;
203.words_en_fc: not; there are; in holy places (where charity is given); in the battlefield; also; by a brāhmaṇa or a kṣatriya; who have been asked; who refused their prayers; such persons; indeed; such low-minded, low-grade kings; O King (Bali Mahārāja); in your dynasty; therein; by impeccable reputation; Prahlāda Mahārāja; arises; as; the moon; in the sky.;
203.yw_zh: 巴利王啊!你们王朝从未出过一个卑鄙的君王; 那种君王在接到请求后，拒绝在圣地内给布茹阿玛纳布施或在职场上与查锤亚作战。而且，因为拥有像空中美丽的明月般的帕拉德王，你所在的王朝更加光荣。
203.yw_en: O King Bali, never in your dynasty has the low-minded king been born who upon being requested has refused charity to brāhmaṇas in holy places or a fight to kṣatriyas on a battlefield. And your dynasty is even more glorious due to the presence of Prahlāda Mahārāja, who is like the beautiful moon in the sky.
203.yz_zh: 《博伽梵歌》(Bhagavad-gita)中介绍了查锤亚(ksatriya) 的特征，其中之一是愿意布施(dana)。当布茹阿玛纳提出要求时，查锤亚不拒绝给予布施。他也不能拒绝另一个查锤亚提出的挑战。拒绝请求的君王被说成是卑鄙的。在巴利王的王朝中没有这种卑鄙的君王。
203.yz_en: The symptoms of a kṣatriya are given in Bhagavad-gītā. One of the qualifications is the willingness to give charity (dāna). A kṣatriya does not refuse to give charity when requested by a brāhmaṇa, nor can he refuse to fight another kṣatriya. A king who does refuse is called low-minded. In the dynasty of Bali Mahārāja there were no such low-minded kings.

203.ldw:
yato jāto hiraṇyākṣaś
 carann eka imāṁ mahīm
prativīraṁ dig-vijaye
 nāvindata gadāyudhaḥ|
203.ldw_fc: yataḥ ; jātaḥ ; hiraṇyākṣaḥ ; caran ; ekaḥ ; imām ; mahīm ; prativīram ; dik-vijaye ; na avindata ; gadā-āyudhaḥ ;
203.words_en_fc: in which dynasty; was born; the king named Hiraṇyākṣa; wandering; alone; this; surface of the globe; a rival hero; for conquering all directions; could not get; bearing his own club.;
203.yw_zh: 黑冉亚克沙就出生在你们王朝中。他独自一人扛着自己的大头棒在世上游荡，在没人协助的情况下征服了四面八方。他打遍天下无敌手。
203.yw_en: It was in your dynasty that Hiraṇyākṣa was born. Carrying only his own club, he wandered the globe alone, without assistance, to conquer all directions, and no hero he met could rival him.

203.ldw:
yaṁ vinirjitya kṛcchreṇa
 viṣṇuḥ kṣmoddhāra āgatam
ātmānaṁ jayinaṁ mene
 tad-vīryaṁ bhūry anusmaran|
203.ldw_fc: yam ; vinirjitya ; kṛcchreṇa ; viṣṇuḥ ; kṣmā-uddhāre ; āgatam ; ātmānam ; jayinam ; mene ; tat-vīryam ; bhūri ; anusmaran ;
203.words_en_fc: whom; after conquering; with great difficulty; Lord Viṣṇu in His incarnation as a boar; at the time when the earth was delivered; appeared before Him; personally, Himself; victorious; considered; the prowess of Hiraṇyākṣa; constantly, or more and more; thinking about.;
203.yw_zh: 当以雄猪化身从嘎尔博达喀尔汪洋中救起地球的主维施努，要杀出现在祂面前的黑冉亚克沙时，两人的打斗十分激烈，至尊主费尽力气才杀死黑冉亚克沙。后来，至尊主想到黑冉亚克沙非凡的高超本领时，感到自己真正胜利了。
203.yw_en: When delivering the earth from the Garbhodaka Sea, Lord Viṣṇu, in His incarnation as a boar, killed Hiraṇyākṣa, who had appeared before Him. The fight was severe, and the Lord killed Hiraṇyākṣa with great difficulty. Later, as the Lord thought about the uncommon prowess of Hiraṇyākṣa, He felt Himself victorious indeed.

203.ldw:
niśamya tad-vadhaṁ bhrātā
 hiraṇyakaśipuḥ purā
hantuṁ bhrātṛ-haṇaṁ kruddho
 jagāma nilayaṁ hareḥ|

203.words_en_fc: after hearing; the killing of Hiraṇyākṣa; the brother; Hiraṇyakaśipu; formerly; just to kill; the killer of his brother; very angry; went; to the residence; of the Supreme Personality of Godhead.;
203.yw_zh: 黑冉亚卡希普听到他弟弟被杀的消息后，怒火万丈地去到杀死他弟弟的维施努的住所，想要杀死主维施努。
203.yw_en: When Hiraṇyakaśipu heard the news of his brother’s being killed, with great anger he went to the residence of Viṣṇu, the killer of his brother, wanting to kill Lord Viṣṇu.

203.ldw:
tam āyāntaṁ samālokya
 śūla-pāṇiṁ kṛtāntavat
cintayām āsa kāla-jño
 viṣṇur māyāvināṁ varaḥ|
